Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ď…ďe an, himmanee haalugol ko Alla longini on kon, e wota on ha…óu wowlee e haalaaji janani.
Kono yo fow warru no haaniri non, hara ko no yaadiri.
Mi andinii on, yo musi…ď…ďe, fii oo Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo mo mi fe…≤…≤inani on, mo ja…ďu…óon, on mo cati…óon e mun, tabitu…óon,
…óun ko on mo dandira…óon kadi, si tawii hi…óon jogori mo no mi fe…≤…≤inirani on mo non, si tawii non hinaa non, haray on gom…óinii mo meere.
Ko adii kon, ko ko mi hendii kon mi fe…≤…≤inani on: Almasiihu on ko fii junuubaaji men …óin maayiri, wano windori non ka defte annabaa…ďe …ďen,
o surraa, o immintinaa ka …≤alaande tammere, wano windori non ka defte annabaa…ďe …ďen.
Oo wi'etee…óo Petruusu yi'ii mo. E hoore …óun kadi sappoo e …ói…óoo…ďe …ďen yi'ii mo.
∆Āawto …óun, …ďuri musi…ď…ďe teeme…ó…óe njowo yiidi mo nde wootere, …ďe tawata …ďur…ďe …ďen e hakkunde ma…ď…ďe no wuuri fewndo …óoo, wo…ď…ďe …ďen maayiino.
∆Āawto …óun kadi Yaaquuba yi'i mo. E hoore …óun, *sahaabaa…ďe …ďen fow yi'i mo.
∆Āawto …ďen…óon fow, o hollitii e an min kadi oo wa'u…óo wa jibinaa…óo hewtaali.
Ko fii hari min mi hewtaa sahaabaa…ďe …ďen, mi handaa kadi e noddeede sahaabaajo, ko fii mi…óo cukkotonoo *moftal Alla ngal.

Ko sabu mo∆ī∆īere Alla nden wa…ói si mi woni ko mi woni kon. Awa kadi mo∆ī∆īere makko nden e telen-ma an wonaali meere. Ka liddu …óun, mi gollii …ďuri …ďe …ďe fow. Kono fow e mun hinaa min, kono ko mo∆ī∆īere Alla wonde e an nden.
Ko …óun wa…ói, woni ko min, woni ko kam…ďe, ko …óun…óoo men waajii, ko …óun kadi gom…óin…óon.
E hin-le, si men waajike wonde Almasiihu on immitike e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen, haray ko honno wo…ď…ďe e mon wi'irta wonde ummutal may…ďe alaa?
Si tawno ummutal may…ďe alaa, harayno Almasiihu on tigi immitaaki.
Awa si tawii Almasiihu on immitaaki, haray waaju amen ngun ko meere, gom…óinal mon ngal kadi ko meere.
Haray kadi ko men seeditotoo…ďe fenaande e fee Alla, ko fii men seeditanike Alla wonde o immintinii Almasiihu on, hara-le o immintinaali mo si tawno may…ďe …ďen immitotaako.
Ko fii si tawno may…ďe …ďen immitotaako, harayno Almasiihu on kadi immitaaki.
E si tawii Almasiihu on immitaaki, haray gom…óinal mon ngal ko meere, haray haa jooni hi…óon e nder junuubaaji mon …óin.
Harayno maydu…ďe e gom…óinal Almasiihu on …ďen ko hayru…ďe.
Si tawii ko e nder oo aduna tun tan∆īinor…óen Almasiihu on, haray e hakkunde yim…ďe …ďen fow ko enen …ďuri yurmude.
Kono jooni non pellet Almasiihu on immintinaama e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen, ko kanko woni arano e …óun e nder may…ďe …ďen.
∆Āay mayde nden ko sabu ne…ó…óo gooto ardi, ummutal may…ďe …ďen kadi ko sabu ne…ó…óo gooto ardi.
Wano fow maayiri sabu *Aadama non, ko wano non kadi fow wuuritirta sabu Almasiihu on.
Kono mo kala e saffewol mun. Ko Almasiihu on woni arano on, si hikka …óon jeyaa…ďe Almasiihu on …ďen, …≤ande ardu makko ndun.
Ontuma, darngal daroo, ka o jonnitata …óon laamu ngun Alla Baabaajo on, …ďawto bonnugol kala laamu e kala bawgal e kala doole.
Ko fii bee Almasiihu on laamoo haa tuma o watti ay…ďe makko …ďen fow ka ley koy…óe makko.
Ga…≤o sakkitetee…óo muleede on, ko mayde nden.
Ko …óun wa…ói si Alla wa…óii fow ka ley koy…óe makko. Kono si wi'aama fow yankinanaama mo, ka haqiiqa, haray on Yankinan…óo mo kala huunde tawaaka.
E nde piiji …óin fow yankinanoyaa mo, onsay ∆Āi…ó…óo on tigi yankinanto on Yankinan…óo mo kala huunde, fii no Alla wonira fow e …ói fow.
Awa ko hon…óun won…ďe lootanaade may…ďe …ďen maande kisiyee wa…óata? Si tawii may…ďe …ďen immitotaako few, haray ko fii hon…óun …ďe lootantoo maande kisiyee fii ma…ď…ďe?
Enen non fii hon…óun saa'i kala hi…óen e masiibo?
∆Ěande woo mi…óo wee…ďitanii mayde nden. Mi…óo seedintini …óun, yo musi…ď…ďe an, wano mi mantori on non e nder humondiral e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on.
Si tawii ko e faale ne…ó…óanke mi ha…ďiri kulle …óen ka saare Efeesi, haray ko nafa hon…óun mi he…ďoyta? Si tawii may…ďe …ďen immitoytaako: ¬ęHaray …≤aamen, yaren, …ďay jango en maayay.¬Ľ
Awa wota on …óaynito, ko fii wondi…ď…ďe bon…ďe bonnay jikkuuji mo∆ī∆īi.
Awa artee e ko feewi kon, wota on wa…óu junuubu. Ko fii wo…ď…ďe …ďen maraa gandal fii andugol Alla, ko fii hersingol on mi wowliri …óun.
Kono go…ó…óo no gasa wi'ude: ¬ęKo honno may…ďe …ďen immitoroyta e ko …ďandu hondu …ďe ardoyta?¬Ľ
Ko an yo njofoojo, ko sankataa kon fu…óataa si maayaali.
Ko sankataa kon hinaa …ďandu aroyooru ndun, kono ko abbere nii tun, no gasa ngawri maa awdi goo.
E hoore …óun, Alla ye…óa nden abbere …ďandu no o faaliraa, awdi kala o ye…óa …óun …ďandu ko hawrani …óun.
∆Āandu fow wonaa gootun: wonndu ko ndu ne…ó…óanke, wonndu goo ko ndu kulle, wonndu goo kadi ko ndu colli, wonndu goo kadi ko ndu li∆ī∆īi.
No woodi kadi tagooje kammuyankeeje e tagooje adunayankeeje, kono Ňčari tagooje kammuyankeeje …óen no serti e Ňčari tagooje adunayankeeje …óen.
Naange ngen no mari Ňčari mun feere, lewru ndun no mari Ňčari mun feere, koode …óen kadi no mari noone Ňčariiji mun sertu…ói.
Awa ko nii kadi wonirani ummutal may…ďe …ďen: si …ďandu …≤olayndu sankaama, ko ndu …≤olataa immitoytoo.
Si …ďandu …≤iddundu sankaama, ndu immitodoyto e darja. Si …ďandu lo'undu sankaama, ndu immitodoyto e doole.
Si …ďandu adunayankeeru sankaama, ndu immitoyto ruuhuyankeeru. Si …ďandu adunayankeeru no woodi, haray …ďandu ruuhuyankeeru no woodi.
Ko …óun wa…ói si no windii: ¬ęAaden arano on, …óun ko Aadama, he…ďi ngurndan, o wuuri.¬Ľ Kono Aadama sakkitoro on ko ruuhuyankeejo ye…óoowo ngurndan.
Hinaa arano on woni ruuhuyankeejo on, kono ko …ďanduyankeejo, ko ko hikkii …óon kon woni ruuhuyankejun …óun.
Ne…ó…óo arano on ko e leydi ndin suutaa, ko mo ka leydi, ne…ó…óo …óimmo on ka…≤un ko ka kammu iwri.
∆Āen …ďe ka leydi no wa'i wa mo ka leydi on, …ďen …ďe ka kammu kadi no wa'i wa on mo ka kammu.
Ko wano nanditir…óen e mo ka leydi on non, ko wano non kadi nanditiroyten e oo mo ka kammu.
E hino ko mi woni wi'ude kon yo musi…ď…ďe an. Ka …ďandu ndun e ∆īii∆īan …óan waawaali he…ďude ge…ďal ka *laamu Alla …óon, ko …óon kadi woni ko …≤olata he…ďataa ge…ďal e ko …≤olataa kon.
Awa e hino, mi…óo wowlande on gundoo: en fow en maayataa, kono en fow en waylete,
e nder saa'ihun nii, yeru ma∆īaango yiitere, ka wuttaandu *liital sakkitoral. Ko fii ngal wuttete, may…ďe …ďen immitoo ko bontataa, onsay enen non en waylete.
Onsay bee nduu …ďandu …≤olayndu lontiniree ndu …≤olataa, awa kadi …ďandu maayayndu ndun lontiniree ndu maayataa.
Nde ndun …ďandu …≤olayndu lontiniraa ndu …≤olataa, e nde …ďandu maayayndu ndun lontiniraa ndu maayataa, onsay daalol windiingol ngol laatoto, wonde: ¬ęMayde nden mo…óaama e nder polgal.¬Ľ
¬ęEe mayde, ko honto polgal maa ngal woni? Ee mayde, ko honto ndagawal maa ngal woni?¬Ľ
Kono ndagawal mayde ko junuubu, awa kadi doole junuubu ko Sariya.
Yo mantoore wonan Alla, on Ye…óu…óo en polgal immorde e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on.
Awa yo musi…ď…ďe an yi…óaa…ďe, wonee tabitu…ďe …ďe dillintaako, …ďurtee …ďeydaade e golle Joomiraa…óo on, e hoore andugol wonde, golle mon …óen e telen-ma Joomiraa…óo on hinaa meere.
E telen-ma mottindirgol fii wallitagol yim…ďe Alla …ďen, wa…óiree onon kadi wano mi yamiriri *mofte won…óe Galaasi …óen non.
Yo mo kala e mon he…ďu ko anniyii, wallini feere beru maral makko ngal ka …≤allal aranal e nder yontere nden, …óun ko alattiire nden, fii wota on habbo haa tuma mi ari fii mottindirgol …óun.
∆äun, nde mi aroyi, mi wattiday e …ďe su…ďi…óon …ďen dokke mon …óen, wondude e …ďataake, …ďe na…ďa *Yerusalaam.
Si tawoyii non bee mi yaha min tigi, mi yaadoyay e ma…ď…ďe.
Mi yahoyay ka mon nde mi ta∆īitoyi Masedonii, ko fii mi rewoyay Masedonii.
No gasa mi …≤allidoyay e mon, maa toode mi ruumida e mon, fii no ardoron mi ka mi yahata ton.
E ngol laawol …óoo mi faalaaka rewude ka mon e hoore hawjere, kono mi…óo tan∆īinii wondugol e mon see…óa, si Joomiraa…óo on newnii.
Kono fow e mun, mi wonay Efeesi haa ka Juldeere *Pentakosta.
Ko fii dambugal njanal udditanike golle an nden, awa kadi ay…ďe …ďen no …óuu…ói.
Awa si Timotee hewtii, wa…óiree noone no o hulirtaa hakkunde mon, ko fii himo gollira wa an min e nder golle Joomiraa…óo on.
Awa wota gooto aybin mo. Neltee mo e jam fii no o hewtira ka an. Ko fii mi…óo habbodi mo e musi…ď…ďe …ďen.
Telen-ma oo musi…ó…óo an Apoloosi, mi wakkilinii mo fota fii yaadugol e musi…ď…ďe …ďen ka mon, hinaa non …óun woni faale makko on fewndo …óoo. Kono o yahoyay nde o he…ďi fajuhun.
Wattanee yiila tabiton e nder gom…óinal ngal, wakkilo…óon, tii…óon.
Ko wa…óoton woo wa…óiree giggol.
Mi yamirii on kadi yamiroore goo, yo musi…ď…ďe an. Hi…óon andi ko …ďeynguure Astefaana nden adii gom…óinde e nder Akaaya, …ďe woni kadi e kurkanagol yim…ďe Alla …ďen.
Awa onon kadi yankinanee …ďen yim…ďe e kala gollidoo…ďe e ma…ď…ďe.
Awa mi…óo weltori arugol Astefaana ngol, e Fortunaatusa e Akayuuka, …ďay …ďe wa…óanii lan ko on waawataano wa…óande lan.
Ko fii …ďe wallintinii wonkii an kin wano …ďe wallintiniri wonkiiji mon …óin non. Awa manee sifa …ďen yim…ďe.
Moftal ngal *Aazii salminii on. Akiila kadi e Piriskiila, wondude e moftal wongal ka suudu ma…ď…ďe ngal, salminii on fota e innde Joomiraa…óo on.
Musi…ď…ďe …ďen fow salminii on. Salmondiree, hirbondiron hirbondiral laa…ďungal.
Min Puulusa, mi salminirii on jungo an ngon tigi.
On mo yi…óaa Joomi on, yo o laato hu…óaa…óo. Yo Joomi on aru!
Yo mo∆ī∆īere Iisaa Joomi on wonu e mon.
Mi…óo yi…ói on on fow sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on. Aamiina!

Immorde e an min Puulusa, mo Alla hoddiri wonugol *sahaabaajo Iisaa Almasiihu on, wondude e oo musi…ó…óo wi'etee…óo Timotee, haa e ngal *moftal Alla wongal Korenti, e gom…óin…ďe won…ďe Akaaya …ďen fow.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere e …ďuttu wonan on immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on.
Mantoore wonanii Alla, Ben Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, on Baabaajo yurmetee…óo e on Alla Jom wakkilaare fow,
on wakkilinoowo en e nder kala tampereeji men, fii no enen kadi waawiren wakkilinirde …ďen won…ďe e nder kala noone tampereeji wakkilaare nde he…ďir…óen Alla nden enen tigi.
Ko fii, ko wano tampereeji *Almasiihu on layirta e hoore men non, ko wano non wakkilaare men nden layirta immorde e Almasiihu on.
Si tawii men tampii, ko fii wakkilaare mon nden e fii kisiyee mon on. Si tawii men wakkilinaama, ko fii no wakkilinire…óon, no wawnire…óon Ňča…≤…≤aade tampereeji gooti e …ói men woni na…ďude …óin.
Tama'u amen on e telen-ma mon ko sellu…óo, ko fii me…óen andi, wano tawdira…óon non e tampereeji amen …óin, ko wano non tawdira…óon e wakkilaare amen nden.
Men faalaaka yo on ronku andude, yo musi…ď…ďe amen, tampereeji he…ďu…ói men …óin *Aazii …ói men sonjiraa, haa ka tawata alaa hattoode toonin doole amen …óen, haa men ta∆īii hay wuurugol.
Kono menen e hoore amen tigi, me…óen felliti men fawaama mayde, fii wota men fawu hoolaare amen nden e hoore amen menen tigi, kono e Alla on Immintinoowo may…ďe …ďen.
Ko on jattini men, jattinoyta men kadi e sifa nden mayde. Hiiyii, me…óen tan∆īinii, o jattinoyay men
e nder ko faaborton men torndeeji kon. Ko non Alla jaabinirta torndeeji …ói …óuu…óu…ďe torantoo men …óin. Ko …óun wa…ói si yim…ďe …óuu…óu…ďe jarnay Alla fii amen.

Ko men woni mantorde kon, ko ko …ďernde amen nden …ďanginani men kon, wonde men wuuririi e oo aduna, tentinii telen-ma mon, nun…óal e haqiiqa ko iwri ka Alla, hara hinaa ko iwri e faamu ne…ó…óanke, kono ko e sulfu Alla on.
Ko fii ko men woni on windande kon fow, ko ko waawoton jangude faamon. E mi…óo tan∆īinii on faamay …óun fota,
wano fu…ó…óor…óon faamude non wonde ko men …ďe mantorton. Onon kadi ko on …ďe men mantorta …≤ande ardu Iisaa Joomi men on.
E nder nden hoolaare, hari mi…óo faalanoo yahude ka mon, fii no he…ďiron faabo Alla goo kadi.
Si mi iwriino ka mon, mi fe∆ī∆īa Masedonii. Nde mi…óo iwta Masedonii, mi artira ka mon kadi fii no walliron mi no mi hewtira ka diiwal Yahuuda.
E nder anniyagol an …óun, taw si hara mi miijitaaki? Kaa hara on sikku …óen e…ď…ďooje an ko e…ď…ďooje ne…ó…óanke, haa ka tawata no e an ¬ęhiiyii¬Ľ e ¬ęoo'o¬Ľ?
No Alla woniri sella-findeejo non, ko non tawiri kongol ngol men hewtini on ngol wonaa ngol ¬ęhiiyii¬Ľ e ¬ęoo'o¬Ľ.
Ko fii *∆Āi…ó…óo Alla on, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on, mo min e Silaasi e Timotee men waajii on fii mun on, hinaa mo ¬ęhiiyii¬Ľ e ¬ęoo'o¬Ľ, kono ko ¬ęhiiyii¬Ľ woni e makko.
Fodooje Alla …óen fow ko ¬ęhiiyii¬Ľ e makko, awa kadi ko kanko wi'irten Alla ¬ęaamiina¬Ľ fii mangu makko ngun.
Ko Alla woni fellintinanoowo en fow wonde hi…óen humondiri e Almasiihu on. Ko kanko kadi su…ďii en,
o maandiniri en maande makko nden, …óun ko tolmugol Ruuhu makko on ka …ďer…óe men.
Alla ko seedee an: ko fii wota mi aanin on ha…ói mi yiltitoo Korenti.
Hinaa fii me…óen laamii on e hoore gom…óinal mon ngal, kono ko men gollidoo…ďe e mon fii weltaare mon nden, …ďay hi…óon tabiti e nder gom…óinal ngal.
Min tigi mi aadii wota mi yiltitodu ka mon e sokola.
Ko fii min, si mi sokolinii on, haray ko hombo waawi lan weltinde, si hinaa onon he…ďir…ďe lan sokola …ďen?
Mi windiranii on nii fii wota mi he…ďir haanu…ďe weltinde lan …ďen sokola nde mi aroyi. Mi…óo joganii on fow ndee hoolaare wonde, weltaare an nden ko nde mon on fow.
Ko e nder annde tii…óunde e mettu …ďernde e gon…ói tii…óu…ói mi windani on, hinaa non fii sokolingol on, kono ko fii no andiron giggol tii…óungol ngol mi joganii on ngol.
Si tawii go…ó…óo e mon wonii sabu annde, haray hinaa min o aanini, kono ko on fow, maa wo…ď…ďe e mon, (fii wota mi wowlu haa fe∆ī∆īita).
Feloore nde …ďur…ďe …ďen e hakkunde mon fawi mo nden, yonay on ne…ó…óo.
Haray jooni hi…óon haani mo yaafaade wakkilina, fii wota o sonjor sokola fe∆ī∆īitu…óo.
Awa mi torike on hollugol mo giggol.
Ko fii, ko mi windirannoo on, ko fii ndarndagol on annda si hi…óon …óoftii ko woni woo.
Ko fii kala mo yaafani…óon, mi yaafanto mo min kadi. Telen-ma an min, si no woodi ko mi yaafoo, ko fii mon mi yaafori, e yeeso *Almasiihu on,
fii wota en accu Ibuliisa foola en, ko fii wonaa wa si en andaa e…ď…ďooje makko …óen.
Fewndo ko mi hewti Turuwaasi fii fe…≤…≤ingol Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo Almasiihu on, mi tawi Joomiraa…óo on no udditanimmi dambugal.
Kono tawi …ďernde an nden waalanooki, …ďay mi tawaali …óon oo musi…ó…óo an wi'etee…óo Tiituusa. Onsay mi waynitii …ďe, mi fokkitani Masedonii.
Yo mantoore wonan Alla, on Won…óo en okkude polgal soono woo e nder humondiral men e Almasiihu on, on Won…óo en huutorde fii fe…≤…≤ingol nokku kala urngol andugol Almasiihu on.
Awa e hakkunde wonaa…ďe dandeede …ďen, e hakkunde won…ďe mulude …ďen, hi…óen wa'ani Alla wa angiri uurundi ndi Almasiihu on wee…ďitani mo:
hi…óen wonani wo…ď…ďe …ďen barngol mayde nawrayngol e mayde, hi…óen wonani …ďeya …ďen urngol ngurndan nawrayngol e ngurndan. Ko ne…ó…óo hombo gaynata sifa …óen golle?
Ko fii men wa'aa wa wo…ď…ďe, baanor…ďe daaluyee Alla on, kono ko e nder haqiiqa men yewtirta e innde Alla, e yeeso Alla e nder humondiral amen e Almasiihu on.
E hara men fu…ó…óitoto fahin kuljude hoore amen? Kaa men hatonjinay e …ďataake kulju…óe fii amen wano wo…ď…ďe goo? Kaa ko onon haani wa…óangol men …óun?
Ko onon tigi woni …ďatakuru amen, windiindu ka …ďer…óe amen, ndu yim…ďe …ďen fow jangi, faami.

No laa…ďi, ko on …ďatakuru *Almasiihu on, ndu menen tigi men yottini, ndu tawata hinaa ndaha windiraa, kono ko windiraandu Ruuhu Alla Wuuru…óo on, ndu tawata hinaa e hoore alluuje kaa∆īe windaa, kono ko ka …ďer…óe mon.
Ko …óun woni hoolaare nde men jogii immorde e Almasiihu on yeeso Alla.
Hinaa wonde me…óen mari feere wa…óugol go…ó…óun menen tigi, wa ko iwrata e mbawdi amen menen tigi. Kono mbawdi amen ndin ko e Alla iwri.
O wawnii men kadi wonugol yangantoo…ďe *ahadi heyri ndin, hara hinaa tippude e bindol sariya on, kono ko tippude e Ruuhu Allaahu on. Ko fii bindol ngol waray, kono Ruuhu on wurnay.

Sariya Muusaa windiranoo…óo kalfe e hoore alluuje kaa∆īe on arduno e ngun mangu haa ka tawata *Isra'iilayankee…ďe …ďen waawataa ndaarude yeeso Muusaa ngon sabu on annoora fe∆ī∆īoowo wonnoo…óo ka yeeso makko. Si tawii golle on Sariya nawroowo e mayde ardii e sifa ngun mangu,
haray ko haa honto non golle Ruuhu Allaahu on …ďuri mawnude!
Si tawii ko nawrata en e …≤aawoore kon mawninaama, haray ittii e sikke ko haa honto ko wa…óata en feewu…ďe yeeso Alla kon …ďuri mawnude!
Hi…óen waawi hay wi'ude wonde ngun mangu fe∆ī∆īungu fuutoraama mangu mun ngun fow, si ngu e…ď…ďindiraama e …ďurngu mawnude ngu hande ngun.
Si tawii ko fe∆ī∆īata kon he…ďii mangu, haray ko haa honto ko luttata kon mawnata!
Awa oo tama'u …óoo no okki en hoolaare tii…óunde.
En wa…óirtaa wano Muusaa non, on wa…óaynoo…óo tiggaare ka yeeso mun, fii wota Isra'iilayankee…ďe …ďen yi'u rawnoode annoora makko fe∆ī∆īoowo on.

Kono, e nder miijooji ma…ď…ďe …óin, …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe …óen yoorii. Ko fii, haa weetaango hande ngoo, si *ahadi hinndi ndin janga, taway haa hande nden tiggaare no woodaa. Nde ittaaka, ko fii ko e Almasiihu on tun nde muti.
Haa weetaango hande ngoo, si Sariya Muusaa on janga, taway tiggaare no wirni …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe …óen.
Kono si fewta e Joomiraa…óo on, taway tiggaare nden ittaama ka …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe.
E hin-le Joomiraa…óo on ko Ruuhu, awa kadi ko ka Ruuhu Joomiraa…óo on woni …óon, ko …óon ndimu ngun woni.
Enen, …ďe geece mun buumaaki …ďen fow, jalbir…ďe mangu Joomiraa…óo on wa ndaarorgal, hi…óen e nder wattegol mbaadi makko, mangu e hoore mangu, immorde e Joomiraa…óo on, …óun ko on Ruuhu.
Ko …óun wa…ói, …ďay Alla ye…óii men …óen golle e nder yurmeende makko nden, maayu …ďernde he…ďataa men.

Men sali kala ko suu…óii hersinii, men wuurirtaa kadi ∆īoyre, men …ďoylataa kadi daaluyee Alla on, kono ko e nder ko men fe…≤…≤inta goonga on kon, …óun holnay kala …ďernde ne…ó…óanke fii amen yeeso Alla.
Si tawii haa jooni Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo mo men waajotoo on no ni…ď…ďitii, haray ko won…ďe mulude …ďen o ni…ď…ďitani,
…óun ko …ďen …ďe gom…óinaa, …ďe tawata alla nguu jamaanu wuminii miijooji mun, fii wota …ďe yi'u jalbeendi Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo …ďangin…óo mangu *Almasiihu on, on won…óo mbaadi Alla.
Hinaa fii amen tigi men woni waajaade, kono ko fii Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on men woni waajaade, menen non ko men kurkaa…ói mon sabu Iisaa.
Ko fii ko on Alla daalu…óo: ¬ęYo ndaygu ngun jalbu ka nder niwre¬Ľ, ko kanko kadi jalbini …ďer…óe amen …óen, fii ndaygingol e amen andal mangu Alla wongu e yeeso Almasiihu on ngon.
Enen jogii…ďe ngun ngalu, hi…óen wa'i wa loo…óe leydi, fii no andiree wonde ngal bawgal mawngal ko e Alla iwi, hinaa e amen.
Men …ďittiraama nooneeji …óin fow, kono men muncaaki. Men ji…ďii, kono men ta∆īaaki.
Men cukkaa, kono men hawkaaka. Men li…ďaa, kono men hayraali.
Me…óen wondi e mayde Iisaa nden saa'i kala ka …ďalli amen, fii no ngurndan Iisaa …óan fee…≤ira ka …ďalli amen.
Ko fii enen wur…ďe …ďen soono woo, hi…óen wee…ďitanaa mayde nden sabu Iisaa, fii no ngurndan Iisaa …óan kadi fee…≤ira e …ďalli men maayooji …óin.
Ko non men wee…ďitorani mayde nden fii no he…ďiron ngurndan.
Wano windori non: ¬ęMi gom…óinii, ko …óun wa…ói si mi wowli.¬Ľ Menen kadi …ďay ko noone gom…óinal gootal men mari, me…óen gom…óini, ko …óun wa…ói si me…óen wowlude,
e nder andugol wonde, on Immintin…óo Iisaa Joomi on, o immintiniday en kadi e Iisaa, o wee…ďitida men e mon yeeso makko.
Ko fii, …óun fow ko woni ardude ko fii mon, fii yo sulfu on …ďurtu hewtude yim…ďe …óuu…óu…ďe, fii no yettooje …óen ka mangu Alla laatora …óuu…óu…óe.
Ko …óun wa…ói si maayu …ďernde he…ďataa men. Hay si …ďandu amen ndun …≤olii, kono haray nder amen on no hey…óitude …≤ande woo …≤ande.
Ko fii oo saa'i satteende e fan…óude mun, o rimanay en darja teddu…óo poomayankeejo …ďur…óo oo saa'i satteende.

Ko fii menen, wonaa ko yi'otoo kon men wa…ói hakkilaaji amen …óin e mun, kono ko ko yi'otaako kon men wa…ói hakkillaaji amen e mun. Ko fii ko yi'otoo kon, ko ko fe∆ī∆īata, ko yi'otaako kon, ko ko luttata haa poomaa.

Hi…óen andi wonde, si tawii …óii togooji …ói ho…óu…óen e mun ka leydi …óoo, (e maanaa …ďalli men …óin), aru e bonneede, haray hi…óen mari suudu ndu Alla e…ď…ďani en, …óun ko wonunde poomayankeere, nde tawata hinaa juu…óe ne…ó…óanke mo∆ī∆īiniraa.
Awa kadi e nder …óin togooji, hi…óen woytaade fii faale …ďornagol wonunde kammuyankeere nden,
tawa ko en …ďornii…ďe, hara tawetaake ko en daror…ďe nii.
Ko …óun wa…ói, enen won…ďe e nder …óin togooji, hi…óen woytaade, hi…óen sonjii, …ďay en faalaaka laataade …ďortii…ďe, kono hara ko …ďornii…ďe, fii no ngurndan …óan mo…óira mayde nden.
Awa on Hebulin…óo en fii nden e…ď…ďoore ko Alla, on Tolmu…óo Ruuhu mun on e men.
Awa hi…óen heewi soono woo wakkilaare. Hi…óen andi kadi fodde hi…óen wondi e nduu …ďandu, haray hi…óen wo…ó…óondiri e Joomiraa…óo on.
Ko fii, ko gom…óinal ngal woni en ardaade, hinaa gii…óe …óen.
Hi…óen heewi wakkilaare, ko …ďur…óen faaleede ko seedugol e nduu …ďandu ho…óa moggo Joomiraa…óo on.
Ko …óun wa…ói, wondu…óen e nduu …ďandu maa seedu…óen e mayru, himme men …óen ko welegol Joomiraa…óo on.
Ko fii en fow en darnete ka yeeso …≤aawirde *Almasiihu on, fii no o jonnitira mo kala njoddi kuu…óe mun …óe o wa…óunoo ka aduna, woni ko ko mo∆ī∆īi, woni ko ko boni.
Awa, …ďay men andii ko woni hulugol Joomiraa…óo on, me…óen …óa…ď…ďude no men fellintinira yim…ďe …ďen. Alla no andi ko men hom…ďe, awa mi…óo tan∆īinii onon kadi ka nder …ďer…óe mon hi…óon andi men.
Men alaa kuljude hoore amen kadi, kono ko dalil men woni on jonnude fii no mantoron men, fii no waawiron jaaborde …ďen won…ďe mantorde ko woni e kene kon edii …ďe mantorde ko woni e …ďernde kon.
Si tawii ko men wilii…ďe, haray andee wonde ko fii Alla men wilanii. Si tawii kadi non me…óen selli, haray andee wonde ko fii mon men sellani.
Ko fii giggol Almasiihu on no laamii men, menen …ďee fellitu…ďe …óun…óoo: aaden gooto maayanii fow, awa fow maayii.
O maayanii fow, fii wota wur…ďe …ďen wuuran hoore mun hande kadi, kono yo wuuran May…óo immintinaa fii ma…ď…ďe on.
∆äun haray gila jooni men jogoraa hay gooto e noone no yim…ďe oo aduna jogorta go…ó…óo non. Hay si tawiino hari men jogoriino Almasiihu on wano non, jooni men jogoraa mo non hande kadi.
Si tawii go…ó…óo no humondiri e Almasiihu on, haray ko o tagudi heyri, haray piiji ki…ó…ói …óin fe∆ī∆īirii mo, haray piiji …óin fow wontii kesi.
∆äun fow ko immorde e Alla woni, on Mo∆ī∆īintin…óo hakkunde men e makko rewrude e Almasiihu on. O ye…ói men menen kadi golle mo∆ī∆īintingol hakkunde yim…ďe …ďen e makko kanko Alla.

Ko fii Alla mo∆ī∆īintinii hakkunde makko e aduna on rewrude e Almasiihu on, e …ďaawo joganagol yim…ďe …ďen bonnereeji ma…ď…ďe …óin, o halfinii men menen kadi kongol mo∆ī∆īintingol hakkunde yim…ďe …ďen e makko.
Awa ko men …ďe Almasiihu on immini wa si tawii Alla no rewrude e amen fii waajagol. Awa men jeejii on e innde Almasiihu on: wonee welditu…ďe e Alla.
On mo junuubu alaa e mun, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on, Alla wa…óii mo junuubu fii men, fii, sabu humondiral men e Almasiihu on, no woniren feewu…ďe Alla.
∆Āay ko men gollidoo…ďe, men wakkilinii on wota on ja…ďir sulfu Alla on meere.
Ko fii himo daali: ¬ęMi jaabinanii ma ka saa'i sulfu, ka …≤alaande kisiyee mi faabike ma.¬Ľ Awa mi andinii on ko fewndo …óoo woni saa'i sulfu on, awa kadi ko …≤alaande kisiyee nden nii.
Awa men wonataa sabu peggal woo e hoore hay gooto, fii wota golle amen …óen wonu huunde felniinde.
E kala huunde men …ďanginay ko men kurkantoo…ďe Alla, e nder Ňča…≤…≤an…óe buy, e nder tampereeji …óin e Ňčakkireede, e nder anndeeji,
e nder pigge e kaseede e murtaneede, e golleeji sattu…ói e angal …óoyngol e heege.
Me…óen fe…≤…≤inira …óun laa…ďal e gandal e mu…≤al e mo∆ī∆īuki e *Ruuhu Senii…óo on e giggol ngol alaa faasiqankaaku,
wondude e daaluyee goongaajo on e baw…óe Alla …óen, peewal ngal wona aala amen ha…ďir…óo e hiwitor…óo.
E hoore me…óen teddinee e me…óen hoynee, me…óen wowlee ko boni e me…óen wowlee ko mo∆ī∆īi. Me…óen jogoree wa fenoo…ďe, hara-le ko men wowloo…ďe goonga.
Men jogoree wa …ďe andaaka fii kala me…óen andaa, wa won…ďe maayude e hin-le me…óen wuuri, maa wa wonaa…ďe letteede fii kala men waraaka,
wa sokolnaa…ďe e hin-le saa'i kala me…óen weltii, wa …ďillii…ďe hara-le me…óen al…óinde …óuu…óu…ďe, wa …ďe alaa huunde e hin-le me…óen mari fow.
Ko onon yo …ďe Korenti, men haalanii on ko woni e amen kon, me…óen ya…≤…≤ani on …ďer…óe amen …óen.
Men faa…óinanaali on …ďer…óe amen …óen, kono ko onon tigi faa…óinani men …ďer…óe mon …óen.
Awa mi…óo yewtira on wa fay…ďe an: onon kadi wa…óiranee men wano men wa…óirani on non, udditanon men …ďer…óe mon …óen!
Wota on humondir e …ďe gom…óinaa …ďen. Ko fii ko humondiral hongal woni hakkunde peewal ngal e angal peewal ngal? Maa ko kawtital hongal woni hakkunde ndaygu e niwre?
E ko nanondiral hongal woni hakkunde *Almasiihu on e Ibuliisa? E ko ge…ďal hongal gom…óin…ďe …ďen e …ďe gom…óinaa …ďen hawti?

E ko *ahadi hondi wondi suudu Alla ndun e sanamuuji …óin? Ko fii, ko enen woni suudu Alla Wuuru…óo on, wano Alla daaliri non: ¬ęMi ho…óay, mi jinda hakkunde ma…ď…ďe, mi wona Alla ma…ď…ďe, …ďe wona jamaa an.¬Ľ
Ko …óun wa…ói si Joomiraa…óo on daali: ¬ęIwee e hakkunde ma…ď…ďe, seedon, wota on meemu ko laa…ďaa, min mi ja…ď…ďoyto on.
¬ęMi wonanay on Baaba, onon wonanon mi …ďi…ď…ďe wor…ďe e …ďi…ď…ďe rew…ďe. Ko Joomiraa…óo Jom Bawgal on daali …óun.¬Ľ
∆Āay non hi…óen mari wano …óii fodaariiji, yo yi…ď…ďe, la…ď…ďino…óen e kala ko tuuninta …ďandu ndun e ruuhu on, e hoore timmingol laa…ďal ngal e nder kulol Alla.
Wernee men ka …ďer…óe mon, ko fii men faw…≤aaki hay e gooto, men bonnaali kadi hay gooto, awa kadi men huutoraali hay gooto.
Hinaa fii felugol on mi wi'iri …óun, ko fii hari mi wi'uno wonde hi…óon ka …ďer…óe amen, woni ngurndan, woni mayde.
Mi…óo mari hoolaare tii…óunde e telen-ma mon, mi…óo mari ko mi mantora fii mon fota, mi…óo wakkilinaa fota, mi…óo heewi weltaare e nder …óii satteendeeji amen fow.
Ko fii gila men hewti Masedonii, men he…ďaali feere no men fowtora hay see…óa, men tampiniraama noone fow, gere ka kene, kulol ka nder.
Kono Alla, Wakkilinoowo miskin…ďe …ďen, o wakkilinirii men ardu Tiituusa ndun.

Wonaa non ardu makko ndun tun o wakkiliniri men, kono kadi, ko wakkilaare nde wakkilin…óon mo nden. O sifanike men faale mon tii…óu…óo on e gon…ói mon …óin e cataare mon nden fii an. ∆äun wa…ói haa weltaare an nden …ďurti tii…óude.
Hay si tawii mi sokolinirii on …ďatakuru an ndun, mi ninsaa …óun jooni, hay si tawii mi…óo ninsunoo. Ko fii mi…óo sutii wonde ndun …ďatakuru ko sokolini on ko haa see…óa.
Fewndo …óoo mi…óo weltii, hinaa non fii ko sokol…óon kon, kono ko fii ko sokola mon on addi on e tuubuubuyee kon, ko fii on sokoliniraama no Alla yi…óiri, …ďay on he…ďiraali men bone woo.
Ko …óun wa…ói, sokola mo Alla yi…ói on adday tuubuubuyee nawroowo e kisiyee mo en ninsataa, e hin-le sokola oo aduna ko addata ko mayde.

Awa on yi'ii ko oo sokola mo Alla yi…ói wa…ói e mon kon: …óun ko wakkilaare, e faale danditagol too…≤e, e ko tikku…óon kon, e ko Ňčal…óu…óon fii bone wa…óaa…óo on, e faale mon mo∆ī∆īo fii yi'itugol lan, e cataare mon nden, e hebulaare mon nden fii donkingol bonnu…óo on. On holliri noone fow wonde on tawaaka e nduu muraadu.
Awa si mi windanii on, hinaa sabu faw…≤ii…óo on, maa faw…≤aa…óo e mun on, kono ko fii no jogitor…óon men non fee…≤irana on onon tigi yeeso Alla.
Ko …óun wa…ói si men wakkilinaa. Kono e hoore nden wakkilaare amen, men …ďurti weltorde weltaare nde Tiituusa weltinaa nden, on mo on fow weltin…óon …ďernde mun.
Si tawii mi mantorii fii mon yeeso makko see…óa, haray mi hersiraa …óun, kono ko wano ko men yewtata on saa'i woo kon woniri goonga non, ko non ko men mantori moggo Tiituusa kon woniri kadi goonga.
Awa kadi giggol ngol o joganii on ngol ko tii…óungol, tuma kala o anditi ko …óofti…óon mo kon on fow e noone no tolnir…óon mo non kulol e teddungal.
Mi…óo weltori waawugol hoolorgol on e kala huunde.
Men andinay on, yo musi…ď…ďe, fii ndee mo∆ī∆īere Alla ye…óaande *mofte makko …óen Masedonii,
e maanaa, noone satteendeeji …ói …ďe ndarndaa woo, weltaare ma…ď…ďe heewunde nden e …ďillaare ma…ď…ďe tii…óunde nden no okkude …ďe feere okkirgol no yaajiri.
Yeru mbawdi ma…ď…ďe ndin, mi…óo seeditii, …ďe wa…óii hay toonin mbawdi ma…ď…ďe ndin e hoore anniyee mo∆ī∆īo.
∆Āe landike men, e nder tentingol no tii…óiri, yo …ďe tawde e faabagol yim…ďe Alla …ďen.
∆äun fe∆ī∆īiti ko men tan∆īininoo kon. Kam…ďe tigi …ďe wee…ďitanii Joomi on taho, si …ďe wee…ďitanii men no yaadiri e faale Alla on.
Ko …óun wa…ói si men wakkilini Tiituusa yahugol ka mon fii wallugol on laatinde ndee mo∆ī∆īere, wano o fu…ó…óornoo non.
Wano tawiri non hi…óon mo∆ī∆īi e …ói fow, ka gom…óinal, ka kongol, ka gandal, ka cataare timmunde, e ka giggol mon e telen-ma amen, mo∆ī∆īiniree non kadi ndee mo∆ī∆īere.
Mi wowliraali …óun fii wa…óugol yamiroore, kono mi wowlan on fii hollugol ba…≤aare …ďeya nden, mi anda si giggol mon ngol ko haqiiqawol.
Ko fii hi…óon andi mo∆ī∆īere Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, fii kala ko al…óunoo…óo, o wa…óitii baaso fii mon, fii yo baasal makko ngal al…óin on.
E hino ko mi miijii no hawrani on kon: ∆Āay ko onon adinoo anniyaade dokkal gila rowani, ko onon adii wa…óugol …óun kadi.
Awa jooni, jokkee …óun haa timma, na…ďon haa joofoya, beru wakkilaare mon nden, wondude e anniyee mo aadi…óon on.
Si en okkirii anniyee mo∆ī∆īo, haray …óun ko ko ja…ďetee tippude e ko mar…óen kon, hara hinaa e ko en maraa kon.
Hinaa non fii …ďittingol on, weltina …ďeya, kono ko fii yo fotondiral wa…óu.
Fewndo …óoo ko ko …ďurtani on kon won…óon faaborde baasal …ďeya ngal, fii no kam…ďe kadi …ďe faabora baasal mon ngal ko …ďurtani …ďe kon. Si wonirii non, fow fotay,
wano windori non: ¬ęMarnoo…óo buy on wontanii …óun ko hawri, on marnoo…óo kadi see…óa, huunde Ňčakkiraa …óun.¬Ľ
Yettoore wonanii Alla fii ko o wa…ói e …ďernde Tiituusa kon sifa cataare nde mi joganii on nden.
Fii kala non o ja…ďii e…ď…ďoore an nden fii yo o yahu ka mon, kono hari o aadike, wondude e tinnaare tii…óunde, wonde o yahay kanko tigi ka mon.
Men immindinii mo e oo musi…ó…óo mo mofte …óen fow manti fii golle …óe o wa…óani Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on …óen.
E hoore …óun, ko mofte …óen to…ó…óii mo fii ko wona yaadi…ó…óo amen, e nder ndee mo∆ī∆īere nde tawata me…óen fawtii fii mangu Joomiraa…óo on tigi, e fii seedintingol anniyeeji amen mo∆ī∆īi …óin.
Me…óen faalaa reenaade fii wota men fele fii ngal dokkal mawngal ngal men halfinaa.
Ko fii ko ko mo∆ī∆īi kon men woni …óa…ď…ďude, hinaa non yeeso Joomiraa…óo on tun, kono kadi e yeeso yim…ďe …ďen.
Men immindinii …ďe e oo musi…ó…óo amen, on mo men ndarndori noone woo cataare makko nden e laabiiji buy, on won…óo …ďanginirde ko tii…ói e ngal …óoo, hoolaare mawnde nde o joganii on nden.
Tiituusa non, ko o wondi…ó…óo an e gollidoowo e an fii mon, musi…ď…ďe …ďe o wondi …ďen non, ko …ďe mofte …óen immini, ko …ďe darja *Almasiihu on.
Awa hollee mofte …óen fow dalil giggol mon ngol e ko men woni mantorde fii mon kon yeeso ma…ď…ďe.
Nafa alaa mi…óo windana on fii ballal fokkintinanaangal yim…ďe Alla …ďen.

Awa mi…óo andi anniyee mon mo∆ī∆īo on fii wallugol, ko fii …óun mi woni mantorde on e yeeso …ďe Masedonii …ďen, mi wi'a wonde, gila rowani …ďee ka diiwal Akaaya no hebulii wallugol. Awa kadi cataare mon nden wakkilinii yim…ďe buy okkugol.
Mi imminii …ďee musi…ď…ďe fii wota mantoore nde men mani on nden wonu meere, e yo on wonu hebulii…ďe fii wallugol wano mi wi'iri non.
Si tawii men tawoyii on hebulaaki nde min e …ďe Masedonii …ďen men yaadoyi ka mon, haray hoolaare nde men hoolii on nden wontanay men hersa, haray onon hersa mon kan wowlotaako.

Awa mi taw no hawri ka mi wakkilina musi…ď…ďe …ďen ka …ďe adoyoo mi ka mon, …ďe wona e fii ballal ngal fodu…óon ngal, fii no ngal hebilora ngal wona okkiraangal anniyee mo∆ī∆īo, hara hinaa wa si tawii ko kuugal karahaangal.
Andee wonde: mo sankii see…óa ko see…óa o wa'ata, mo sankii buy ko buy o wa'ata.
Yo mo kala okkir wano o anniyori non ka …ďernde makko, e …ďaawo ninsugol maa karhegol, ko fii Alla no yi…ói on okkiroowo weltaare.
Awa Alla no mari bawgal hebbingol e mon kala noone mo∆ī∆īere, fii no he…ďiron saa'i kala ko hatonjin…óon e mun kon fow, e no wa…óiron kadi kala kuugal mo∆ī∆īal haa fe∆ī∆īita,
wano windori non wonde: ¬ęO saakitii dokke, o ye…óii miskin…ďe …ďen, peewal makko ngal ko luttoowal haa poomaa.¬Ľ
On Jonnoowo remoowo on awdi, jonnay mo kadi …≤aametee ko on …≤aama, o ye…óoyay on onon kadi, o sowindirana on awdi ndin, o …ďeyda battane peewal mon ngal.
Ko non al…óiniroyte…óon e kala noone fii no waawiron okkirde no yaajiri. Immorde e ngal ballal ngal men hendorta on men hewtina …ďe, …óun adday yettooje Alla.
Ko fii ngal ballal ngal wa…óu…óon faaboto yim…ďe Alla …ďen, kono kadi …ďeyday yettooje Alla …óuu…óu…óe.

∆Āay …óee golle mon taskaama, tawaama ko haqiiqaaje, Alla mawninte sabu yankinaare mon nden e telen-ma qirritagol Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo *Almasiihu on, e sabu ballal mon yaajungal ngal wallir…óon …ďe ngal, kam…ďe e yim…ďe …ďen fow.
∆äun, …ďe toranto on wondude e giggol, sabu mo∆ī∆īere fe∆ī∆īitunde nde Alla wa…óani on nden.
Yo yettoore wonan Alla fii dokkal makko ngal sifotaako ngal!
Min Puulusa, mi tororii on newaare e mo∆ī∆īuki *Almasiihu on, min oo newii…óo e yeeso mon, e heewu…óo cuucal fii mon ka wo…ó…óitii on.
Awa mi jeejii on, wota on karhan yo mi …ďangin cuucal nde mi hewtoyi ka mon, ko fii mi…óo anniyii seedintinirde hoolaare an nden cuucal e fee …ďen sikku…ďe wonde me…óen wuuriri wa yim…ďe aduna.
Hay si tawii wonii ko men yim…ďe aduna, men ha…ďirtaa wano …ďe aduna …ďen gerdata non,
ko fii aalaaji …ói men ha…ďirta …óin hinaa …ói oo aduna, kono ko wondu…ói e bawgal iwrungal e Alla fii li…ďugol kala ko dartotoo mo. Men li…ďay miijooji fenaandeeji …óin
e kala mawnintinaare hawtotoonde dartoo gandal fii Alla ngal, e men …óahay kala miijo haa ngo …óoftoo Almasiihu on.
Si …óoftaare mon nden timmii, me…óen hebulanii kadi donkingol kala ko …óoftaaki.
Awa ndaaree no piiji …óin woniri non. Si go…ó…óo fellitanii hoore mun tigi wonde himo humondiri e Almasiihu on, yo o fellitan hoore makko …óun…óoo: si himo humondiri e Almasiihu on, menen kadi men.
E hay si mi mantorii ko …ďurti see…óa mbawdi ndi Joomiraa…óo on ye…ói men ndin fii tabintingol on, hara hinaa fii li…ďugol on, haray mi hersoytaa.
Mi faalaaka wa'ude wa hul…ďiniroowo on …ďataake an …óen.
Ko fii hi…ďe wi'a: ¬ę∆äee …ďataake no tii…ói no …≤aa…ói, kono si tawii kanko himo …óoo, haray himo …óaati, haalaaji makko …óin no mehi…ói.¬Ľ
Kala non jogii…óo ngoo miijo, yo andu fota wonde: kala ko men windani on e …ďaawo mon, ko …óun men wa…óata e tawnde mon.
Men fotondirtaa maa men e…ď…ďindirtaa hoore amen e won…ďe hollitaade …ďen, kono e nder etitagol ma…ď…ďe ngol e e…ď…ďitagol ma…ď…ďe ngol kam…ďe tigi, …óun hollii ko …ďe Ňčakkiraa…ďe faamu.
Menen non, men yi…óaa mawnintinorde ko fe∆ī∆īiti etirde, kono men fe∆ī∆īataa keerol ngol Alla ye…ói men ngol, ko …óun kadi hewtini men haa ka mon.
Men fe∆ī∆īitataa keerol amen ngol, wa si tawii hari men araali haa e mon, ko fii ko goonga, ko haa e mon men ardi e Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo Almasiihu on.
Awa men fe∆ī∆īitirtaa keerol mantorgol golleeji wo…ď…ďe goo, kono me…óen mari tama'u wonde si gom…óinal mon ngal …ďeydike, men waaway kadi laatinde golle …ďur…óe mawnu…óe e hakkunde mon,
e nder waajagol e ca'e won…óe toonin mon …óen, …óoo yo men mantor ko wa…óaa kon ka nokkeeli …ďeya.
¬ęOn mo no mantoo, yo mantor Joomiraa…óo on.¬Ľ
Ko fii wonaa kulju…óo hoore mun on ja…ďaa, kono ko mo Joomiraa…óo on kulji on.
Jooni non, mi…óo tan∆īinii on waawayno mu…≤…≤anaade lan, mi yewta on haalaaji komoyaagal see…óa. Mi…óo felliti on mu…≤…≤anto lan!
Ko fii mi…óo nawlani on nawliigu iwrungu ka Alla, …ďay mi tananike on gorko gooto, fii wee…ďitugol on ka *Almasiihu on, wa jiwo laa…ďu…óo mo andaali gorko.
Kono mi…óo huli fota wota on accu miijooji mon …óin selnee e humondiral mon laa…ďungal e haqiiqawal ngal e telen-ma Almasiihu on, wano *Hawaa acciri mboddi ndin …óayniri mo ∆īoyre mun non.

Ko fii si go…ó…óo aru on fe…≤…≤inande fii Iisaajo goo, seedu…óo e mo men fe…≤…≤inani on on, maa si on hendike ruuhu goo seedu…óo e mo hendino…óon on, maa *Linjiila goo seedu…óo e mo ja…ďuno…óon on, haray on tewtike mo fota.
E hin-le mi…óo felliti, …ďen ¬ęsahaabaa…ďe townitii…ďe¬Ľ …ďuraa lan hay huunde.
Fii kala mi…óo hesi…óani waajagol, kono mi hesi…óanaa gandal ngal, men hollirii on …óun noone fow e …ói fow.
Kaa hara mi wa…óii junuubu fewndo mi …óuytitii fii …ďantugol on, wa fewndo ko mi fe…≤…≤inani on Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on e …ďaawo ∆īantugol on hay huunde?
Mi ittinii *mofte goo fii he…ďirgol …ďe njoddi fii wallitagol on.

E hin-le fewndo mi Ňčakkiraa ka mon, mi wonaano dongal hay gooto, ko fii musi…ď…ďe iwru…ďe Masedonii …ďen faaboranno ko mi Ňčakkiraa kon fow. Mi reenino wonugol dongal mon, e mi …ďurtay-le reenaade e …óun.
Fodde goonga Almasiihu on no e an, mi…óo wi'i: hay gooto fannataa lan mantorgol …óun e nder diiwal Akaaya ngal fow.
Fii hon…óun non? Hara ko fii mi yi…óaa on? Alla no andi mi…óo yi…ói on.
Ko mi woni wa…óude kon, mi jokkay wa…óugol …óun kadi, fii ha…óugol …ďen faalaa…ďe mantorde fotugol e amen.
∆Āen ko wa…óitii…ďe sahaabaa…ďe, golloo…ďe …óaynoo…ďe, wa…óinkinii…ďe sahaabaa…ďe Almasiihu on.
Kono …óun Ňčal…óinaa, ko fii Ibuliisa tigi ko wa…óinkinotoo…óo malaa'ikaajo ndaygu.
Haray juhaa kadi ka golloo…ďe makko …ďen wa…óinkinoo golloo…ďe peewal. Kono rawnoode ma…ď…ďe nden wa'ay wa kuu…óe ma…ď…ďe …óen.
Awa mi…óo fillitaade kadi: wota gooto ndaariran wa komoojo. Si hinaa …óun, jogoree lan wa komoojo, fii min kadi no mi mantora see…óa.
Ko mi woni wowlude koo e nder hoolaare he…ďugol ko mi mantora, hinaa ko iwri e Joomiraa…óo on, kono ko wa komoojo.
∆Āay …óuu…óu…ďe no mantorde piiji aduna, min kadi mi mantoray …óun.
Awa, onon mar…ďe faamu …ďen, on mu…≤…≤anto no newori komoo…ďe …ďen!
Hi…óon mu…≤…≤aade kadi ko kurkete…óon kon e ko huutorte…óon kon e ko jattete…óon kon e ko jogorte…óon mawnintinaare kon e hay banteede.
Me…óen hersi wi'ugol wonde me…óen lo'i e telen-ma …óii piiji! Kala ko go…ó…óo suusi mantorde, haray min kadi mi…óo suusi, (ko wa komoojo mi woni wowlirde).
Si ko …ďe *Aabirayankee…ďe? Awa min kadi men. Si ko …ďe *Isra'iilayankee…ďe? Awa min kadi men. Si ko …ďe jurriya Ibraahiima? Awa min kadi men.

Kaa ko …ďe kurkaa…ói Almasiihu on? Awa mi…óo yewtirde komoyaagal, min kadi ko mi …ďuri …óun! Telen-ma ka golleeji mi…óo …ďuri …ďe, ka kaseede mi…óo …ďuri …ďe, ka piyeede, …óon kadi mi…óo …ďuri …ďe, soono woo mi…óo wee…ďitanii mayde.
Laabi jowi mi…óo he…ďirde Yahuudiyankee…ďe …ďen paatawol cappan…óe nay Ňčakku…óun ngol gooto!
Laabi tati mi…óo luuboreede bedi, mi fi…óaa kaa∆īe nde wootere, laabi tati mi tawaa e nder laa…óe won…óe lancaade, mi wonii kadi ka ndiyan …≤allal gootal e jemma gooto, mi…óo aw∆īa.

Soono woo e nder jinduruuji an …óin haray mi…óo wee…ďitanii masiibooji …óin ka maaje, e masiibooji hippotoo…ďe …ďen, e masiibooji yim…ďe le…≤ol an ngol, e masiibooji …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen, e masiibooji …óin ka ca'e, e masiibooji …óin ka wulaaji, e masiibooji …óin ka baharu, e masiibooji wi'itii…ďe …ďen ko men musi…ď…ďe,
e ka golle e ka satteende, e jemmaaji …ói …óaanaaka, e heege e …óonka e Ňčakkireede …≤aametee, e jaangol e kolngal!
E hoore mi wowlaali fii ko heddii e dongal ngal mi rondii …≤ande woo fii aanangol mofte …óen fow.
Si go…ó…óo lo'ii, hewtay lan. Si go…ó…óo yanii e junuubu, ko min muusata.
Si tawii bee mi mantoo, haray ko fii lo'ere an nden mi mantotoo.
Alla, on won…óo Ben Iisaa Joomi on, on mo mantoore wonani haa poomaa, no andi wonde mi fenataa.
Oo lan…óo Damaasi wi'etee…óo Aretaasa ittayno ko ayna saare Damaasiyankoo…ďe …ďen fii nangugol lan.
Kono mi tumbaa e debeere, mi tippiniraa e yolnde, jokkinaa maadi ndin, ko nii mi fuutori …ďe.
Bee mi mantoo, fii kala …óun nafataa. Kono fow e mun yo mi yewtu fii wirnitan…óe e fe…≤…≤inan…óe iwru…óe ka Joomiraa…óo on.
Wonii nii duu…ďi sappoo e nay mi…óo andi go…ó…óo gom…óin…óo *Almasiihu on, na…ďanoo…óo ka kammu tata…ďu, (mi andaa non si ko kanko tigi maa si ko ruuhu makko on, kono Alla ka…≤un no andi).

Ko mi andi tun, on na…ďaama ka aljanna, o nanii kongu…ói …ói sifotaako, …ói newnanaaka ne…ó…óo fillagol, (mi andaa non si tawii ko kanko tigi maa si tawii ko ruuhu makko on, kono Alla ka…≤un no andi).
Ko sifa on ne…ó…óo mi mantorta, kono mi mantortaa hoore an tigi, si hinaa fii lo'ereeji an …óin.
Si tawii mi…óo faalaa mantaade, mi wonataa komoojo, ko fii mi wowloyay goonga, kono mi mantotaako, fii wota go…ó…óo tuuman toonin ko o woni yi'irde lan kon, maa ko o woni lan nanirde kon.
Sabu …óee fe…≤…≤inan…óe maw…óe …óe mi fe…≤…≤inanaa, mi he…ďuno ko tampinirimmi wa bullal ka …ďandu an fii wota mi manto, …óun ko mo Ibuliisa imminnoo fii tampingol lan.
Laabiiji tati mi…óo jeejude Joomiraa…óo on yo o wo…ó…óintinan …óun,
o jaabii lan: ¬ęMo∆ī∆īere an nden yonii ma, ko fii bawgal an ngal ko e nder lo'ere nden …ďangata.¬Ľ Awa mi …ďeyday mantaade fii lo'ereeji an …óin, fii no bawgal Almasiihu on wonira e hoore an.
Ko …óun wa…ói si mi…óo weltii fii lo'ereeji …óin e hoyreeji …óin e sattendeeji …óin e cukkan…óe …óen e anndeeji …óin fii Almasiihu on. Ko fii, nde mi laatii lo'u…óo, ko onsay mi woni dolnu…óo.
Mi wa'uno wa komoojo, kono ko onon karhunoo mi, …ďay ko onon haanuno kuljude lan! Ko fii hay huunde mi seedaa e …ďen ¬ęsahaabaa…ďe townitii…ďe¬Ľ, fii kala hinaa mi huunde.
Maandeeji hollu…ói fii sahaabaa…ďe …ďen wa…óiraama yeeso mon Ňča…≤…≤annde tii…óunde, …óun ko maandeeji e kuu…óe e kaawakeeji mo∆ī∆īi.
Ko hon…óun …óeya *mofte he…ďi ko on he…ďaali, si wonaa mi wonanaali on dongal? Awa yaafanee lan on ella …óon!

Awa e hino, mi…óo faalaa yahude ka mon tammun, e hoore mi wonoytaa dongal mon, ko fii mi alaa …óa…ď…ďude ko mon kon, kono ko onon tigi, …ďay hinaa paykoy koy haani marande maw…ďe mun …ďen, kono ko maw…ďe …ďen haani marande fay…ďe mun …ďen.
Min mi wonay anniyii…óo fii fawtagol, e mi fawtoto hoore an fii wonkiiji mon …óin. Si mi …ďurtii on yi…óude, e hara giggol mon ngol e telen-ma an …óuytoto?
Awa, mi wonanaali on dongal. E hara mi laatike ne…ó…óo ∆īoy…óo? Kaa mi hendorii on janfa?
Kaa mi rewii e go…ó…óo e …ďe mi imminani on …ďen fii huutorgol on?

Awa, mi wakkilinii Tiituusa fii yahugol ka mon, mi immindinii mo e musi…ó…óo goo. Enee, taw si hara Tiituusa huutorii on onon fii he…ďugol go…ó…óun? E taw si hara kadi men jokkaali anniyee gooto e e…ď…ďooje goote?
No gasa hi…óon sikka gila nee…ďii wonde men danditoto woni e telen-ma mon. Awa, ko yeeso Alla e innde Almasiihu on men woni yewtirde. ∆äun fow non, yo yi…ď…ďe, ko fii tii…óingol on.

Ko fii mi…óo huli, nde mi hewtoyi, no gasa mi tawroya on hara hinaa no mi faaliraa non, e min kadi no gasa hara hinaa no faalira…óon non. Mi…óo huli wota taw no gasa hara ko yeddondiral e nawliigu e monee e haasidi e …≤oore e baddi e mawnintinaare e jii…ďoldu woni hakkunde mon.

Mi…óo huli, nde mi hewtoyi ka mon, wota Alla an on hersinoyan kadi e yeeso mon, mi wona e yoomugol fii wa…óunoo…ďe junuubu …óuu…óu…ďe, …ďe ronki tuubude ngal angal laa…ďal e jinaa e jii…ďaare nde …ďe wa…ói nden.
Mi…óo yahude ka mon tammun. Kala kongol …≤aawiroyte kongu…ói seedee…ďe …ói…óo maa tato.

Wa fewndo ko mi wonnoo ka mon …óimmun, hari mi wowliino …óun. Awa hande kadi, ka tawata mi alaa ton, mi wowlanii …óun kadi wa…óunoo…ďe junuubu …ďen ado mi yahude: si mi yiltoyike ka mon mi woopoytaa hay gooto,
ko fii hi…óon …óa…ď…ďude seedee wonde ko *Almasiihu on woni longinde lan ko mi woni wowlude kon, on mo lo'aa e telen-ma mon, kono mar…óo bawgal e hakkunde mon.

Ko fii fewndo Almasiihu on fempanoo, hari ko o lo'u…óo, kono jooni himo wuuriri bawgal Alla ngal. Menen kadi e nder humondiral amen e makko, ko men lo'u…ďe, kono menen e makko men wuuriray bawgal Alla ngal fii mon.
Awa taskee hoore mon onon tigi fii andugol si hi…óon wuuriri gom…óinal, ndarndito…óon onon tigi. E on andaa Iisaa Almasiihu on no e mon? Si hinaa taw on woopu ndarnditagol mon ngol.
Kono mi…óo tan∆īinii on taway wonde en woopaali ndarnditagol men ngol.
Ko e nder …óun men torotoo Alla fii wota on wa…óu huunde ko boni. Hinaa non fii hollugol wonde men felnaaki, kono ko fii yo on wa…óu ko mo∆ī∆īi, hay si tawii menen me…óen wa'i wa woopu…ďe.
Ko fii men waawanaa goonga on hay huunde. Kono ko wonangol goonga on men waawi.
Menen men weltoto nde men lo'i, e hin-le onon hi…óon dolni, e ko men yelotoo e nder torndeeji amen …óin, ko fii no laatoron timmu…ďe.

Ko …óun wa…ói si mi…óo windande on …óun si mi alaa ton, fii nde mi aroyi, wota mi sattiniran on huutorgol mbawdi fii laamagol on ndi Joomiraa…óo on ye…óimmi ndin fii tii…óingol on, hara hinaa fii li…ďugol on.
Fii rawnagol, yo musi…ď…ďe, wonee e nder weltaare, e…ď…ďanee wonugol timmu…ďe, wakkilindiron, he…ďon miijo wooto, wondiron …ďuttu. ∆äun, Alla Jom giggol e …ďuttu on wonday e mon.
Salmondiree, hirbondiron hirbondiral laa…ďungal. Awa kadi gom…óin…ďe …ďen fow salminii on.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on, e giggol Alla, wonu e mon on fow, wondude e humondiral e *Ruuhu Senii…óo on.

Immorde e an min Puulusa, oo *sahaabaajo, mo tawata hinaa yim…ďe …ďen to…ó…óii …óun, hinaa kadi e hay gooto …óun rewi si hinaa e Iisaa Almasiihu on e Alla Baabaajo on, on Immintin…óo mo e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen,
wondude e musi…ď…ďe …ďe mi wondi …ďen fow, haa e mon onon ngal *moftal Iisaa wongal Galaasi.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere e …ďuttu wonan on immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on,
on ittu…óo hoore mun sadaka fii junuubaaji men …óin fii dandugol en e nguu jamaanu bonngu fewndiingu hande, wano Alla Baaba men hoddiri non,
on mo mangural wonani haa poomaa. Aamiina!
Mi…óo Ňčal…ói fii koo ko yaawu…óon yiltaade e …ďaawo oo Noddir…óo on mo∆ī∆īere Iisaa Almasiihu on, haa ka yahanon kibaaru goo.
Hara-le kibaaru goo alaa, kono yim…ďe goo no woodi won…ďe on jii…ďude, faalaa…ďe …ďoylude *Linjiila Almasiihu on.
Kono hay si ko menen maa malaa'ikaajo iwru…óo ka kammu fe…≤…≤inani on kibaaru goo sertu…óo e oya kibaaru mo men fe…≤…≤inannoo on, yo o malkise.
Hari men yeetinoke on …óun ado hande, mi…óo fillitaade kadi: si go…ó…óo fe…≤…≤inanii on kibaaru sertu…óo e oo mo hendino…óon, yo o malkise.

E jooni non, hara ko teddungal yim…ďe …ďen mi woni …óa…ď…ďude, kaa ko iwrungal ka Alla ngal? Kaa hara mi…óo …óa…ď…ďude no yim…ďe …ďen yi…óirammi? Si mi faalano haa jooni yo yim…ďe …ďen yi…óan, mi laatotanooko kurkaadu Almasiihu on.
Mi andinii on, yo musi…ď…ďe an, oo Kibaaru mo mi fe…≤…≤inani on hinaa iwru…óo e ne…ó…óanke.
Ko fii min mi he…ďiraali mo ne…ó…óanke, awa kadi wonaa ne…ó…óo jannimmi mo, kono ko Iisaa Almasiihu on tigi fe…≤…≤inanimmi mo.
On naniino fii …óee kuu…óe an e saa'iiji goo wa fewndo ko mi woni ka diina *Yahuudiyanke, …óun ko fewndo ko mi cukkii moftal Alla ngal haa fe∆ī∆īiti, mi…óo lanca.
E nder kan diina Yahuudiyanke, hari mi…óo …ďuri goree…ďe an buy e hakkunde le…≤ol an ngol, ko fii hari mi…óo …ďuri …ďe himme tii…óu…óo fii aadaaji baabiraa…ďe amen …ďen.
Kono, nde Allaahu on, on Su…ďinoo…óo lan gila ka teege yumma an, …óun ko on Noddir…óo lan mo∆ī∆īere mun nden,
o tawno no mo∆ī∆īi ka o fe…≤…≤inanammi ∆Āi…ó…óo makko on fii no mi wee…ďitirana mo …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen, laatii mi landaaki hay gooto.
Kono e hoore …óun mi yaaraali kisan *Yerusalaam fii yiidoygol e adii…ďe lan to…ó…óeede …ďen, kono mi yaari ka leydi Aarabu. ∆Āawto …óun mi yiltitii Damaasi.
Ko duu…ďi tati …ďawto …óun si mi yahi Yerusalaam fii yiidoygol e Petruusu. Mi woni ka makko …óon e nder bal…óe sappoo e jowi.
Kono hari …óun fow, mi yiidaali e sahaabaajo goo, si hinaa Yaaquuba, …óun ko mi…≤…≤iraawo Joomi on.
E nder koo ko mi woni on windande …óun, e hino Alla no reeni, mi fenaa.
∆Āawto …óun mi yahi e nder …óee ley…óe Sirii e Silisii.
Kono hari mofte Almasiihu won…óe e diiwal Yahuuda …óen yi'aali lan.
∆Āe naniino tun no wi'ee wonde: Oo cukkinoo…óo …ďe oya tuma, no waajaade e ngal gom…óinal ngal o faalanoo lancude.
Jooni hi…ďe mantude Alla fii an.
Duu…ďi sappoo e nay …ďawto …óun, mi yiltitii Yerusalaam, mi yiltodi e Barnabaasi e Tiituusa.

Ko sabu fe…≤…≤inaneede mi yiltitori ton. Mi holli …ďe daaluyee Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo mo mi fe…≤…≤inani …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen on. Mi fe…≤…≤inani …óun …ďur…ďe teddude …ďen e nder gundoo, fii wota taw ko mi gollunoo kon e ko mi woni gollude kon ko meere.
Kono fii kala oo mo mi wondunoo ko mo le…≤ol goo, …óun ko Tiituusa, oo *Gereekiyankeejo, …ďe wi'aano bee o *sunninee.
Kono wa…óitii…ďe musi…ď…ďe men no suu…óinoo lombii hakkunde amen fii tefugol anda fii hettaare wonannde en e Iisaa Almasiihu on e faale maccin…óingol en.
Kono men ja…ďanaano …ďe …óun hay nde wootere, men yankinanaaki …ďe kadi, fii no goonga won…óo e nder Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on tabitira e mon.
Kono laatii, …ďee wa'u…ďe wa si ko …ďur…ďe teddude, ko …ďe wonnoo woo ko see…óa hitti e an, …ďay Allaahu on hinaa dambe ndaarata, …ďen …ďeydaano huunde e ko mi woni waajaade kon.

Kono …ďe ndaari …ďe tawi ko mi halfiniraa daaluyee Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on ko fii …ďe sunninaaka …ďen, …óun ko …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen, wano Petruusu halfiniraa non Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on fii sunninaa…ďe …ďen, …óun ko Yahuudiyankee…ďe …ďen.
Ko fii ko on Alla huutor…óo Petruusu, wa…ói mo *sahaabaajo fii Yahuudiyankee…ďe …ďen, ko kanko kadi huutorimmi, wa…óimmi sahaabaajo fii …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen.

Nde tawnoo Yaaquuba e Petruusu e Yuuhanna, jogoraa…ďe wa tugaale dental ngal, fellitii fii mo∆ī∆īere nde mi ye…óaa nden, …ďe tamindiri juu…óe amen …≤aame …óen, min e Barnabaasi, fii na…ďidal amen, fii yo menen men yaaru ka …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen, kam…ďe …ďe yaara ka Yahuudiyankee…ďe …ďen.
∆Āe yamiri men kadi anditugol miskin…ďe …ďen, …óun ko ko mi hebulanii wa…óugol.
Kono nde Petruusu arnoo Antiyoosi-Sirii mi feli mo e kene, sabu tawde ko o felnii…óo.

Ko fii, ado yim…ďe …ďe Yaaquuba immini goo arude, hari o …≤aamiday e …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen, kono …ďay …ďen arii, o takkitii, o wonti feere, sabu kulol …ďen Yahuudiyankee…ďe gom…óin…ďe, catii e sunninegol …ďen,
haa …óun woni sabu …ďeya Yahuudiyankee…ďe …≤embi mo kanko Petruusu e ngal faasiqiyaagal, haa …óun poo…óori hay Barnabaasi, o tawti …ďe e …óun.

Kono nde mi ndaarunoo, mi tawi …ďe alaa yaarude no feewiri e no yaadiri e goonga Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on. Onsay mi holli Petruusu e tawnde fow …óun…óoo, mi wi'i mo: ¬ęSi tawii an Yahuudiyankeejo on, a wa'ii wa mo wonaa Yahuudiyanke, a iwtii noone Yahuudiyanke, haray ko honno waawirtaa doolirde …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke'en jokkugol aadaaji Yahuudiyanke'en?¬Ľ
Menen non, ko men jibinannde Yahuudiyanke, wonaa men …ďe …óiya le∆ī∆īi junuubankeeji,

kono men faamii wonde go…ó…óo jogortaake feewu…óo sabu …óoftagol Sariya on, kono ko sabu gom…óingol Iisaa Almasiihu on. Ko …óun wa…ói si menen kadi men gom…óinii Iisaa Almasiihu on, fii yo men jogore feewu…ďe sabu gom…óinal ngal gom…óin…óen Iisaa Almasiihu on ngal, hara hinaa sabu …óoftagol Sariya on. Ko fii hay gooto jogortaake feewu…óo sabu …óoftagol Sariya on.

Si tawii, e nder ko …óa…ď…ďeten jogoreede feewu…ďe kon sabu humondiral e *Almasiihu on, haray …ďangii wonde enen kadi ko en junuubankee…ďe, taw si …óun no firi wonde Almasiihu on no wonani junuubu? Oo'o!
Si mi wonii e mahitugol ko mi li…ďunoo kon, haray min tigi mi hollii ko mi bon…óo.
E telen-ma Sariya on, ko mi may…óo ka baŇčŇče Sariya fii no mi wuurirana Allaahu on.

Jooni mi fempidaama e Almasiihu on. Hinaa min tigi wuuri jooni, kono ko Almasiihu on wuuri e an. ∆äan ngurndan …óan mi wuuri jooni ka …ďandu, mi…óo wuuriri gom…óingol *∆Āi…ó…óo Alla on, on Yi…óu…óo lan, itti hoore mun sadaka fii an.
Min mi bugitotaako mo∆ī∆īere Alla nden, ko fii si tawiino peewal ko Sariya he…ďorta, harayno Almasiihu on ko meere maayani.
Ko onon yo …ďe Galaasi njofoo…ďe, ko hombo mbil…óori on nii, onon …ďee …ďanginanaa…ďe ko laa…ďi poy fempegol Iisaa Almasiihu on?
Jooni ko …óun…óoo tun mi faalaa andude e mon: hara ko sabu wa…óugol ko Sariya on yamiri kon he…ďir…óon Ruuhu Allaahu on, kaa ko gom…óingol ko he…ói…óon kon?
E jaa ko nii njofi…óir…óon? E on fu…ó…óor Ruuhu Allaahu on, gaynitoron jooni wakkilaare …ďandu?
E hara kon ko tampuno…óon fow wonay meere? Mi…óo tan∆īinii wonataa meere!

E hara oo Won…óo wa…óude …óii kaawakeeji mo∆ī∆īi e hakkunde mon, …óun ko on Ye…óu…óo on Ruuhu mun on, ko woni …ói wa…óirde ko fii hi…óon wa…óude ko Sariya on yamiri on kon, kaa ko fii hi…óon he…óorde gom…óinal?
Ko fii no windii wonde: ¬ęIbraahiima gom…óini Alla, ngal gom…óinal makko jogoranaa mo peewal.¬Ľ
Awa faamee wonde, gom…óin…ďe …ďen ko …ďi…ď…ďe Ibraahiima.

Awa kadi bindi …óin no wi'i wonde Alla jogitoroyay …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen feewu…ďe sabu gom…óinal ngal, …óun ko ka Allaahu on adii fe…≤…≤inde Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on e Ibraahiima …óon, o daali: ¬ęLe∆ī∆īi …óin fow barkinte sabu maa.¬Ľ
Ko …óun wa…ói …ďen gom…óin…ďe barkindinte e Ibraahiima, on gom…óinnoo…óo.
Kala …ďen hoolor…ďe Sariya on, haray ko e nder kuddi …ďe woni, ko fii no windii: ¬ęKuddi no e hoore kala on mo tabitaali e huutorgol ko windii kon fow ka nder deftere Sariya.¬Ľ
E hoore …óun, no laa…ďi poy wonde hay gooto jogortaake feewu…óo sabu Sariya on yeeso Alla, ko fii no windii: ¬ęFeewu…óo on wuuriray gom…óinal ngal.¬Ľ
Awa Sariya on hottaaki gom…óinal. Ko fii no windii wonde: ¬ęKala …óoftii…óo …óee yamirooje, o wuuriray …óe.¬Ľ
Ko e nder ko kuddi ndin wontani *Almasiihu on fii men kon, o sotti en e ley kuddi Sariya on, ko fii no windii: ¬ęKuddi wonanii kala on wengaa…óo e leggal¬Ľ,
…óun ko fii no barki Ibraahiima hewtira le∆ī∆īi …óin fow sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, e hara kadi en hendorto fodaari Ruuhu Allaahu on gom…óinal ngal.
Musi…ď…ďe, mi…óo ∆īettude misal e hoore men. Si go…ó…óo aru e wasiyaade, kala ko o wasiyii, hay gooto waawataa firtude …óun maa …ďeydita go…ó…óun e hoore …óun.
Kono fodaariiji …óin ko e hoore Ibraahiima e jurriya mun on woni. Kanko Alla o wi'aali ¬ęjurriyaaji …óin¬Ľ, wa si tawii ko …ói buy, kono ko gooto o wi'i ¬ęjurriya maa on¬Ľ, …óun-le ko Almasiihu on.
E hino ko mi woni wi'ude kon: Sariya ar…óo duu…ďi teeme…ó…óe nay e cappan…óe tati gaanin *ahadi ndi Allaahu on wa…óunoo ndin waawataa firtude maa mehin…óina ndin fodaari.
Ko fii si tawno ndondi ndin ko ka Sariya iwri, haray ndi fawaaki e fodaari. Kono ko sabu fodaari ndin Allaahu on ye…óiri Ibraahiima ndin ndondi.
Jooni ko sabu hon…óun addi Sariya on? Ko sabu geddi addi Sariya on, haa nde on jurriya fodaa…óo ari. Ko malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen fe…≤…≤ini Sariya on, kono …ďe rewi e hakkundeejo.
Hakkundeejo non wonaa sengo wooto wonirta, Alla-le ko gooto.
∆äun haray Sariya on ko liddii…óo fodaariiji Alla …óin? Kono hinaa non! Si tawii sariya on ko gasoowo wurnude addanoo, harayno peewal ngal ko e makko iwaynoo.
Ko …óun wa…ói si bindi …óin wi'i fow no sokaa e ley junuubi, fii no fodaari ndin ye…óiree gom…óin…ďe …ďen sabu ko …ďe gom…óini Iisaa Almasiihu on kon.
Ado gom…óinal ngal arude, hari hi…óen sokii e ley joge Sariya on, haa ngal gom…óinal araynoongal fee…≤a.
Hari Sariya on ko ngaynaako men fii ko ardoo en e Almasiihu on, fii no jogore…óen feewu…ďe sabu gom…óinal ngal.
∆Āay ngal gom…óinal arii, en alaa e ley kongol on ngaynaako han kadi.
Ko fii on fow ko on …ďi…ď…ďe Alla sabu gom…óinal ngal gom…óin…óon Iisaa Almasiihu on ngal.
Onon *lootaa…ďe maande kisiyee e nder humondiral e Almasiihu on …ďen fow, on …ďornike Almasiihu on.
Yahuudiyankeejo maa *Gereekiyankeejo, maa maccu…óo maa dimo, maa debbo maa gorko, alaa hande kadi. Ko fii on fow ko on gooto e nder humondiral mon e Iisaa Almasiihu on.
Awa-le si tawii hi…óon humondiri e Almasiihu on, haray ko on jurriya Ibraahiima, ronoo…ďe fodaari ndin.
Ko mi woni wi'ude: fannin ronoowo on ko paykun, haray alaa fus ko o serti e maccu…óo. Fii kala ko kanko jeyi fow,
haray hikun e ley kongol ne'oo…ďe kun …ďen e fewjanoo…ďe kun …ďen, haa e saa'i mo ben makkun happi on timma.
Enen kadi wano non, wa fewndo ko won…óen fay…ďe, hari ko en maccu…ďe …óii mbawdiiji adunayankeeji.
Kono …ďay saa'i on hewtii, Allaahu on adduno ∆Āi…ó…óo makko on, on mo debbo jibini, jibinaa…óo e ley Sariya on,
fii sottugol …ďen won…ďe e ley Sariya on fii no jogore…óen wa …ďi…ď…ďe.
∆Āay ko en …ďi…ď…ďe, Alla addii ka …ďer…óe men Ruuhu ∆Āi…ó…óo makko on, …óun ko on Ruuhu won…óo ewnaade ¬ęAbba¬Ľ e maana Baaba.
∆äun haray hinaa a maccu…óo hande kadi, kono ko a …ďi…ó…óo. Si tawii-le ko a …ďi…ó…óo, haray ko a ronoowo immorde e Alla.
Wa fewndo ko on andaa Alla, hari ko on maccu…ďe sanamuuji …ói tawata wonaa go…ó…óun tigi e oo aduna.
Jooni non on andii Alla, e tentinii non jooni ko on …ďe Alla andi, ko honno non yiltitor…óon e …óii mbawdiiji mehi lo'u…ói? E hara on faalaa …óe maccin…óinanaade kadi?
Hi…óon hittina fii …≤alaa…óe …óen e lebbi …óin e saa'iiji …óin e duu…ďi …óin.
Mi…óo huli fii mon, wota taw koo ko mi yanganii on ko meere.
Musi…ď…ďe an, wa'ee wa an min, ko fii min mi…óo wa'i wa mon, yandi mi jeejii on! Ko fii on bonaaki e an.
Hi…óon maanditii ka aranun ko sabu nawnaare an mi he…ďiri feere fe…≤…≤inangol on Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on.
Hi…óon waawunoo non ronkude teddingol lan maa bugitoo lan sabu …≤awu an ngun, kono on wa…óaali …óun! Ka liddu …óun, on tolnirno lan wa malaa'ikaajo Alla maa wa Iisaa Almasiihu on tigi.
Ko honto weltaare mon nden woni jooni? Ko fii mi…óo seeditanaade on …óun…óoo: si no gasaynoo, on …ďorayno gite mon …óen, wattanon mi.
Haray e nder ko mi yeetotoo on goonga kon, mi wonii ga…≤o mon?
Awa himme mo …ďe joganii on on hinaa mo∆ī∆īo, ko …ďe faalaa…ďe sortude on e amen, fii no tawtiron …ďe.
No mo∆ī∆īi ka go…ó…óo he…ďa himme mo∆ī∆īo saa'i woo, hara hinaa si mi…óo hakkunde mon tun.
Fay…ďe an, mi…óo joganii on kadi muuseendi Ňčata haa wa'on wa *Almasiihu on.
Mi…óo faalaa wondude e mon jooni, mi yewtira on noone goo, ko fii mi…óo aanani on.
Andinee lan, onon …ďee faalaa…ďe wonude e ley Sariya on, si on faamaali ko Sariya on wi'i kon.
Ko fii no windii, Ibraahiima no mari …ďi…ď…ďe …ói…óo: go…ó…óo on ko mo kor…óo jibinani mo on, oya on ko mo dimo on jibinani mo on.
Mo kor…óo on, ko jibiniraa…óo faale …ďandu, kono mo debbo dimo on, ko jibiniraa…óo fodaari ndin.
∆äun ko misal nii: rew…ďe …ďen …ói…óo, ko ahadiiji …óin …ói…ói, *ahadi goo ko ndi Fello *Sinaayi ndin, …ďi…ď…ďe mayri …ďen ko maccu…ďe, …óun ko Haajirata.
Ko ngon Fello Sinaayi wongo ka leydi Aarabu woni Haajirata, hingo wa'i wa saare Yerusalaam handeere nden, …ďay hinde e nder maccangaaku, kayre e …ďi…ď…ďe mayre on.
Kono saare Yerusalaam dow-dowre nden ko dimo on, ko on woni yumma men Saarata.

Ko fii no windii: ¬ęWelto yo an mo jibintaa, an mo jiidotaako! Sowtu weltaare, ewno…óaa, …óun ko an mo andaali muuseendi Ňčata! Ko fii ko …ďi…ď…ďe on wul…óaa…óo …ďurata …óuu…óude edii on debbo wondu…óo e moodi on.¬Ľ
Ko fii, yo musi…ď…ďe, onon kadi ko on …ďi…ď…ďe fodaari ndin, wano *Issaaqa non.
Awa kadi, ko wano ko fe∆ī∆īunoo kon, on he…ďiranoo…óo faale …ďandu, …ďittinayno on he…ďiraa…óo Ruuhu, ko …óun fewndii kadi jooni.
Ko hon…óun bindi …óin wi'i? Ko: ¬ęRa…óo kor…óo on e …ďi…ó…óo mun on, ko fii …ďi…ó…óo kor…óo on ronidataa e mo debbo dimo on jibini on.¬Ľ
Ko wano non yo musi…ď…ďe, hinaa en …ďi…ď…ďe kor…óo on, kono ko en …ďe debbo dimo on.
Ko fii no woniren rin…óinaa…ďe wa…ói si *Almasiihu on rin…óini en. Awa wonee tabitu…ďe, wota on yiltitu hoore mon kadi e ley …ďoggol maccangaaku.
Ko …óun wa…ói, min Puulusa, mi wi'ay on wonde si on etike fii yo on sunnine, haray Almasiihu on nafataa on huunde.
Awa mi fellintinanay kala ne…ó…óo kadi wonde si etike haa sunninaama, haray himo haani jokkude Sariya on fow.
Onon …ďee won…ďe …óa…ď…ďude no jogitoree feewu…ďe ka Sariya, on seedii e Almasiihu on, awa kadi on wo…ó…óondirii e mo∆ī∆īere Alla nden.
Kono enen, tama'u men on ko jogoreede feewu…ďe yeeso Alla sabu gom…óinal men ngal. Ko tippude e Ruuhu on sabbi…óen on tama'u.
Ko fii, ko hitti e won…ďe e Iisaa Almasiihu on …ďen kon hinaa *sunninegol maa angal sunninegol, kono ko gom…óinal fe…≤…≤iniroowal hoore mun giggol.
Ko fii hari hi…óon dogude mo∆ī∆īa. Ko hombo non darni on haa ha…ói on …óoftagol goonga on?
Awa nden fewjoore …óon hinaa e Noddu…óo on on iwri.
Ko fii lewen see…óa tun ∆īurinay farin jii…ďaa…óo.
Min non mi…óo joganii on ndee hoolaare …óoo e fee Joomiraa…óo on wonde, on miijotaako go…ó…óun goo. Kono on won…óo jii…ďude on, …óun non ko won…óo woo, o rondoyto …≤aawoore nden.

E min non yo musi…ď…ďe, si mi…óo waajaade fii nafa sunninegol, haray ko fii hon…óun kadi mi cukkantee? Si tawno haa jooni waaju an ngun no humii e sunninegol, haray fempeede Iisaa Almasiihu on ka hoore *leggal altindiraangal accii wonangol yim…ďe …ďen peggal.
Yo …ďen won…ďe sonjude on …ďujito haa …óaata!
Musi…ď…ďe, jooni on noddaama ka ndimankaaku. Wota on …ďaaror ngun ndimankaaku mon fii wa…óugol mbelee…óe …ďandu, kono kurkondiranee e nder giggol.
Ko fii Sariya on fow no timmi e nder aaya gooto, e hino mo: ¬ęYo a yi…óir …≤okondo maa on wano yi…óir…óaa hoore maa non.¬Ľ
Kono si on Ňčatindirii, on seekindirii wa kulle …óen, awa reenee wota on mulindir.
Ko …óun si mi wi'ay on: wuuriree Ruuhu Allaahu on, …óun on jokkataa himmeeji …ďandu.
Ko fii himmeeji …ďandu no liddondiri e Ruuhu Allaahu on, on *Ruuhu Senii…óo kadi no liddondiri e himmeeji …ďandu, ko …ói lurru…ói kanji …ói…ói, fii wota on wa…óu ko faala…óon woo.
Kono si Ruuhu Senii…óo on ardike on, haray hinaa e ley Sariya on won…óon.
Ko fii mbelee…óe …ďandu …óen no waalii e kene, …óen-le ko jinaa e angal laa…ďal e jii…ďaare
e rewugol sanamu e mbileyaagal e ngayngu e yeddondiral e nawliigu e monee e haasidi e sendondiral e fedde-fedde
e nga…≤aneendi e mandilugol e *fasaadu e ko nandi e mun. Mi…óo ha…óude on, wano mi ha…óirnoo on non wonde, …ďen wuurir…ďe nii he…ďoytaa ge…ďal ka *laamu Alla.
Kono ko Ruuhu Allaahu on funtinta kon, ko giggol e weltaare e …ďuttu e mu…≤al e yurmeende e mo∆ī∆īuki e sella-findeyaagal
e newaare e waawugol hoore mun. Sariya ha…óaali sifa …óin piiji.
Won…ďe e Iisaa Almasiihu on …ďen fempii …ďandu mun ndun wondude e himmeeji mun e faaleeji mun.
Si tawii ko Ruuhu Senii…óo on wuurir…óen, haray yaaden kadi e Ruuhu on.
Wota en wonu mawnintinii…ďe, maa bagondiren, maa nawlindiren.
Musi…ď…ďe, si go…ó…óo e mon aru e wa…óugol bonnere, haray onon, …ďe Ruuhu on ardii …ďen, wurtiree mo hakkil newiiki. Onon tigi reeno…óon, fii wota onon kadi on jarribe.
Rondondiranee anndeeji mon …óin. Ko non timminirton Sariya *Almasiihu on.
On mo no sikki ko o go…ó…óun, hara-le hinaa o huunde, haray o …óaynitike kanko tigi.
Mo kala yo tasko kuu…óe mun …óen tigi, o yi'anay hoore makko hara hinaa e …ďeya, …óun o anday no o mantora,
ko fii mo kala no haani rondaade dongal mun ngal.
Yo on wonaa…óo janneede daaluyee on sendodu kala piiji mo∆ī∆īi e won…óo mo jannude on.
Wota on …óaynito, ko fii Alla yawitetaake, ko fii kala ko go…ó…óo sanki ko …óun o wa'ata.
Mo sankii mbelee…óe …ďandu wa'ay e mayru halakuyee, kono on sanku…óo faale Ruuhu on, o wa'ay e makko *ngurndan poomayankejan.
Wota en haa…ďu wa…óugol ko mo∆ī∆īi, ko fii en wa'oyay e saa'i haanu…óo si maayu …ďernde he…ďaali en.
Ko …óun wa…ói, fewndo ka wee…ďani en …óon, wa…óanen yim…ďe …ďen fow ko mo∆ī∆īi, tentinii musi…ď…ďe men …ďen ka gom…óinal.
On yi'ii ittiri bindi njani …ói mi windirani on jungo an ngon …óin.
Kala …ďen faalaa…ďe wa…óude ko welata yim…ďe …ďen kon, …ďe karhay on fii *sunninegol, hara ko fii tun wota …ďe tampine sabu *leggal altindiraangal Almasiihu on.
Ko fii hay kam…ďe sunninaa…ďe …ďen tigi …ďe jokkataa Sariya on, kono ko …ďe faalirtee yo on sunnine, ko fii no …ďe mantora e hoore mon.
Min non hinaa non! Ko fii mi mantortaa huunde si hinaa leggal altindiraangal Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on. Sabu maggal aduna on maayii telen-ma an, min kadi mi maayii telen-ma aduna on.
Awa hinaa sunninegol maa angal sunninegol hitti, kono ko ko Alla hey…óintini en kon hitti.
Yo …ďuttu e yurmeende wonan kala jokku…óo ndee yamiroore, hay e *Isra'iila mo Alla.
Ka heddii …óoo, wota hay gooto tampinan, ko fii …ďattaate Iisaa …óen no ka …ďandu an.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on wonu e …ďer…óe mon, yo musi…ď…ďe. Aamiina!
Immorde e an min Puulusa, mo Alla hoddiri wonugol *sahaabaajo Iisaa Almasiihu on, haa e …ďee yim…ďe Alla, sella-findee…ďe e nder humondiral ma…ď…ďe e Iisaa Almasiihu on, won…ďe Efeesi.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere e …ďuttu wonan on immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on.
Mantoore wonanii Alla, Ben Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, on Hebbin…óo en kala barki iwruki e Alla ka kammuuli sabu Almasiihu on.
Ko sabu makko Allaahu on su…ďori en ko adii fu…ó…óoode aduna on, fii no woniren laa…ďu…ďe, …ďe aldaa e ella yeeso makko. E nder giggol makko ngol
o muuyanno en wonugol …ďe makko sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, wano o faaliraa non e nder e…ď…ďoore makko mo∆ī∆īere nden,
fii no mantiren mangu sulfu makko mo o ye…óiri en yi…óaa…óo makko on.
Ko e nder humondiral e makko sottira…óen ∆īii∆īan makko …óan, ko …óan he…ďir…óen yaafuyee junuubaaji no yaadiri e ngalu sulfu makko,
mo Alla wa…óiri e hoore men faamu yaajungu e hakkil timmuki, haa yoni.
O andinii en gundoo kodduruyee makko on, no yaadiri e faale makko mo∆ī∆īo, mo o e…ď…ďirnoo Iisaa Almasiihu on on,
fii huuwugol mo, nde saa'i on timmoyi, mottindira kala ko woni ka kammuuli e ka hoore leydi, wa…óa …ói ley yeesoojo gooto, …óun ko *Almasiihu on.
Enen humondir…ďe e Almasiihu on …ďen, en su…ďaama fii wonugol …ďe makko e nder muuyiraneede e…ď…ďoore on Timminiroowo kala huunde no yaadiri e anniyee faale makko on,
fii no menen …ďee attii…ďe tan∆īinorde Almasiihu on men mantira mangu makko ngun.
Onon kadi hi…óon e makko, …ďay on nanii daaluyee goongaajo on, …óun ko kibaaru hisin…óo on on. Onon kadi on gom…óinii, awa kadi Alla wa…óii *Ruuhu Senii…óo on maande e mon, …óun ko on mo fodano…óon.
Ko on Ruuhu woni seeke ndondi men ndin, haa …≤ande cottudi …ďen …ďe Alla su…ďii tabiti, fii mantugol mangu makko ngun.
Ko …óun wa…ói si min kadi, …ďay mi nanii fii ko gom…óin…óon Iisaa Joomi on kon, e giggol ngol yi…óu…óon yim…ďe Alla …ďen fow ngol,
mi alaa fowtaade e jarnugol Alla fii mon, mi maandinii kadi fii mon e nder torndeeji an …óin,
fii no Jom Mangural ngal, …óun ko Alla Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, okkira on ruuhu wondu…óo e faamu e fe…≤…≤inaneede, fii no andiron mo,
e yo o hentin gii…óe …ďer…óe mon …óen, fii no andiron on tama'u mo o noddi on fii mun, e no andiron ngalu darja ndondi makko ndin e hakkunde yim…ďe Alla …ďen,
e no andiron mangu bawgal makko fe∆ī∆īitungu wongu gollude e men ngun, enen …ďee gom…óin…ďe. Ko ngal bawgal o huutori doole makko …óen
fewndo o immintini Iisaa Almasiihu on e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen, o jo…ó…óiniri mo ka sengo makko …≤aamo ka kammuuli.

O wa…ói mo e dow kala laamu, e kala ko jogii mbawdi, e kala ko jogii doole, e kala ko ardotoo, e hoore kala innde waaweteende janteede, hinaa non e oo aduna fewndii…óo hande on tun, kono hay e aduna aroyoowo on.
O wa…ói fow e ley koy…óe makko, o to…ó…óii mo kadi Hooreejo Toowu…óo fii *moftal ngal.
Ko ngal moftal woni …ďandu makko ndun, ngal hebbiniraama on Hebbinoowo fow e noone fow.
Onon non hari on maayii sabu bonnereeji mon …óin e junuubaaji mon …óin,
…ói wuuruno…óon e mun, fewndo jokkuno…óon laawol oo aduna, wondude e bawgal oo lan…óo jinnaaji …óin. Ko ruuhu on lan…óo woni gollude e …ďen yeddu…ďe jooni.
En fow kadi hi…óen tawdanoo e ma…ď…ďe, hari hi…óen jokkunoo himmeeji …ďandu, hi…óen jokkunoo faaleeji …ďandu men ndun e miijooji men …óin, hari ko en mbaadi fay…ďe handunoo…ďe e tikkere wa …ďeya.
Kono Alla ko Heewu…óo yurmeende. Ko sabu giggol makko mawngol, ngol o yi…ói en ngol,

Hinaa sabu kuu…óe …óen few fii wota gooto mawnintino.

Awa, onon …ďee …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke e le…≤ol, …ďe *Yahuudiyankee…ďe wi'u…ďe no sunninaa jogitori wa …ďe sunninaaka, hara kam…ďe non, ko …ďe sunninaa ka …ďandu kon, ko ko wa…óiraa juu…óe ne…ó…óanke, anditee wonde:
hari on alaa Almasiihu, on jeyaaka e leydi Isra'iila ndin, hari ko on janan…ďe e telen-ma *ahadiiji fodaari ndin, …ďe aldaa e tama'u, …ďe alaa Alla e oo aduna.

Ko fii ko kanko woni …ďuttu men on, on wa…óu…óo …ói…óoo…ďe …ďen gooto, on li…ďir…óo maadi ngayngu heedunoondi …ďe ndin okkitirgol …ďandu makko ndun.

o mo∆ī∆īintina hakkunde ma…ď…ďe e Alla, kam…ďe …ói…óo …ďe wona …ďandu wooturu rewrude e *leggal altindiraangal ngal o wariri ngayngu ngal.

Ko …óun wa…ói, hinaa on janan…ďe hande kadi, maa tuŇčarankee…ďe, kono ko on jeydu…ďe e yim…ďe Alla …ďen, tawdaa…ďe e suudu Alla ndun,

Ko fe…≤…≤inaneede mi andiri gundoo on, wano mi windiri non e nder kongu…ói see…óaaji.
E nder jangugol …ói, on waaway faamude hakkil ki mi he…ďi e telen-ma gundoo *Almasiihu on.
On gundoo fe…≤…≤inananooka …ďii ne…ó…óanke'en e …óiya jamaanuuji, wano Ruuhu Alla on fe…≤…≤inirani non jooni sahaabaa…ďe makko laa…ďu…ďe …ďen e annabaa…ďe …ďen

wonde: …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen no kafidi e Yahuudiyankee…ďe …ďen ndondi wootiri, …ďe …ďandu mun woni wooturu, tawdaa…ďe e fodaari wootiri ndin e nder humondiral e Iisaa Almasiihu on sabu Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on.

(E hin-le ko hon…óun ¬ęo ∆īawii¬Ľ firi si wonaa wonde o tippike haa ka nokkeeli …ďur…ói luggude ka leydi?
On non Tippii…óo, ko on ∆īawi e dow kammuuli …óin fow, fii hebbingol kala huunde.)
Ko kanko ye…ói wo…ď…ďe wonugol sahaabaa…ďe, wo…ď…ďe …ďen wonugol annabaa…ďe, wo…ď…ďe …ďen fe…≤…≤inoo…ďe Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on, wo…ď…ďe …ďen aynoo…ďe e jannoo…ďe,
fii hebulingol yim…ďe Alla …ďen fii golleeji kurkagol ngol e fii tii…óingol …ďandu Almasiihu on
haa en fow yu…ď…ďondiren e nder gom…óinal ngal e andugol *∆Āi…ó…óo Alla on, mawnen, wonen mokobaa…ďe, haa hewten mawnannde tooweendi ko woni e Almasiihu on kon fow.

Awa e hino ko mi wi'ata on, mi andina on e innde Joomiraa…óo on: On haanaa wuurirde han kadi wa …ďe gom…óinaa …ďen, …ďen jokku…ďe miijooji mun mehi.

∆Āe alaa lee…ďol liimanaaku few, …ďe jokkii jii…ďaare, fii wa…óugol kala ko laa…ďaa ko yu…ď…ďondiri e himme.
Kono onon, hinaa non andir…óon Almasiihu on.
∆Āay pellet on nanii fii makko no wowlee, on jannaama fii makko ko yaadi e goonga won…óo e makko on,
haray hi…óon haani …ďortaade jikku mon fe∆ī∆īu…óo on e tagudi mon hindi ndin, …óun ko on tuuniniroowo on himmeeji faljinooji,
accon ruuhuuji mon …óin e hakkilaaji mon …óin hey…óintinee,
…ďorno…óon tagudi mon heyri ndi Alla tagiri mbaadi mun e nder peewal e laa…ďal ko rimata goonga.
Ko …óun wa…ói ko yo on seedu e fenaande, mo kala e mon yo wowlan …óimmo mun on goonga, ko fii ko en tere …óe …ďandu wooturu.
Si on aru seytinde, wota on wa…óu junuubu, haray wota naange ngen mutu hi…óon tikki.
Wota on jonnu Ibuliisa yolnde.
Wujjaynoo…óo woo wota wujju han kadi, kono yo o gollir juu…óe makko …óen e nder nun…óal, o wa…óa go…ó…óun ko nafi, o okkora hatonjin…óo.

Wota on accu kongol barminoowol woo yalta ka hunduko mon, kono wowlee kongu…ói mo∆ī∆īinay…ói tun, adday…ói nafa, wallay…ói …ďeya mawnugol ka nder gom…óinal, …óun …ói wa…óay ko mo∆ī∆īi e he…óotoo…ďe on …ďen.
Wota on aanin Ruuhu Alla *Senii…óo on, on mo maandinira…óon fii ndee …≤alaande cottudi wonkii.
Yo kala mettee…óe e tikkere e monee e sonko e hoyre e kala bonki iwu hakkunde mon.
Mo∆ī∆īondiree, yurmondiron, yaafondiron, wano Alla yaafori on non sabu Almasiihu on.
Awa wonee …≤emboo…ďe Alla wa fay…ďe yi…óaa…ďe,
wuuron e nder giggol wano *Almasiihu on yi…óiri en non. O wattitii kanko tigi e sookeeje Alla fii wonangol en sadaka sakkaa…óo wa angiri uurundi.
Wota jinaa e kala noone angal laa…ďal maa himme maandine toode e hakkunde mon, …ďay …óii piiji haananaa yim…ďe Alla …ďen.
Wota haalaaji bon…ói maa …ói aldaa e faamu wowle, hay non si ko awmagol, …óun hinaa ko haani, kono yo Alla yette.
Ko fii, andee fota, kala jinoowo maa mo laa…ďaa maa himmu…óo, e maanaa rewoowo sanamu, alaa ge…ďal ka *laamateeri Alla e Almasiihu on.
Awa wota hay gooto …óaynir on haalaaji mehi, …ďay ko fii …óun tikkere Alla nden ardata e hoore murtu…ďe …ďen.
Awa wota on kafidu e ma…ď…ďe ge…ďal woo.
Hari ko on ni…ďe, kono jooni ko on ndaygu sabu humondiral mon e Joomiraa…óo on. Awa wuuriree wa fay…ďe ndaygu ngun,
ko fii ndaygu ngun no funtina kala noone mo∆ī∆īere e peewal e goonga.
Awa hakkilanee e ko welata Joomiraa…óo on kon.
Wota on humondir e kuu…óe meereeje woo …óe ni…ďe, kono fe…≤…≤inee fii majje.
Ko fii ko …ďen yim…ďe wa…óata kon e gundoo no hersinii toode hay wowlugol.
Kono kala ko fee…≤i ka ndaygu, yaltitay,
ko fii ndaygu ngun hentinay fow. Ko …óun wa…ói si no wi'aa: ¬ęFinu, yo an …óaanii…óo, immo e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen, Almasiihu on ndaygay e hoore maa.¬Ľ
Awa wattanee yiila e ngurndan mon …óan, hara on wuuriraali wa komoo…ďe …ďen, kono ko wa jooma-faamu'en.
Awa wota on accu fajuhun woo fe∆ī∆īira on, ko fii …≤alaa…óe …óen ko bon…óe.
Ko …óun wa…ói, wota on wonu faa…óa-hakkil…ďe, kono faamee ko hon…óun woni faale Joomiraa…óo on.
Wota on yaru haa mandilon, …óun ko …ďoylaare, kono hebbinoree Ruuhu Allaahu on.
Yewtiree beyti Zabuura e jaarooje e beyti hormor…ói. Beytanon, jaaranon Joomiraa…óo on ka …ďer…óe mon,
saa'i kala yetton Alla, on Baabaajo, e kala huunde e innde Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on.
∆äoftondiree e dow teddingol Almasiihu on.
Onon kadi, yo sonnaa…ďe, mo kala yo yankinano moodi mun wano yankinorani non Joomiraa…óo on.
Ko fii ko gorko woni hoore debbo, wano Almasiihu on woniri non hoore *moftal ngal, ngal-le ko …ďandu makko, ko kanko woni dandoowo ngal.
Wano moftal ngal yankinorani non Almasiihu on, yo mo kala e sonnaa…ďe …ďen kadi yankinoran non moodi mun e …ói fow.
Onon kadi, yo duhii…ďe, mo kala e mon yo yi…óu sonnaajo mun on wano Almasiihu on yi…óiri moftal ngal non, haa o okkitiri hoore makko fii maggal.
O wa…óiri …óun fii no ngal wonira ngal Alla e hoore *la…ď…ďinirgol ngal lootirgol ndiyan e daaluyee on,
fii fe…≤…≤inoygol ngal moftal darjungal e makko, hara ngal aldaa e waadere woo e …≤u…óagol e huunde ko nandi e …óun, kono hara ko laa…ďungal, ngal aldaa e ella.
Wano non kadi, duhii…ďe …ďen haani yi…óirde sonnaa…ďe mun …ďen wa …ďalli ma…ď…ďe …óin tigi. Kala on yi…óu…óo sonnaajo mun on, haray no yi…óitii ka…≤un tigi.
Ko fii hay gooto a…≤ataa …ďandu mun ndun, kono o …≤amminay ndu, o dankoo wano Almasiihu on wa…óirani *moftal ngal non.
Ko fii ko en tere …ďandu makko.
¬ęKo …óun wa…ói si gorko selay ben mun e yumma mun, humoo e …ďeyngu mun, onsay kam…ďe …ói…óo …ďe wona gooto.¬Ľ
On gundoo no mawni, kono ko hakkunde Almasiihu on e moftal mun ngal mi woni e…ď…ďindirde …óun.

Onon kadi fay…ďe, …óoftee maw…ďe mon …ďen sabu Joomiraa…óo on, ko fii …óun ko ko feewi.
Ko fii ¬ęTeddin yumma maa e ben maa¬Ľ, ko yamiroore aranere nden non wondude e fodaari,
fii no ontigi malira, o he…ďa duu…ďi buy ka hoore leydi.
Onon kadi non, yo baabiraa…ďe, wota on mettin …ďer…óe fay…ďe mon …ďen, kono ne'iree …ďe waajagol …ďe, eltira laawol Joomiraa…óo on.
Onon kadi, yo jiyaa…ďe, …óoftee jey…ďe on jeyal adunayankewal …ďen e nder kulol e teddungal, e hoore …ďernde laa…ďunde, wano …óoftor…óon *Almasiihu on non.
∆äun non, hara hinaa e gite ma…ď…ďe tun, maa wano welirta yim…ďe …ďen non, kono wa kurkaa…ói Almasiihu on, wa…óiroo…ďe faale Alla on …ďer…óe mun …óen fow.

Tippiro men ngon wonaa hakkunde men e …ďandu e ∆īii∆īan woni, kono ko hakkunde men e laamuuji …óin e mbawdiiji …óin e laamuuji oo aduna won…óo e nder ni…ďe e mbawdiiji ruuhuuyankeeji bon…ói …óin ka kammuuli.
Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on: ∆īettee aalaaji Alla …óin fow, fii no waawiron dartorde tuma …≤alaande bone nden aroyi woo, e fii no waawiron darorde tabita …ďawto wa…óugol fow.

E nder kala huunde, jogoree gom…óinal ngal wa hiwitorgo, ngo waawoton …óanninirde ndagaaje yiite Ibuliisa …óen fow.

Saa'i kala toro…óon wano Ruuhu Allaahu on woni ardorde on non e kala noone torndeeji, lando…óon ballal Alla, findinon hakkillaaji mon …óin fii …óun, duumo…óon e …óun fota, torano…óon yim…ďe Alla …ďen fow.
Torano…óon mi min kadi, fii, nde mi udditi hunduko an kon woo, yo mi ye…óe kongu…ói fii yottingol gundoo Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on e nder cuucal.

Yo mo∆ī∆īere wonan kala yi…óir…óo Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, giggol ngol bontataa.

Immorde e an min Puulusa e Timotee, menen …óii kurkaa…ói Iisaa Almasiihu on, haa e yim…ďe Alla humondir…ďe e Iisaa Almasiihu on fow ka saare Filipii, e ardotoo…ďe *moftal ngal e wallitotoo…ďe ngal …ďen.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere e …ďuttu wonan on immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on.
Mi…óo jarnude Alla an on saa'i kala nde mi anditi fii mon.
Saa'i kala nde mi torantoo on on fow, ko e nder weltaare mi tororta,
sabu ko kafidu…óon e amen fii Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo Iisaa Almasiihu on kon, gila …≤ande mi hewti ka mon haa hande.
Mi…óo felliti, Alla, on Fu…ó…óii…óo kuugal mo∆ī∆īal e mon, jokkay timmingol …óun haa …≤ande ardu Iisaa Almasiihu on.

No haani ka mi miijorana on nii, ko fii mi…óo wa…ói on ka …ďernde an. Ko fii on fow ko on kafidu…ďe e an sulfu Alla on, woni e nder ko mi sokaa kon, woni ko mi darantoo Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on kon, mi haqinqina mo.
Ko fii Alla no seeditanoo mi wonde mi…óo yi…ói on on fow wano Iisaa Almasiihu on yi…óiri on non.

∆äun, on waaway taskaade, anda ko …ďuri mo∆ī∆īude kon, fii no laatoron …ďe …ďernde laa…ďunde e …ďe felnaaki …≤ande ardu *Almasiihu on,
heewu…ďe kuu…óe feewu…óe iwru…óe e Iisaa Almasiihu on fii mangu e mantoore Alla.
Mi faalaa yo on andu, yo musi…ď…ďe an, ko he…ďunoo mi kon wallii fii no Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on …ďantora.

E hin-le, …ďen won…ďe …ďanginirde fii Almasiihu on haasidi, anniyeeji ma…ď…ďe …óin hinaa laa…ďu…ói, hi…ďe miijii …ďeyditude satteende e hoore ko mi sokaa kon.

Wa…óiree fow e …ďaawo dukugol e yeddondiro,
fii no laatoron laa…ďu…ďe …ďe felnaaki, e no woniron fay…ďe Alla …ďe felnaaki e hakkunde nguu jamaanu bonngu …ďoyliingu, ngu jalbir…óon e hakkunde mun wa koo…óe e oo aduna,
jogii…ďe daaluyee ngurndan …óan. ∆äun, on wonanoyay lan …ďe mi mantorta …≤ande ardu *Almasiihu on, …óun haray wonanii lan seedee ko mi jindi kon e ko mi tampi kon wonaali meere.
Hay si tawii mi wonay sadaka hibbantee…óo Joomiraa…óo on fii timmingol sadaka mon on e kurkagol mon ngol immorde e gom…óinal mon ngal, haray mi…óo weltii, mi…óo weltodi kadi e mon on fow.
Onon kadi weltoree wano non, weltodon e an!
Mi…óo tan∆īinori Iisaa Joomi on nelugol Timotee haa e mon ko nee…ďaa, fii no mi wakkilora min tigi sabu …óin kibaaruuji …ói mi he…ďirta on.
Ko fii hay gooto aaniranaa on wa an si hinaa kanko Timotee.
Ko fii fow ko nafa mun on woni …óa…ď…ďude, hinaa nafa won…óo e Iisaa Almasiihu on.
Kono hi…óon andi ko honno Timotee …ďanginiri fii mun, e no men gollidiri fii Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on, wa paykun wonkun moggo ben mun.
Awa, mi…óo tan∆īinii nelugol mo haa e mon, nde mi humpitii ko laa…ďi fii ko he…ďoytammi kon woo.

Mi…óo tan∆īinii no mo∆ī∆īi ka mi nelta e mon oo musi…ó…óo an, wondi…ó…óo an e golle e tippiro, wi'etee…óo Epafruuditu, mo neluno…óon e an, jonnor…óon piiji …ói mi handi.

Awa mi neltanii on mo e hoore hawjere tii…óunde fii yo on weltor yi'ugol mo, e no min kadi sokola an on …óuytora.
Ja…ď…ďee mo e innde Joomiraa…óo on, wondude e weltaare timmunde, teddinon kadi sifa …ďen yim…ďe.
Ko fii, ko sabu golle Almasiihu on o eppirnoo mayde, fewndo o wee…ďitunoo ngurndan makko …óan, fii gollangol lan golle …óe onon tigi on waawaano.

Ko fii, sunninaa…ďe tigi-tigii…ďe …ďen ko enen, enen …ďee rewiroo…ďe Alla Ruuhu makko on, enen …ďee mantor…ďe Iisaa Almasiihu on, enen …ďee …ďe hooloraa …ďandu mun.

Ko fii mi sunninano ka …≤alaande jeetata…ďere. Ko mi jibinannde *Isra'iila ka bolondaa *Buniyamiinu, ∆īii∆īan *Aabirayanke tigi. Fii telen-ma ka teddingol Sariya Muusaa on, mi…óo tawdanoo e *Fariisiyaa…ďe …ďen.
