Faandaare an nden ko andugol mo kanko Almasiihu on, anda bawgal immintineede makko nden, mi hawtida e makko tampereeji makko …óin, mi wa'a wa makko ka mayde makko,
e dow tama'u immintineede e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen.
Hinaa fii mi he…ďii ko mi faandanii kon, maa mi hewtii ka timmoode, kono mi…óo jokki yaarugol yeeso fii no mi hendoroya kon ko Iisaa Almasiihu noddirimmi fii mun.
Min tigi non, yo musi…ď…ďe an, mi tan∆īinaaki wonde mi hendike …óun taho. Kono mi…óo wa…ói huunde wootere: yejjitugol fii ko fe∆ī∆īi kon, poo…óanoo ko woni yeeso kon.
Mi…óo dogande timmoode nden, fii no mi he…ďira njoddi ndi Alla noddiri en fii mun ka kammu ndin rewrude e Iisaa Almasiihu on.
Enen mokobaa…ďe e gom…óinal …ďen fow, he…ďen sifa ngoo miijo. Si tawii non e to…ď…ďe goo hi…óon mari miijooji luutondir…ói e …óun…óoo, haray Alla …ďanginanay on fii nden to…ď…ďere …óon.
Ko woni tun, …ďay en ardii haa …óoo, yaaden yaadu wooturu.
Wonee …≤emboo…ďe lan, yo musi…ď…ďe. ∆≥etton misal e …ďen wuurir…ďe wano men wuuriri non.
No woodi …óuu…óu…ďe wonir…ďe ngayngu *leggal altindiraangal Almasiihu on ngal. Mi wowlanii on …óun soono woo. Jooni kadi, mi…óo wowlude …óun e hoore mi…óo wulla.
Sakkitoode ma…ď…ďe nden ko halkagol, ko deedi ma…ď…ďe …óin woni alla ma…ď…ďe on, hi…ďe wa…ói darja ma…ď…ďe on ka hersinta …ďe, awa kadi ko fii piiji oo aduna tun …ďe miijotoo.
Enen, ko en jeyaa…ďe ka aljanna ka Dandoowo mo habbor…óen hawjere on iwata ton, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on,
on wayliroyoowo …ďalli men lo'u…ói …óin bawgal makko waawayngal yankingol kala huunde e ley makko ngal, o nandintina …ói e …ďandu makko darjundu ndun.
Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ď…ďe an yi…óaa…ďe, …ďe mi wul…óaa fota, onon …ďe tawata ko weltaare an e *meetelol an, tabitiree nii, …≤ii…ďon e Joomiraa…óo on, yo yi…ď…ďe an.
Mi torike Afuudiyata e Sinitiiki, mi jeeji, yo …ďe wa…óu sabu Joomiraa…óo on …ďe nantondira.

An men, yo mo mi gollidata, sella-findeejo, mi torike ma wallitagol …ďee rew…ďe wallu…ďe lan tippirde fii yottingol Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on, wondude e Akilimandu e …ďeya …ďe mi gollidata fow, …ďe tawata in…óe mun no windii ka deftere ngurndan.
Weltee saa'i woo e nder humondiral mon e Joomiraa…óo on, mi…óo fillitaade kadi, weltee!
Yo yim…ďe …ďen fow andu newaare mon nden, ko fii Joomiraa…óo on ko ∆Āadii…óo.
Wota on aanu huunde, kono e kala huunde wee…ďitiranee Alla faaleeji mon …óin toragol mo, landoo mo ballal, weltanoo mo.
∆äun, …ďuttu ngu Alla ye…óata, fe∆ī∆īitungu kala faamu ngun, hiway …ďer…óe mon …óen e miijooji mon …óin e nder humondiral mon e Iisaa Almasiihu on.

Ko heddii kon, yo musi…ď…ďe an, kala ko tawata ko goonga, kala ko wondi e teddungal, kala ko feewi, kala ko laa…ďi, kala ko labaa, kala ko handi e kuljeede, kala ko …ďuri mo∆ī∆īude, e kala ko handi e mantoore, yo …óun wonan miijo mon ngon keyee.
Awa, ko andir…óon mi kon, e ko he…ďir…óon mi kon, e ko nanu…óon mi…óo wowla kon, e ko yi'u…óon mi…óo wa…óa kon, wa…óee …óun. ∆äun, Alla Jom …ďuttu on wonday e mon.
Mi…óo weltanii Joomiraa…óo on fota, sabu ko wurnitu…óon nafa mon fii an kon. Hari hi…óon wondi e on nafa, kono hari feere nden no Ňčakkiri on.
Wonaa fii mi…óo Ňčakkiraa wa…ói si mi wowli …óun, ko fii mi ekkitike yondinorgol no mi fewndori non.

Mi…óo waawi wuurude e nder …ďillaare, wano tawiri non kadi mi…óo waawi wuurude e nder maral. E …ói fow e hen fow mi ekkitike gundoo weltagol, woni e nder haarannde maa e heege, woni e nder maral maa e Ňčakkireede.
Mi waawii fow sabu on Tii…óin…óo lan.
Kono on wa…óii ko mo∆ī∆īi tawdegol mon e tampereeji an …óin.

Onon …ďe Filipii …ďen tigi hi…óon andi, ka fu…ó…óoode waajagol an fii Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on ka mon, …ďay mi iwii Masedonii, hay *moftal gootal wallindiraali e an ka baŇčŇče jonnugol e hendagol si wonaa ngal mon ngal.
Ko fii, fewndo mi wonnoo ka saare Tesalonii, on neldanno …ďuri nde wootere ko mi handi e mun.
Hinaa fii ko dokkal mi wonnoo …óa…ď…ďude, kono ko mi woni …óa…ď…ďude ko yo tono golle mon …óen …ďeydo.

Mi hendike ko neldu…óon mi kon e juu…óe Epafruuditu. Jooni mi he…ďii ko mi handi e mun kon haa fe∆ī∆īitii. Dokkal mon ngal no wa'i wa angiri ndi urngol mo∆ī∆īol, wa sadaka mo Alla ja…ďi, hara ko waalanii…óo mo.
Immorde e ngalu e darja Alla an on sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, o okkay on kala ko handu…óon.
Yo mangural wonan Alla, Baaba men, haa poomaa. Aamiina!
Salminanee lan kala aaden Alla humondir…óo e Iisaa Almasiihu on. Musi…ď…ďe …ďe mi wondi …ďen salminii on.
Yim…ďe Alla …ďen fow salminii on, tentinii …ďee jeyaa…ďe e nduu suudu oo lan…óo maw…óo Roomu on.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on wonu e …ďer…óe mon.
Immorde e an min Puulusa, mo Alla hoddiri wonugol *sahaabaajo Iisaa Almasiihu on, wondude e oo musi…ó…óo men wi'etee…óo Timotee,
haa e mon onon, …ďee musi…ď…ďe amen humondir…ďe e *Almasiihu on, gom…óin…ďe won…ďe Koloosi, sella-findee…ďe. Yo mo∆ī∆īere e …ďuttu wonan on immorde e Alla Baaba men.
Me…óen duumi e jarnugol Alla, on Ben Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, e nder ko men torantoo on kon.
Ko fii men nanii fii ko gom…óin…óon Iisaa Almasiihu on kon no wowlee, e giggol ngol yi…óu…óon yim…ďe Alla …ďen fow ngol,
sabu tama'u mo marana…óon on ka kammu, on mo daaluyee goongaajo on andinnoo on fii mun, …óun ko Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo
hewtu…óo ka mon on. Ko wano o woni wa…óirde batte, o laya e aduna on fow non, ko wano non o woni wa…óirde batte e hakkunde mon gila …≤ande nanu…óon andu…óon mo∆ī∆īere Alla nden e nder goonga on,
…ďawto Epafaraasi, oo gi…óo amen e gollidoowo e amen, hewtinde on …óii janndeeji. Himo wonani on golloowo sella-findeejo e telen-ma Almasiihu on,
awa kadi o …ďanginanii men fii giggol ngol Ruuhu Allaahu on wa…ói e mon ngol.

Ko …óun wa…ói, menen kadi, gila …≤ande men humpitii …óun, me…óen duumii e toranagol on Alla, e toragol yo on hebbine gandal fii faale makko on, wondude e kala faamu e hakkil iwru…óun e Ruuhu Allaahu on,
fii no wuuriron noone no hawrirani Joomiraa…óo on, e no welira mo e kala noone, ngurn…óan mon …óan rima kala noone kuu…óe mo∆ī∆īe, …ďeydo…óon e andugol Alla,
bawgal mangu makko ngun tii…óina on e kala huunde, fii no woniron Ňča…≤…≤ii…ďe e mu…≤…≤ii…ďe,
e hoore hi…óon jarnira Baabaajo on weltaare, on Wawnu…óo on he…ďugol ge…ďal ka ndondi ndi o marani gom…óin…ďe …ďen ka laamateeri ndaygu,
on Jattin…óo en mbawdi ni…ďe …óen, o addii en ka laamateeri ∆Āi…ó…óo makko yi…óaa…óo on,
on mo he…ďir…óen cottudi wonkii e yaafuyee junuubaaji.
Ko on ∆Āi…ó…óo woni mbaadi Alla mo yi'otaako on, ko kanko woni afo e hoore kala ko tagaa.
Ko fii ko e makko kala huunde tagiraa ka kammu e ka hoore leydi, ko yi'otoo e ko yi'otaako, …óun ko julle laamu e laamuuji e hooreyaagal e baw…óe, fow ko e makko tagiraa, e fii makko kadi tagiraa.
Ko kanko adii kala huunde, e kala huunde ko e makko woniri.
Ko kanko woni hoore …ďandu ndun, …óun ko *moftal ngal. Ko kanko woni Fu…ó…óoode nden, e adaa…óo immintineede e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen, fii no o wonira Arano e …ói fow.
Ko fii welii Alla ka ko woni e Alla kon fow wona e Almasiihu on,
e mo∆ī∆īintinirgol fow e makko kanko tigi, ko woni ka hoore leydi kon e ko woni ka kammu kon, e nder wa…óugol …ďuttu rewrude e ∆īii∆īan makko hibbaa…óan …óan ka hoore *leggal makko altindiraangal.
Onon kadi, …ďee wo…ó…óitinoo…ďe Alla e ay…ďe makko sabu miijooji mon …óin e kuu…óe mon bon…óe …óen,
jooni non ko mayde …ďandu makko ndun o mo∆ī∆īintiniri hakkunde mon e makko, fii no laatoron yeeso makko kanko Alla laa…ďu…ďe, …ďe aldaa e ella e …ďe felnaaki,

kono non, ko si tawii hi…óon duumii e gom…óinal ngal, hi…óon tabintinaa, …≤ii…ďinaa e maggal, hara on wo…ó…óitaaki tama'u mo he…ďir…óon Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo mo nanu…óon on. On Kibaaru fe…≤…≤inanaa…óo kala tagaa…óo ka ley kammu, ko on min Puulusa mi wonti kurkaadu mun.
Jooni mi…óo weltii e nder tampereeji an …óin fii mon. Ko fii, e an min, mi timminirii …ďandu an ndun ko Ňčakkunoo e tampereeji Almasiihu on, fii …ďandu makko ndun, ndun-le ko moftal ngal.
Ko ngal moftal mi wonani kurkaadu, wano Alla nelirimmi non fii fe…≤…≤inangol on daaluyee makko on e ko woni e mun kon fow,
…óun ko on gundoo nee…ďunoo…óo suu…óaade e nder jamaanuuji …óin fow, kono jooni o fe…≤…≤inanaama laa…ďu…ďe makko …ďen,
…ďen …ďe Alla faalaa andinde ko hon…óun woni ngalu mangu on gundoo e hakkunde le∆ī∆īi …óin fow. Ko woni on gundoo: Almasiihu on no e mon, ko …óun woni tama'u mangu ngun.
Ko on men woni fe…≤…≤inde fii mun e nder hajagol, janna kala ne…ó…óo e dow faamu timmungu, fii no kala ne…ó…óo laatora mokobaa e nder humondiral e Almasiihu on.
Ko …óun mi woni gollande, e nder tippirgol e doole makko won…óe gollude e an no tii…óiri …óen.
Awa, mi faalaa yo on andu ko tippiro hongo mi rondii fii mon, onon e …ďee …ďe Laa'udiisa e …ďe yi'aali lan haa hande …ďen.

∆äun ko fii no …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe …óen wakkilora, e no …ďe tamondirira e nder giggol, …ďe he…ďa kala ko woni e pellital heewungal iwrungal e faamu, fii andugol gundoo Alla on, …óun ko *Almasiihu on tigi,
on mo ngaluuji faamu ngun e gandal ngal fow suu…óii e mun.
Ko mi wi'iri …óun, ko fii wota hay gooto faljinir on yewtereeji wel…ói.

Ko fii, si tawii mi tawdaaka e mon e …ďandu, kono haray mi…óo wondi e mon ka …ďernde, mi…óo weltori yi'ugol nanondiral yaadungal wongal hakkunde mon ngal, e tii…óeendi gom…óinal mon ngal e telen-ma Almasiihu on.
Nde tawnoo on ja…ďii Iisaa Almasiihu on wona Joomi mon, awa duumee e humagol e makko.
Iree …óa…ói mon …óin e didoodi mon ndin e makko, tabiton e nder gom…óinal ngal wano jannira…óon non, wonon heewu…ďe jarnugol.
Reenee, wota hay gooto e mon hiile, nangiree faamu ne…ó…óanke e …óayni meereeji immorde e aadaaji ne…ó…óanke e mbawdiiji adunayankeeji, …ói tawata wonaa e Almasiihu on iwri.
Ko fii allankaaku Alla ngun fow no e ne…ó…óankaaku Almasiihu on,
awa kadi on wonii timmu…ďe e kala huunde e nder yu…ď…ďondiral mon e makko, …óun ko on Won…óo yeesoojo kala laamu e kala bawgal.
Ko e nder humondiral mon e makko kadi sunninira…óon *sunninannde nde wa…óiraaka juu…óe ne…ó…óanke, kono hara ko sunninannde nde Almasiihu on wa…ói nden, …óun ko …ďoorugol …ďandu junuubankeeru ndun.
On surridaama e makko, e nder *looteede maande kisiyee, on immintinidaama e makko sabu ko gom…óin…óon bawgal Alla ngal kon, on Immintin…óo mo e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen.
Onon, …ďe tawata maayiino sabu bonnereeji mon e sabu angal sunninegol mon, kanko Alla o wurnitidii on e Almasiihu on. O yaafanike en bonnereeji men …óin fow.
O montii derol …≤amaale windanoongol e hoore men ngol, ngol ngol tawata yamirooje mun no Ňčannani en, o ittiri ngol fempugol ngol ka *leggal altindiraangal.
O …ďoorii laamuuji …óin e baw…óe …óen, o wee…ďitii …óe e kene e yeeso fow e nder foolirgol …óe leggal altindiraangal ngal.
Awa ko …óun wa…ói, wota gooto …≤aawu on fii ko …≤aamoton kon e ko yaroton kon, maa fii juldeere, maa lewru heyru, maa …≤alaa…óe fowtetee…óe e mun …óen.
∆äun fow ko …óowdi piiji aroyay…ói …óin, kono haqiiqa on ko …ói Almasiihu on …óin.

Wota on ja…ďu …ďen yim…ďe yi…óu…ďe yankinorde tampingol …ďandu ndun e rewugol malaa'ika hippoo on mbuu…≤aari mon ndin. Sifa …ďen yim…ďe ko hoolor…ďe koy…ói mun. Hi…ďe hebbinora mawnintinaare nde alaa nafa, immorde e miijooji ne…ó…óanke,
edii …ďe humaade e Hooreejo on, on mo …ďandu ndun fow jogondiriri sabu mun, fottiri jokke …óen e …óa…ói …óin, mawni no Alla yi…óiri non.
Nde tawnoo on maayidiino e Almasiihu on, on sertii e …óii mbawdiiji adunayankeeji, ko hon…óun ja…ďanton …ďe fawa on …óii aadaaji, wa si tawii hi…óon wuurani aduna,
…óun ko ¬ęwota a meemu …óun…óoo!¬Ľ, ¬ęwota a mettu …óun…óaa!¬Ľ, ¬ęwota a foppo …óuntoo!¬Ľ
∆äii aadaaji fow si huutoraama ko …ói bontay…ói, …ďay ko …ói yamirooje e janndeeji ne…ó…óanke.
Pellet, ko goonga, …óin aadaaji no nandi e faamu, …ďay hi…ói catii e dewal anniyaangal immorde e ne…ó…óanke, e yankinaare e yangugol …ďandu, kono …ói alanaa ne…ó…óanke no o wawtora hoore makko.
∆Āay non on wurnitidaama e *Almasiihu on, haray …óa…ď…ďee piiji won…ói ka dow …óin, ka Almasiihu on joo…óori ka sengo …≤aamo Alla ton.
Miijee fii ko woni ka dow kon, hara hinaa fii ko woni ka hoore leydi kon.
Ko fii on maayii, ngurndan mon …óan no suu…óii e Almasiihu on ka Alla.
Awa, nde Almasiihu on, …óun ko ngurndan mon …óan, fee…≤iti, haray on fee…≤iday e makko ka mangural.
Awa waree piiji adunayankeeji won…ói e mon …óin, …óun ko wano: jinaa e angal laa…ďal e himmeeji e faaleeji bon…ói e miile, (ko fii miile ko rewugol sanamu).
Ko …óun addata tikkere Alla nden e hoore murtu…ďe …ďen.
Ko nii wuurirno…óon oya tuma, wa fewndo junuubu ardinoo ngurndan mon …óan.
Kono jooni non, onon kadi bugitee …óun fow: …óun ko tikkere nden e monee on e hun∆īeendi ndin e hoyre nden e haalaaji bon…ói yaltaynoo…ói e kundule mon …óin.
Wota on fenindiran, onon …ďee …ďortii…ďe tagu hinngu ngun e kuu…óe mun,
…ďornii tagu hesu hey…óintinaangu e noone mbaadi on Tagu…óo ngu, fii no waawiron mo andude haa timma.
∆äon alaa *Gereekiyankeejo maa *Yahuudiyankeejo, maa sunninaa…óo maa mo sunninaaka, maa le…≤ol ngol finaa maa le…≤ol kaana-jikkuwol, maa maccu…óo maa dimo, kono ko Almasiihu on woni fow, woni e fow.
∆Āay ko on su…ďaa…ďe Alla, laa…ďu…ďe, e yi…óaa…ďe makko, …ďornee yurmeende tii…óunde e mo∆ī∆īuki e yankinaare e newaare e yondinaare.
Mu…≤…≤ondiranee, yaafondiron si tawii go…ó…óo no mari ko wullitoo e hoore oya. Wano Almasiihu on yaaforani on non, onon kadi wa…óiree wano non.
Kono, e hoore …óun…óoo fow, …ďornee giggol, sabu ko ngol yu…ď…ďindirta haa timma.
Yo …ďuttu Almasiihu ngu noddira…óon fii wonugol …ďandu wooturu ngun ardo …ďer…óe mon …óen. Wonee anditanoo…ďe.

Yo kongol Almasiihu on hebbin …ďer…óe mon …óen. Jannindiree, hajondiron e dow faamu fow e nder ko beytiranton Alla beyti Zabuura e jaarooje e beyti hormor…ói, yettiron Alla beytirangol mo …ďer…óe mon …óen fow.
Kala ko wa…óoton, e kongol maa e kuugal, wa…óee fow e innde Iisaa Joomi on, e jarnirgol mo Alla Baabaajo on.
Rew…ďe, mo kala e mon, yo yankinano moodi mun, wano hawrirani Joomiraa…óo on non.
Onon kadi wor…ďe, mo kala e mon yo yi…óu …ďeyngu mun, hara on hun∆īanaali …ďe.
Onon kadi fay…ďe, …óoftee maw…ďe mon …ďen e …ói fow, ko fii …óun no wela Joomiraa…óo on.
Onon kadi baabiraa…ďe, wota on mettin …ďer…óe fay…ďe mon …ďen, fii wota …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe maayu.

Onon kadi yo jiyaa…ďe, …óoftee jey…ďe on jeyal adunayankewal …ďen e …ói fow, hara hinaa non e gite ma…ď…ďe tun, wa si tawii on …óa…ď…ďay woni no yim…ďe …ďen yi…óira on, kono hara ko …ďernde laa…ďunde e nder kulol Joomiraa…óo on.
Kala ko wa…óoton, wa…óiree …óun ittiri wonkii mon kin fow, wa si tawii ko Joomiraa…óo on won…óon wa…óande, hara hinaa yim…ďe …ďen,
e hoore andugol mon on he…ďiray Joomiraa…óo on ndondi wa ngeenaari. Ko Almasiihu Joomi on won…óon kurkanaade.
Ko fii kala on wa…óu…óo ko boni, o hettay njoddi bonnere makko nden, awa kadi gi…óaale alaa ton.
Onon kadi yo jey…ďe, jogoree jiyaa…ďe mon …ďen no feewiri e no nun…óiri, e hoore andugol wonde onon kadi hi…óon mari Jey…óo on ka kammu.
Duumee e toragol Alla, hakkilanon e …óun e dow yettugol mo.
Torano…óon men kadi, fii yo Alla udditan kongu…ói amen …óin dambugal fii no men waawira fe…≤…≤inirde goonga luggu…óo *Almasiihu on, on goonga mo mi jolkaa fii mun,
e no mi yewtira fii on goonga no laa…ďiri, wano haaniranimmi non.
E telen-ma …ďe gom…óinaa …ďen, wondiree faamu, hara on accaali fajuhun woo fe∆ī∆īira on.
Yo taw soono woo kongu…ói mon …óin ko wel…ói, hara hi…ói weliri wa lan…óan, fii no andiron ko honno jaaborton mo kala.
Tikiiki, oo musi…ó…óo an yi…óaa…óo, golloowo holnii…óo mo mi kurkodata fii golle Joomiraa…óo on, o andinoyay on fow fii no mi fewndori.
Ko wa…ói si mi immini mo haa e mon, ko fii no andiron no men fewndori, e fii yo o wakkilin …ďer…óe mon …óen.
Mi immindinanii on mo e oo musi…ó…óo yi…óaa…óo sella-findeejo wi'etee…óo Onesiima, on ko mo mon. ∆Āe andinoyay on ko woni fe∆ī∆īude gaa kon fow.
Oo wondi…ó…óo an e joge wi'etee…óo Aristarke salminii on, wondude e Markuusa, oo den…óiraawo Barnabaasi, on mo tindinana…óon fii mun. Si o hewtoyii ka mon, wernee mo mo∆ī∆īa.
Iisaa jammaa…óo Yustuusa kadi salminii on. E nder le…≤ol *Yahuuda ngol, ko …ďee …óoo tun woni gollidude e an fii *laamateeri Alla ndin, …ďe woni wakkilin…ďe lan.

Oo kurkaadu Iisaa Almasiihu on wi'etee…óo Epafaraasi salminii on, on ko mo mon. Himo duumii e tippiro fii mon e nder torndeeji makko …óin, fii no tabitiron wa mokobaa…ďe, heewu…ďe hoolaare e telen-ma faale Alla on fow.
Mi…óo seeditanii mo …óun, wonde o yanganike on fota, e fii …ďee …ďe Laa'udiisa e fii …ďee …ďe Hiirapoliisa.
Awa kadi, oo …≤awndoowo yi…óaa…óo wi'etee…óo Luuka, wondude e Demaasi, salminii on.
Salminanee lan musi…ď…ďe won…ďe Laa'udiisa …ďen, ka…≤un e oo debbo wi'etee…óo Nimfaasi, e *moftal wongal ka suudu makko ngal.

Onon kadi on …≤embii men, on …≤embii Joomi on. Hay e nder tampereeji mon …óuu…óu…ói …óin, on ja…ďirii daaluyee on weltaare iwrunde e Ruuhu Senii…óo on.

No sifeede fii ja…ď…ďo ngo men ja…ď…ďaa ka mon ngon, e ko honno tuubiran…óon Alla, yilti…óon e …ďaawo sanamuuji fii rewugol Alla Wuuru…óo Goongaajo on,
e fii habbagol ka kammuuli on ∆Āi…ó…óo makko, mo o immintini e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen, …óun ko Iisaa, on Jattin…óo en tikkere aroyaynde nden.

kono …ďay Alla tawii me…óen foddi e halfineede Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on, ko …óun wa…ói si men yewtirtaa no welirta yim…ďe …ďen, kono ko no welirta Alla, on ndarndotoo…óo …ďer…óe amen …óen.

Onon on anditii, yo musi…ď…ďe, golle amen …óen e yangi amen kin fewndo men fe…≤…≤inannoo on Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo Alla on, men gollirno jemma e …≤alorma, fii wota men wonan hay gooto e mon dongal.

E hino ko men duumori e jarnugol Alla kon: e nder ja…ďugol mon daaluyee mo men fe…≤…≤inannoo on on, on ja…ďiraano mo wa iwru…óo e ne…ó…óanke, kono on ja…ďirno mo wa daaluyee Alla, no o woniri haqiiqa non, ko on daaluyee woni gollude e mon onon gom…óin…ďe …ďen.

On …ďanginno …óun, yo musi…ď…ďe, e nder …≤embugol mon *mofte Alla won…óe ka diiwal Yahuuda …óen, …óe tawata ko Iisaa Almasiihu on jeyi, ko fii onon kadi on tampuno e juu…óe …≤okondoo…ďe mon …ďen sifa tampereeji …ói *Yahuudiyankee…ďe …ďen tampinnoo …óen mofte …óin.
Ko …ďen wari Iisaa Joomi on, wari annabaa…ďe …ďen, cukkii men, …óun ko …ďen …ďe welataa Alla, won…ďe ay…ďe yim…ďe …ďen fow.
Hi…ďe fanni men yewtugol …ďe wonaa Yahuudiyanke …ďen fii wota …ďen dande, ko nii …ďe jokkiri hebbingol junuubaaji ma…ď…ďe …óin. Kono tikkere Alla nden sakkitori nangugol …ďe.
Menen, telen-ma amen yo musi…ď…ďe, e nder ko men seedunoo e mon kon e nder saa'ihun e …ďandu, kono hinaa e …ďernde, hakkee ko men marnoo faale tii…óu…óo fii yi'itugol on, men etino fii …óun fota.
Ko …óun wa…ói si men faalano yahude ka mon, tentinii min Puulusa, mi etino …óun …ďuri nde wootere. Kono Ibuliisa hanni men.
E hara hinaa onon woni tama'u amen on e weltaare amen nden e *meetelol darja amen on yeeso Iisaa Joomi men on …≤ande ardu makko ndun?
Hiiyii, ko onon woni darja amen on e weltaare amen nden!
Ko …óun wa…ói si men wawtaano hande kadi habbagol ko …ďuri nii, men tawi no …ďurani men ka men wona menen tun ka saare Atiina,

men imminana on oo musi…ó…óo amen innetee…óo Timotee, on wondi…ó…óo amen e nder golle Alla …óen e hoore fe…≤…≤ingol Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo *Almasiihu on. Men fawi mo tii…óingol on e wakkilingol on ka gom…óinal mon,
fii wota hay gooto dilline e nder tampereeji fewndii…ói …óin. Ko fii onon tigi hi…óon andi ko …óun muuyana…óen.
Fewndo ko men wonnoo takko mon, men wowlanayno on wonde en he…ďay satteendeeji, ko …óun woni ko hewti, hi…óon andi.

Ko …óun wa…ói, …ďay mi waawataano habbaade hande kadi, mi imminii Timotee fii humpitagol gom…óinal mon ngal, mi…óo hulunoo wota taw no gasa hara jarribotoo…óo on faljinii on, tawa golle amen …óen wonii meere.

Awa Timotee ko e hewtitude woni ka amen iwrude ka mon, o addoranii men kibaaru mo∆ī∆īo fii gom…óinal mon ngal e giggol mon ngol. O innii men, tigi-tigi on, hi…óon joganii men maande mo∆ī∆īere, awa kadi hi…óon himmani yi'ugol men, wano men himmirani yi'ugol on non.
E hoore …óun, e nder satteende amen nden fow e tampere amen nden, yo musi…ď…ďe, men wakkilinaama sabu gom…óinal mon ngal.
Jooni non hi…óen wuuri, ko fii hi…óon tabiti few e Joomiraa…óo on.
E hara ko honno men waawata jarnirde Alla fii mon, fii ndee weltaare nde weltin…óon men yeeso makko fow?
Ko …óun wa…ói, jemma e …≤alorma me…óen toraade mo e nder tentingol fii yo o newnan men yi'itugol on, timmintina ko Ňčakki e gom…óinal mon ngal kon.
Yo Alla Ben men on tigi, e Iisaa Joomi men on, udditan men laawol haa ka mon.
Awa kadi yo Joomiraa…óo on hebbin giggol hakkundeeji mon haa fe∆ī∆īita, e telen-ma yim…ďe …ďen fow, hara kadi ko sifa giggol ngol men joganii on ngol.
Yo o tabintinir nii …ďer…óe mon …óen fii no woniron laa…ďu…ďe e …ďe felnaaki yeeso Alla Baabaajo men on, ka …≤alaande nde Iisaa Joomi men on aroyta e mun wondude e laa…ďu…ďe mun …ďen fow.

Ka rawnoode, yo musi…ď…ďe, on andirii men ko honno gasirton wonirde fii no weliron Alla, e hin-le ko non wonir…óon. Jooni men torike on, men jeejii, sabu humondiral men e Iisaa Joomi on, …ďeydee yaarude yeeso soono woo e …óen baŇčŇče.
Ko fii hi…óon andi janndeeji …ói men janni on …óin immorde e Iisaa Joomi on.
Ko Alla faalaa ko yo on laato laa…ďu…ďe, e fii yo on wo…ó…óito jinaa,
e yo mo kala e mon waawu jogitaade …ďandu mun ndun e nder laa…ďal e teddungal,
e …ďaawo accugol faaleeji wonkii foola …óun, wano …ďe gom…óinaa andaa Alla …ďen gerdata non.
E telen-ma …óun, wota hay gooto bonnu musi…ó…óo mun maa huutora mo ∆īoyre, ko fii Joomiraa…óo on yo…ďay sifa …óin noone ellaaji fow. Hari men wowlaniino on …óun, men hajike on e …óun.
Ko fii Alla noddiraali en wuurirgol angal laa…ďal, kono ko wuurirgol laa…ďal.
Ko …óun wa…ói, on bugitii…óo ngal gandal, haray hinaa ne…ó…óo o bugitii, kono ko Alla, on Ye…óu…óo on *Ruuhu mun Senii…óo on.
E telen-ma giggol si…ó…óankaaku musi…ď…ďe gom…óin…ďe …ďen, on hatonjinaa e windaneede fii …óun, ko fii Alla tigi wawnii on yi…óindirgol.
Ko …óun kadi won…óon wa…óude e fee musi…ď…ďe men …ďen fow e nder Masedonii no didori, kono men wakkilinii on, yo musi…ď…ďe, …ďeydugol kadi.
Himmanon wuurirgol …ďuttu, jokkon haajuuji mon …óin tigi, golliron juu…óe mon …óen, wano men yamiriri on non.
∆äun ko fii no woniron feewu…ďe e telen-ma …ďe gom…óinaa …ďen, hara on wonataa dongal hay gooto.
Men faalaaka, yo musi…ď…ďe, yo on ronku andude fii may…ďe …ďen, fii wota on he…ďu sokola, wano …ďeya …ďe alaa tama'u …ďen.
Ko …óun wa…ói, …ďay hi…óen gom…óini Iisaa maayii, awa kadi o immintinaama, hi…óen gom…óini kadi Alla artiray maayu…ďe no gom…óini Iisaa …ďen wondude e makko.
Awa e hino ko men wi'ata on, …óun non ko e kongol Joomi on iwri: enen wur…ďe …ďen, luttitu…ďe haa …≤ande ardu Joomi on, en adotaako may…ďe …ďen artireede.
Ko fii, Joomi on tigi iwray ka kammu, tippoda e yamiroore ewnaande e hawa malaa'ikaajo maw…óo e hito *liital Alla ngal. Onsay ko maayu…ďe no gom…óini *Almasiihu on …ďen adetee immintineede.
∆Āawto …óun, enen wur…ďe luttitay…ďe …ďen, en ∆īettidete e ma…ď…ďe ka nder duule, fii fottoygol e Joomi on ka weeyo. Onsay en wonday e Joomi on haa poomaa.
Awa wakkilindiree rewrude e …óii kongu…ói.
Fii …≤alaa…óe …óen e saa'iiji …óin, on hatonjinaa e windaneede fii …óun, yo musi…ď…ďe.
Ko fii onon tigi hi…óon andi few …≤alaande Joomi on arday wa nde ngujjo no ara jemma.
Nde yim…ďe wi'i: ¬ę∆Āuttu ngun tabitii, tawa kadi masiibo alaa!¬Ľ, ko onsay halakuyee on arata he…≤a, yana e ma…ď…ďe wa nde Ňčata fi…ói debbo reeduujo, hara …ďe da…óataa-le few.
Kono onon, yo musi…ď…ďe, on alaa e nder niwre nden haa ka nden …≤alaande juhira on wa ngujjo.
On fow ko on …ďi…ď…ďe ndaygu ngun e …ďi…ď…ďe …≤alorma on. Hinaa en …ďe jemma on maa niwre nden.
Awa, wota en …óaanor wa …ďeya, kono wattanen yiila, wonen hakkilan…ďe.
∆äaanotoo…ďe …ďen …óaanoto jemma, mandiloo…ďe …ďen ko jemma mandilirta.
Kono enen yim…ďe …≤alorma …ďen, wonen hakkilan…ďe, …ďorno…óen hiwitorgo gom…óinal ngal e giggol ngol, hippo…óen kunnawal tama'u kisiyee on.
Ko fii Alla muuyanaali en tikkere makko nden, kono ko fii no he…ďiren kisiyee rewrude e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on,
on may…óo fii men, fii, woni hi…óen …óaanii, woni en …óaanaaki, no wuuridiren e makko.
Awa, wakkilindiree, tii…óindiron, wano won…óon warrude non fewndo …óoo.
Men torike on, yo musi…ď…ďe, anditanee won…ďe gollude hakkunde mon …ďen, …ďen …ďe Joomiraa…óo on su…ďii ko ardoo on, hajoo on.
Jogano…óon …ďe teddungal tii…óungal e giggol, sabu kuu…óe ma…ď…ďe …óen. Yo …ďuttu wonu hakkunde mon.
Men yamirii on, yo musi…ď…ďe, hajee puy…ďe …ďen, wakkilinon aamitu…ďe …ďen, wallito…óon lo'u…ďe …ďen, wonon mu…≤…≤ii…ďe e fee won…óo woo.
Wattanon yiila fii wota hay gooto yo…ďir bone bone, kono wa…óee soono woo ko mo∆ī∆īi, woni non ko e hakkunde mon, woni e telen-ma won…óo woo.
Wonee saa'i kala weltii…ďe,
duumo…óon e toragol,
jarnee Alla e fee kala ko woni, ko fii ko …óun woni faale Alla on fii mon, onon …ďee humondir…ďe e Iisaa Almasiihu on.
Wota on faa…óinan Ruuhu Allaahu on.
Wota on hayfin kongu…ói …ói Alla longini gom…óin…ďe …ďen,
kono taskee kala huunde, jogito…óon ko mo∆ī∆īi kon.
Reeno…óon e bone, noone woo no o wa'i.

Yo Alla Jom ∆Āuttu on wa…óu on yim…ďe makko ko timmi, e yo o reenu on e baŇčŇčeeji …óin fow, …óun ko ruuhu mon on e wonkii mon kin e …ďandu mon ndun, fii wota on wonu felnii…ďe …≤ande ardu Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on.
Ko fii on Noddu…óo on ko Sella-Findeejo, awa kadi ko on woni Timminoyoowo …óun fow.
Musi…ď…ďe, awa toranee men menen kadi.
Salminiree musi…ď…ďe …ďen fow hirbondiral laa…ďungal.
Mi torike on e innde Joomi on: yo musi…ď…ďe …ďen fow jangu nduu …ďatakuru.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on wonu e mon.
Immorde e an min Puulusa, wondude e Silaasi e Timotee, haa e ngal *moftal wongal Tesalonii humondirngal e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on:
yo mo∆ī∆īere e …ďuttu wonan on immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on.
Me…óen haani, yo musi…ď…ďe, duumaade e jarnugol Alla fii mon, …óun-le ko ko feewi, ko fii gom…óinal mon ngal no …ďeydaade, awa kadi giggol ngol yi…óindir…óon ngol ko e …ďeydaade tun woni.
E hoore …óun, me…óen mantorde on e nder mofte Alla …óen, sabu Ňča…≤…≤aare mon nden e gom…óinal mon ngal e nder cukkan…óe …óe cukka…óon …óen fow e satteendeeji …ói wakkili…óon …óin.
Awa, ko …óun…óoo woni seedee …≤aawoore Alla feewunde nden, fii no woniron rin…óan…ďe *laamu Alla ngu won…óon tampande ngun.
Ko fii no feewi yeeso Alla ka o yottorana on …ďee won…ďe on tampinde tampere,
e ka o ye…óa on …ďuttu, onon tampinaa…ďe …ďen, wondude e amen, nde Iisaa Joomi on fee…≤oyi ka kammu, wondude e malaa'ikaa…ďe dolnu…ďe …ďen
e hakkunde joyngol yiite, fii yaggingol …ďe andaa Alla …ďen e …ďe …óoftanooki Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo Iisaa Joomi men on.
∆Āe lettiree halakuyee poomayankeejo, …ďe wo…ó…óitoo Joomi on e mangu bawgal makko ngal
nde o aroyi e nden …≤alaande, fii yo o darjine immorde e laa…ďu…ďe makko …ďen, o mugina gom…óin…ďe …ďen fow. Onon kadi, on gom…óinii ko men seeditanii on kon.

Ko …óun wa…ói, me…óen duumaade e toranagol on, fii no Alla men on wa…óira on rin…óan…ďe ngurndan …óan o noddiri on …óan, e no o laatinira e mon kala e…ď…ďooje mo∆ī∆īe e kuu…óe gom…óinal mon ngal tippude e bawgal makko ngal,
fii no innde Iisaa Joomi men on mawniniree e mon, e no onon kadi mawninire…óon e makko, sabu sulfu Alla men on e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on.
Fii ardu Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on, e mottondiral men ngal e makko, men torike on, yo musi…ď…ďe,
wota on ja…ďu …ďer…óe mon yaawee jii…ďeede, maa aaninire…óon wi'ugol …≤alaande Joomi on hewtii. Hay si go…ó…óo wi'ii on ko Alla longini men maa ko nelal maa ko …ďatakuru ko iwri e amen, wota on hulu.
Wota hay gooto faljinir on noone woo, ko fii nden …≤alaande arataa ado murtaldu ndun wa…óude, e fee…≤ugol aaden bon…óo on, on muuyanaa…óo hayrugol,
…óun ko on dartotoo…óo immoo daroo e hoore kala ko ne…ó…óanke inni ko alla e hoore kala ko rewetee, o yaha haa o joo…óoyoo ka juulirde Alla mawnde, o wi'itoo kanko tigi Alla.
On anditaali mi…óo wowlanaynoo on …óun, wa fewndo ko mi wondi e mon?
Jooni non hi…óon andi tigi ko tongi mo, fii yo o fee…≤u e saa'i makko on,
ko fii fewndo …óoo, doole bon…óe suu…óii…óe …óen no gollude, ko woni tun fewndo …óoo go…ó…óo no ha…ói …óe taho haa o dira.
Ko onsay non aaden bon…óo on fee…≤ata. Iisaa Joomi on muliray mo wuttugol, o muncira mo jalbeendi ardu makko ndun kanko Iisaa.

o huutoray kala noone bone fii faayingol won…ďe mulude …ďen, …ďay …ďe ja…ďaali yi…óude goonga on fii no …ďe dandiree.
Ko …óun wa…ói si Alla kadi accidi …ďe e doole …óaynooje fii no …ďe gom…óinira fenaande nden,
fii no yi…óu…ďe angal peewal ngal, gom…óinaali goonga on …ďen …≤aawiree.

Telen-ma amen menen, yo musi…ď…ďe …ďe Joomiraa…óo on yi…ói, me…óen haani duumaade e jarnugol Alla fii mon, ko fii Allaahu on su…ďino on gila ka fu…ó…óoode fii kisiyee on, e hoore *la…ď…ďinirgol on Ruuhu Allaahu on e gom…óingol goonga on.
Ko …óun o noddiri on Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo mo men fe…≤…≤inani on on, fii no he…ďiron ge…ďal ka mangu Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on.
Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ď…ďe, wonee tabitu…ďe, jogito…óon janndeeji …ói men janni on …óin, woni non ko e kongu…ói, woni e …ďataake.
Yo Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on tigi, e Alla Baaba men, on Yi…óu…óo en, ye…ói en wakkilaare poomayankeere e tama'u mo∆ī∆īo immorde e sulfu makko on,
wakkilin …ďer…óe mon …óen, tabintina on e kala kuugal e kala kongol mo∆ī∆īol.
Ka rawnoode, yo musi…ď…ďe, toranee men fii no daaluyee Joomiraa…óo on lollira e no mawniniree, wano o lolliri e mawniri ka mon non,
fii no men dandiree …ďoylii…ďe …ďen e bon…ďe …ďen, ko fii hinaa fow mari gom…óinal.
Kono Joomiraa…óo on ko Sella-Findeejo, o tabintinay on, o hisina on bon…óo on.
Joomiraa…óo on no okki men hoolaare e telen-ma mon wonde hi…óon wa…óude, on wa…óoyay kadi ko men yamiri on kon.
Yo Joomiraa…óo on ardo …ďer…óe mon …óen e fee giggol iwrungol e Alla e Ňča…≤…≤aare iwrunde e *Almasiihu on.
Men yamirii on e innde Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, yo musi…ď…ďe, yo on wo…ó…óito kala musi…ó…óo wuuru…óo e nder puyndan, ko yaadaa e jannde nde hendor…óon men nden.

Nden mo∆ī∆īere no ne'a en, hinde yilta en e kala ko Alla a…≤i, hinde accintina en himmeeji aduna, …óun en waaway nawrude ngurndan men …óan fewndo …óoo e nder faamu e peewal e wano Alla faaliraa non,
e nder ko tijji…óen tama'u sollitu…óo on kon, …óun ko fee…≤ugol mangural Alla men on e Dandoowo en on, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu.
O okkitirii hoore makko kanko tigi fii men, fii sottugol en e kala ko boni, fii la…ď…ďinangol hoore makko jamaa su…ďaa…óo, himman…óo wa…óugol kuu…óe mo∆ī∆īe.
Ko …óun haanu…óaa yewtude, wakkilinaa, felaa wa newnanaa…óo yamirgol. Wota hay gooto yawito ma e …óun!
Andintin …ďe hi…ďe haani yankinanaade laamuuji …óin e laamii…ďe …ďen, …ďe …óoftoo …ďe, …ďe hebilanoo kala kuugal mo∆ī∆īal.
Wota …ďe hoynu hay gooto, maa …ďe wona yeddondirtee…ďe, kono …ďe wona mo∆ī∆īu…ďe, newii…ďe e telen-ma yim…ďe …ďen fow.
Ko fii hari enen kadi ko en faa…óa-hakkil…ďe, …ďe …óoftotaako, …óaynaa…ďe, maccu…ďe kala himmeeji e mbelee…óe ne…ó…óanke, wuuru…ďe e nder hun∆īeendi e nawliigu, a…≤aa…ďe, e a…≤indir…ďe.
Kono nde Alla, Dandu…óo en on, fe…≤…≤ini mo∆ī∆īuki makko kin e giggol makko ngol o yi…ói yim…ďe …ďen ngol,
o dandi en, hinaa non …ďay en wa…óii kuu…óe feewu…óe, kono ko e iwrude e yurmeende makko nden. O dandiri en lootirgol en tagiteede, hey…óintiniree *Ruuhu Senii…óo on.
Ko Iisaa Almasiihu, Dandu…óo en on, Alla tippiniri on Ruuhu e hoore men haa heewi,
fii no jogore…óen feewu…ďe sabu mo∆ī∆īuki makko kin, e fii no waawiren ronirde *ngurndan poomayankejan …óan tan∆īini…óen …óan.

Koo ko mi wi'i …óoo ko haqiiqa. Mi…óo faalaa yo a cato e …óii piiji, fii no gom…óin…ďe Alla …ďen fewtinira …ďer…óe mun …óen e wa…óugol kuu…óe mo∆ī∆īe …óen. Ko …óun woni ko mo∆ī∆īi kon e ko nafata yim…ďe …ďen kon.
Kono ko yo a reeno e yeddotire njofooje …óen e fii lasilankaaku e poodondiro e yeddondiro fii Sariya on, ko fii …óun ko meere, aldaa e nafa.
Kala wa…óoowo sendondiral, si a hajike mo nde wootere haa laabi …ói…ói, o ja…ďaali, pottin mo takko maa.
Hi…óa waawi fellitude sifa on ne…ó…óo ko …ďoylii…óo, junuubankeejo, on …≤aawanii hoore mun.
Tuma mi imminoyi oo wi'etee…óo Artemaasi maa Tikiiki haa e maa, haray eto araa tawaa mi Nikopooli, ko fii ko …óon mi aadii wa…óugol ndungu ngun.
Wattanaa yiila kadi fii wallitagol oo bambanoowo ka sariya wi'etee…óo Zenaasi e Apoloosi, fii wota hay huunde Ňčakkir …ďe e nder yaadu ma…ď…ďe ndun.
Bee kadi …ďe men …ďen ekkitoo haa waawa wa…óugol kuu…óe mo∆ī∆īe, fii wattangol yiila e kala sokola hittu…óo, …óun haray ngurndan ma…ď…ďe …óan wonataa meerejan.
∆Āe mi wondi …ďen fow hiwrike ma. Mi salminii yi…óu…ďe en e nder gom…óinal …ďen. Yo mo∆ī∆īere Alla nden wonu e hoore mon on fow.
Immorde e an min Puulusa, oo kasoojo sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, wondude e Timotee oo musi…ó…óo men, haa e oo gi…óo amen, wondi…ó…óo amen e golle, …óun ko an Filimuunu,
wondude e Apifiyyata oo bandiraawo amen e Arkiipe oo wondi…ó…óo amen e tippiro e haa e *moftal wongal ngal ka suudu maa an Filimuunu.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere e …ďuttu wonan on, immorde e Alla Baaba men, e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on.
Mi…óo duumii e jarnugol Alla an on e nder ko mi maandini fii maa e nder torndeeji an …óin,
ko fii mi…óo nanude no wowlee fii ko gom…óin…óaa Iisaa Joomi on kon, e giggol ngol yi…óu…óaa yim…ďe Alla …ďen fow ngol kadi.
Mi torike yo gom…óinal maa ngal hawtu…óen ngal wa…óu batte, andaa mo∆ī∆īere wonannde en e nder humondiral e *Almasiihu on.
E hoore …óun mi he…ďii weltaare e wakkilaare buy sabu giggol maa ngol, ko fii ko sabu maa yo musi…ó…óo, …ďer…óe yim…ďe Alla …ďen …ďuttiniraa.
Ko …óun wa…ói, fii kala mi…óo mari hoolaare mawnde sabu Almasiihu on fii windangol ma ko haanu…óaa wa…óude kon,
mi…óo yi…óu-maa tororde giggol, wano min Puulusa mi woniri nii nayeejo e kasoojo kadi sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on.
Mi jeejii ma fii Onesiima, on wontu…óo …ďi…ó…óo an ka gom…óinal fewndo mi jolkaa.
Hari o wonanii ma meere, kono jooni o nafete wano o nafirimmi non.
Awa mi neltii mo e maa, on mo tawata ko …ďernde an min tigi.
Mi faalano yo o wonu takko an, fii yo o wallan lonto-maa e nder ko mi jolkaa fii Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on kon.
Kono hay fus mi faalaaka wa…óude e …ďaawo fewjoore maa nden, fii wota kuu…óe maa mo∆ī∆īe …óen wonu karhaa…óe, kono …óe wona anniyaa…óe.
No gasa a seeduno e Onesiima haa see…óa, fii yo a hettitu mo haa poomaa.

Hara hinaa wa maccu…óo hande kadi, kono no …ďuriri maccu…óo, wa musi…ó…óo yi…óaa…óo, tentinii telen-ma an min, ittii e sikke telen-ma maa, …ďay ko o maccu…óo, awa kadi ko o musi…ó…óo gom…óin…óo Joomi on.
Si tawii hi…óa jogori lan wa gollidetee…óo, haray ja…ďir mo wa an min.
Si himo bonnu-maa, maa si himo jogani-maa go…ó…óun, fawu …óun e hoore an.
Ko jungo an ngon tigi, min Puulusa mi windiri nduu …ďatakuru, mi yo…ďitoyte …óun, fii kala mi faalaaka wi'ude an tigi hi…óa joganii mi go…ó…óun, …óun ko ngurndan maa …óan.
Awa yo musi…ó…óo, wa…óanan …óun sabu Joomiraa…óo on, …ďuttinaa …ďernde an nden e telen-ma Almasiihu on.
Ko e nder hoolorgol …óoftaare maa nden mi windiri, e hoore andugol a wa…óay …ďuri ko mi wi'i kon.
E hoore …óun, e…ď…ďanan werde, mi…óo tan∆īinii yahugol ka mon sabu torndeeji mon …óin.
Epafaraasi oo mo mi sokidaa ka kaso sabu Iisaa Almasiihu on, salminii ma,
wondude e Markuusa e Aristarke e Demaasi e Luuka, …óun ko …ďen wondi…ď…ďe an e golle.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on wonu e …ďer…óe mon.
Nde wonnoo Alla yewtiriino maamiraa…ďe men …ďen annabaa…ďe …ďen laawi buy e nooneeji buy,
Alla yewtirii en ka …≤alaa…óe sakkitore …óoo ∆Āi…ó…óo on. O wa…ói mo ronoowo e kala huunde, awa ko on o tagiri aduna on.

Ko on ∆Āi…ó…óo woni jalbeendi annoora Alla on, ko kanko woni mbaadi Alla ndin tigi. Ko on ∆Āi…ó…óo woni tambitii…óo kala huunde rewrude e daaluyee makko dolnu…óo on. Nde o laatinnoo la…ď…ďingol yim…ďe …ďen junuubaaji ma…ď…ďe …óin, o joo…óoyii ka sengo …≤aamo Alla Maw…óo on ka kammuuli,
o woni …ďur…óo malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen, wano innde nde o roni nden …ďurdiri …óe ma…ď…ďe …óen non.
Ko fii ko hombo e malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen Alla daalani: ¬ęKo an woni ∆Āi…ó…óo an on, hande a wonii mo an¬Ľ, maa o daalani kadi: ¬ęMi wonanay mo Baaba, o wonanammi ∆Āi…ó…óo.¬Ľ?
∆Āay o addii Afo on ka nder aduna, o daali kadi: ¬ęYo malaa'ikaa…ďe Alla …ďen fow sujjan mo.¬Ľ
Fii malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen o daali: ¬ęO wa…óay malaa'ikaa…ďe makko …ďen hendu e kurkaa…ói makko …óin …óen…óe yiite.¬Ľ
Kono fii ∆Āi…ó…óo on o daali: ¬ęJullere maa laamu nden, yaa an Alla, luttay haa poomaa, labbooru maa laamu ndun ko labbooru peewal.
A yi…óii peewal ngal, a a…≤ii angal peewal ngal. Ko …óun wa…ói si Alla Joomiraa…óo maa on to…ó…óor maa nebban weltaare …ďuri wondi…ď…ďe maa …ďen.¬Ľ
E hoore …óun o daali kadi: ¬ęYaa an Joomiraa…óo, ko an wallini ndelo leydi ndin ka fu…ó…óoode, awa kadi kammuuli …óin ko juu…óe maa …óen tagiraa.
∆äi lannay, kono an a luttay, …ói fow …ói nawyiray wa dolokke,
…≤obbiraa …ói wa waanaare, e hoore …óun …ói waylirte wa dolokke. Kono an a wa'ay no wa'u…óaa, awa kadi, duu…ďi maa …óin lannataa.¬Ľ
E ko hombo e malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen o daalani: ¬ęJoo…óor ka sengo an …≤aamo, haa mi wa…óa ay…ďe maa …ďen ka ley teppe maa.¬Ľ?
Hara …ďee malaa'ikaa…ďe fow, hinaa …ďe ruuhuuji kurkotoo…ói, nulaa…ói fii gollangol ronoo…ďe kisiyee …ďen?
Ko …óun wa…ói, hi…óen haani cataade fota e ko nanu…óen kon, fii wota en selu.
Ko fii, si kongu…ói …ói malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen hewtini maamiraa…ďe men …ďen …óin haqinqinaama, awa kadi kala bonnere e noone geddi yo…ďiraama ko handi kon,
haray ko honno da…óiroyten si en wedditike e sifa oo kisiyee maw…óo? Ko Joomi men on tigi adii fe…≤…≤inde mo, onsay non nanunoo…ďe mo …ďen haqinqinani en.
Allaahu on seeditodi e ma…ď…ďe, o …ďanginiri …óun kuu…óe e maandeeji e noone kaawakeeji mo∆ī∆īi e sendirgol dokke *Ruuhu Senii…óo on wano o yi…óiri non.
Hinaa malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen Alla yankinani oo aduna aroyoowo mo wowleten fii mun on.
Kono go…ó…óo no seeditii nokku goo, wi'i: ¬ęKo hon…óun woni ne…ó…óo fii no anditiraa fii makko, yaa an Alla, e ko woni …ďii ne…ó…óanke fii yo a danko mo?
A wa…óii mo e ley malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen e nder see…óa nii, a taaranii mo *meetelol mangu e teddungal, a wa…óii mo e hoore kuu…óe juu…óe maa …óen,
a wa…óii piiji …óin fow e ley koy…óe makko.¬Ľ E nder yankinangol mo piiji …óin fow, alaa ko Alla acci yo ronku yankinanaade mo, kono haa jooni en yi'aali ka piiji …óin fow yankinanii mo.

Kono non e hino ko taw…óen kon: …ďawto o wa…óeede e ley malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen fii saa'ihun nii, kanko Iisaa o wa…óanaama meetelol mangu e teddungal sabu mayde nde o tampiri nden, fii, tippude e mo∆ī∆īere Alla nden, yo o maayan yim…ďe …ďen fow.
E dow ardagol fay…ďe buy ka mangu, tawi no hawrani on Tagu…óo piiji fow, e mo piiji …óin fow wonani on, laatinirgol Iisaa timmu…óo e nder tampereeji, on Sincu…óo kisiyee ma…ď…ďe on.
Ko fii, ko *la…ď…ďin…óo on e *la…ď…ďinaa…ďe …ďen fow woni iwdi wootiri. Ko …óun wa…ói kanko Iisaa o hersiraa noddirgol …ďe musi…ď…ďe,
wano o wi'iri Alla non wonde: ¬ęMi jantanto musi…ď…ďe an …ďen innde maa nden, mi mantoyte ka hakkunde tumbondiral.¬Ľ
O wi'i kadi: ¬ęMi wa…óay hoolaare an nden e makko.¬Ľ Awa kadi: ¬ęE hino lan, min e fay…ďe …ďe Alla okkimmi …ďen.¬Ľ
Awa nde tawnoo fay…ďe …ďen no mari ∆īii∆īan e …ďandu, kanko Iisaa kadi ko wano non o tawdiraa e ma…ď…ďe, fii, rewrude e mayde makko nden, yo o muncu on joginoo…óo bawgal mayde nden, …óun ko Ibuliisa,
e fii yo o jattin kala wonnoo…ďe e nder maccangaaku e nder ngurndan mun sabu kulol mayde.
∆Āay, pellet wonaa malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen o ari faabagol, kono ko jurriya Ibraahiima on o ari faabagol.

Ko …óun wa…ói si himo haanunoo nandude e musi…ď…ďe makko …ďen few, fii no o wonira *yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka ka Alla, yurmetee…óo, holnii…óo e nder golle Alla …óen, fii no jamaa on he…ďira yaafuyee junuubaaji.
∆Āay kanko tigi o tampii fewndo o ndarndaa, himo waawi faabaade wonaa…ďe e ndarndeede …ďen.

Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ď…ďe an laa…ďu…ďe, …ďe mi hawti noddaandu Alla ndun, feŇčee miijo mon ngon e hoore mo Alla to…ó…óii neli on, on *Yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka ka Alla, on mo qirriti…óen ka gom…óinal men, …óun ko Iisaa.
O wonno sella-findeejo e telen-ma on To…ó…óii…óo mo, wano Muusaa wonirnoo non e nder suudu Alla ndun fow.
E hoore …óun, tawaama ko o Rin…óan…óo mangu …ďuri ngu Muusaa ngun, ko fii darnu…óo suudu on no mari teddungal …ďuri suudu ndun tigi.
Ko fii kala suudu ko go…ó…óo darni …óun, kono ko kanko Alla darni kala huunde.
Muusaa ka…≤un wonno kurkaadu sella-findeejo e nder suudu Alla ndun fow, fii seeditagol ko Alla daaloyta kon.
Kono *Almasiihu on kan ko ∆Āi…ó…óo sella-findeejo e hoore suudu Alla ndun. Ko enen woni suudu makko ndun, si en catike fota e wakkilaare e hoolaare nde jogi…óen fii ko tan∆īini…óen kon.
Ko …óun wa…ói, wano *Ruuhu Senii…óo on wi'iri non: ¬ęSi on nanii kongol makko ngol hande,
wota on sattin …ďer…óe mon …óen, wa fewndo maamiraa…ďe mon …ďen murtannoo mi, …ďe ndarndii mi ka wulaa,
ka …ďe liggitunoo mi …óon, …ďe ndarndii mi, …ďe yi'uno kuu…óe an …óen e nder duu…ďi cappan…óe nay.
Ko …óun wa…ói si mi tikkani ngun jamaanu, mi wi'i: ‚ÄĻ∆Āer…óe ma…ď…ďe …óen ko selu…óe saa'i kala, …ďe andaali laawi an …óin.‚Äļ
Mi woonduno e nder tikkere an nden wonde: ‚ÄĻ∆Āe naatataa ka fowtaare an few!‚Äļ ¬Ľ
Awa, reenee, yo musi…ď…ďe, fii wota hay gooto e mon he…ďu …ďernde bonnde e …ďernde nde gom…óinal tabitaa e mun, haa ka yilto…óon e …ďaawo Alla Wuuru…óo on.
Kono wakkilindiree hakkunde mon …≤ande woo, yeru no wi'eede hande, fii wota hay gooto e mon sattinir …ďernde mun …óaynireede junuubu.
Ko fii en wonii kafidu…ďe e Almasiihu on, si tawii en jogitike fota pellital men aranal ngal haa ka sakkitorun,
wano bindi …óin wi'iri non wonde: ¬ęHande si on nanii hito makko ngon, wota on sattin …ďer…óe mon …óen wa fewndo murtaldu ndun.¬Ľ
Ko hom…ďe woni …ďen murtannoo…ďe Alla, …ďawto …ďe nanude kongol makko ngol? Hinaa …ďee …ďe Muusaa ardinoo, yaltini *Misira?
E ko hom…ďe woni …ďen …ďe Alla tikkannoo e nder …óii duu…ďi cappan…óe nay? Hinaa …ďee wa…óunoo…ďe junuubu, maayi ka wulaa?
E ko hom…ďe o woondannoo naatataa ka fowtaare makko, si hinaa yeddu…ďe …ďen?
Awa en yi'ii …ďe waawaali naatude ka fowtaare makko, sabu angal gom…óinal.
Ko …óun wa…ói, yeru fodaari fii naatugol ka fowtaare makko no lutti, haray hulen wota go…ó…óo e mon aru e tawdeede e ronkoo…ďe naatude …ďen.
Ko fii Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on fe…≤…≤inanaama en, wano …ďeya non, kono kongol ngol …ďe he…óii ngol nafaali …ďe huunde, ko fii ko …ďe nanunoo kon, …ďe ja…ďiraano gom…óinal.

Kono enen gom…óin…ďe …ďen, en naatay e nden fowtaare nde o innunoo wonde: ¬ęMi woondii e nder tikkere an nden, …ďe naatataa ka fowtaare an few!¬Ľ E hin-le, Alla gayniino golle mun …óen gila ka fu…ó…óoode aduna on.
Ko fii himo daali nokku goo ka bindi fii …≤alaande jee…ói…óa…ďere nden wonde: ¬ęKa …≤alaande jee…ói…óa…ďere Alla fowtino e golleeji makko …óin fow.¬Ľ
Himo daali kadi fahin …óoo: ¬ę∆Āe naatataa ka fowtaare an few!¬Ľ
Nde tawnoo no heddanii wo…ď…ďe goo fii naatoygol ton, e hin-le kadi attinoo…ďe hendaade Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on ka…≤un naataano sabu angal gom…óinal ma…ď…ďe ngal,

e yeeso …óun buy Allaahu on daaluno kadi iwrude e Daawuuda, o to…ó…óii …≤alaande, o inni nden ¬ęhande¬Ľ, wano siforanoo non dow …óoo: ¬ęHande si on nanii hito makko ngon, wota on sattin …ďer…óe mon …óen.¬Ľ
Si tawiino Yaasuwa ye…óiino …ďe nden fowtaare, Alla wowlataano …ďawto …óun fii …≤alaande goo.
Awa jaka no lutti *…≤alaande fowteteende e mun fii jamaa Alla on.
Ko fii kala naatu…óo ka fowtaare Alla, o fowtoto kadi e golle makko …óen, wano Alla fowtornoo …óe mun …óen non.
Awa eto…óen naatugol ka fowtaare makko …óon, fii wota hay gooto falju, jokka …ďe …óoftaaki …ďen.
Ko fii, daaluyee Alla on ko wuuru…óo duncoowo, himo weli …ďuri kaafa ka mbel…óe …ói…ói, ko naatay…óo haa hakkunde ruuhu e wonkii, e hakkunde jokke e mbuso, o …≤aawa mbelee…óe e miijooji …ďernde.
Alaa ko tagaa ko o yi'ataa, fow no wallinaa, wa…óaa e kene yeeso on mo hunoyto…óen.
∆Āay hi…óen mari hooreejo maw…óo *yottinoo…ďe sadaka ka Alla, ta∆īitu…óo kammuuli …óin, …óun ko Iisaa *∆Āi…ó…óo Alla on, cato…óen e qirritannde gom…óinal men ngal.
Ko fii en maraa yottinoowo maw…óo mo waawataa faamude lo'ere men nden, kono o ndarndoranooma wano men non e …ói fow, e hoore o wa…óaali junuubu.
Awa …ďadoren hoolaare ka jullere laamu, ka sulfu on he…ďoytoo ton, fii no he…ďiren yurmeende e mo∆ī∆īere ko wonana en ballal fewndo haanani en.

Awa, kala *yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka ka Alla, su…ďaa…óo e hakkunde yim…ďe …ďen, ko jo…ó…óiniraa ko fii yim…ďe …ďen, fii ko wa…óa golleeji Alla …óin, fii no …ďe wee…ďitira dokke e sadakaaji fii junuubaaji …óin.
Himo waawi yurmeede …ďe faamaa …ďen e selu…ďe …ďen, ko fii kanko tigi lo'ereeji no hundi mo.
Awa ko sabu nden lo'ere wa…ói si himo haani ittande hoore makko sadaka, o ittana jamaa on kadi sadakaaji fii junuubaaji ma…ď…ďe …óin.
Kono hay gooto waawataa he…ďande hoore mun ngal teddungal wonugol yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka. Ko Alla ye…óata …óun, wano o to…ó…óori *Haaruuna non.
Ko wano non kadi, hinaa *Almasiihu on tigi ye…ói hoore mun ngal teddungal wonugol yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka ka Alla, kono ko Wi'u…óo mo on wonde: ¬ęKo an woni ∆Āi…ó…óo an on, hande a wonii mo an.¬Ľ
Wano non himo wi'i kadi nokku goo: ¬ęKo a yottinoowo sadaka ka Alla haa poomaa wano *Maaliki-Siddiiqu non.¬Ľ

E hoore …óun, e nder ngurndan makko …óan ka hoore leydi, kanko Iisaa o wee…ďitanno on Gasoowo mo dandude mayde nden gon…ói e torndeeji e nder ewnagol ko tii…ói. Alla jaabinani mo sabu ko o yankinaninoo mo kon.
Fii kala ko o *∆Āi…ó…óo Alla, o andi ko woni …óoftaare e nder ko o tampi kon fow.
∆Āay wonii o wa…óaama Timmu…óo, o wonani …óoftii…ďe mo …ďen fow …ďundu kisiyee poomayankeejo.
Onsay Alla to…ó…óii mo yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka ka Alla wano Maaliki-Siddiiqu non.
Hi…óen mari piiji buy ko wowlen e fii …óun, hara ko piiji buy mettu…ói sifaade, ko fii on wonii mettu…ďe faaminde.
E hin-le, e oo saa'i …óoo hi…óon haanunoo wonude jannoo…ďe, kono hi…óon handi kadi e janneede ∆īi'al daaluyeeji Alla …óin. Fewndo …óoo ko …ďira handu…óon e mun, hinaa …≤aametee.
On jokku…óo yarugol …ďira, haray alaa faamu woo e fii daaluyee faaminay…óo ngurndan feewu…óan …óan, ko fii haray haa jooni ootigi ko boobo.
Mokobaa…ďe …ďen ka…≤un, ko …≤aametee teddu…óo …ďe …≤aamata, ko fii tippude e kuu…óe ma…ď…ďe …óen hakkille ma…ď…ďe …óen no eltanii sendindirgol ko boni e ko mo∆ī∆īi.
Ko …óun wa…ói, sutano…óen jannde ∆īo∆īunde nden, fe∆ī∆īen jannde baggere fii *Almasiihu on nden, hara en fu…ó…óitaaki jannugol fii tuubugol kuu…óe nawray…óe e mayde …óen, e fii gom…óingol Alla,
e *lootagol maande kisiyee, e *fawugol juu…óe, e immitagol may…ďe …ďen, e …≤aawoore poomayankeere nden.
Ko …óun wa…óeten si Allaahu on newnii.
Fii ndayginananoo…ďe, mettii dokkal kammuyankewal ngal, tawdaa e hendii…ďe *Ruuhu Senii…óo on,
mettii mo∆ī∆īuki daaluyee Alla on wondude e doole aduna aroyoowo on …ďen kan,
si …ďe aru e selude gom…óinal ngal, …ďe waawetaake yilteede ka tuubuubuyee han kadi, ko fii haray kam…ďe tigi …ďe fempitike *∆Āi…ó…óo Alla on, e hoore …óun …ďe aybinii mo e kene.
Nde leydi yari ndiyan saa∆īoojan soono woo, ndi fu…óini pu…ói wondu…ói e nafa fii mo ndi remanaa on, haray hindi wondi e barki Alla.
Kono si tawii ko bulle e kebbe ndi funnata, haray hinaa ndi huunde, ko ndi …ďadondirndi e kuddi, sakkitora sunneede.
Hay si men yewtirii nii, yo yi…ď…ďe amen, haray me…óen hoolii hi…óon e laawol mo∆ī∆īol e telen-ma kisiyee on.
Ko fii Alla hinaa mo feewaa, sakko o yejjita kuu…óe mon …óen, e giggol ngol hollu…óon fii innde makko nden, e golle …óe wa…óu…óon …óen e …óe wa…óanton …óen kadi yim…ďe Alla …ďen.
Kono me…óen faalaa yo mo kala e mon hollir nii wakkilaare wootere nden e telen-ma pellital timmungal fii ko tan∆īini…óen kon haa ka sakkitorun.
Ko …óun wa…ói, wota on wonu aamu…ďe, kono …≤embee …ďen he…ďirnoo…ďe ndondi fodaandi ndin gom…óinal e mu…≤al.
Ko …óun wa…ói, nde Alla wa…óannoo Ibraahiima fodaari ndin, o tawno o waawataa woondirde ko …ďuri mo kanko Alla mawnude, o woondiri hoore makko kanko tigi,
o wi'i: ¬ęPellet, mi wa…óay barki e maa fota, mi ya…≤…≤ay jurriya maa on ya…≤…≤udee.¬Ľ
Ko e nder …óun, …ďay wonii Ibraahiima habbike e nder mu…≤…≤aare, o he…ďi non ko o fodanoo kon.
E hin-le, yim…ďe …ďen no woondira ko …ďuri …ďe mawnude, nden woondoore wonana …ďe seedee fii rawnoode kala yeddondiral.
Ko wano non, hakkee ko Alla faalanoo hollude ronoo…ďe fodaari makko ndin …ďen noone no anniyee makko on firtortaa, o wa…óirno …óun woondoore
fii, sabu …óee kuu…óe …ói…ói …óe waylotaako, …óe tawata gasataa ka Alla fena, no enen fattii…ďe …ďen he…ďiren wakkilaare tii…óunde fii tamagol e tama'u mo Alla wee…ďitani en on.
On tama'u no wa'ani en wa saanirgal tii…óungal holnii fii ngurndan men …óan, rewoowo ka *wirngallo fii naatugol ka nder *nokkuure hormorde mawnde nden,
…óun ko ka Almasiihu on naati …óon fii men wa fertanii…óo en laawol, o woni *yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka ka Alla haa poomaa, wano *Maaliki-Siddiiqu non.

Ko *Maaliki-Siddiiqu on wonnoo lan…óo Salaam, e *yottinoowo sadaka ka Alla Jom ∆Āural on. O yahi, o fottoyi e Ibraahiima fewndo ko on iwtata fooloygol lam…ďe …ďen, kanko Maaliki-Siddiiqu o du'anii mo.
Ibraahiima jonni mo sappa…ďun e …ói fow. Ko adii kon taho, innde Maaliki-Siddiiqu nden no firi ‚ÄĻlan…óo peewal‚Äļ. E hoore …óun kadi ko o lan…óo Salaam, e maanaa lan…óo …ďuttu.
Kono o alaa neene, o alaa baaba, o alaa iwdi, o alaa fu…ó…óoode, o alaa kattudi ngurndan. O wa'i wa *∆Āi…ó…óo Alla, o woni yottinoowo sadaka ka Alla haa poomaa.
Ndaaree ko haa honto o mawni, on mo Ibraahiima maw…óo on tigi jonni sappa…ďun mun e nder ko o he…ďoyi kon!

Sariya on to…ó…óii e …ďi…ď…ďe *Lewi …ďen wonugol yottinoo…ďe sadaka ka Alla e ∆īantoo…ďe sappa…ďun e hoore ko jamaa *Isra'iila on he…ďi kon fow, …óun ko e …ďen ben-gootoo…ďe ma…ď…ďe, fii kala …ďen ko …ďe jurriya Ibraahiima.
Kono Maaliki-Siddiiqu, mo tawdaaka e jurriya Lewi on, o hendike sappa…ďun Ibraahiima on, e hoore …óun, o du'anii on hendii…óo fodaariiji …óin.
E hin-le yeddotaako ko maw…óo on du'antoo tosooko on.
E hin-le, e telen-ma yottinoo…ďe sadaka …ďen ka bolondaa Lewi, ko maayay…ďe woni hendaade sappa…ďun …óun, kono e telen-ma Maaliki-Siddiiqu kan, ko wuuru…óo woni ko hendii, wano seeditoraa non.
Ka ra…ď…ďin…óinnde, Lewi, oo won…óo hendaade sappa…ďun …óun, o yo…ďiino ko makko kon rewrude e Ibraahiima.
Ko fii hari himo ka keeci ben makko wa fewndo ko Maaliki-Siddiiqu yahi fottugol e Ibraahiima.

Ko rewrude e yottinoo…ďe sadaka ka gorol Lewi …ďen jamaa Isra'iila on hendornoo Sariya on. E hin-le, si tawno golle …ďen yottinoo…ďe sadaka ko timmunoo…óe, harayno ko fii hon…óun haanannoo wa…óugol yottinoowo goo wano Maaliki-Siddiiqu non, hara hinaa wano *Haaruuna non?
Ko fii si aada wonugol yottinoo…ďe sadaka …ďen waylike, haray no haani kadi ka Sariya on waylee.
Ko fii on mo …óii piiji wowli fii mun on, ko jeyaa…óo e bolondaa goo mo hay gooto to…ó…óaaka e mun fii golle *layyorde nden.
E hoore …óun, wano andir…óen non tigi, Joomi men on ko fee…≤u…óo e bolondaa *Yahuuda on. E telen-ma wonugol yottinoo…ďe sadaka, Muusaa wowlaali few fii on bolondaa.
∆äun…óoo kadi no …ďuri …ďanginde si yottinoowo sadaka goo fee…≤irii wa Maaliki-Siddiiqu,
wontu…óo yottinoowo sadaka, hara hinaa tippude e Sariya yu…ď…ďondir…óo e gorol lannoowol, kono ko tippude e doole ngurndan …óan lannataa …óan.
∆Āay no seeditaa wonde: ¬ęKo a yottinoowo sadaka ka Alla haa poomaa, wano Maaliki-Siddiiqu non.¬Ľ
Awa, ko yamiraa …ďaawo …óoo kon ittaama, sabu lo'ere mun nden e mehi…óugol mun ngol,
ko fii Sariya on waawaali timminde huunde. Kono en addanaama tama'u …ďur…óo mo∆ī∆īude mo …ďadoren Alla.
∆äun non wa…óaaka e …ďaawo woondoore. ∆Āeya non ka…≤un wontii yottinoo…ďe sadaka ka Alla e …ďaawo woondoore,
kono kanko Iisaa o wontirno …óun woondoore, …ďay Alla daalanno mo …óun…óoo: ¬ęMi woondii, mi firtataa, ko a yottinoowo sadaka ka Alla haa poomaa.¬Ľ
Ko …óun wa…ói si Iisaa wonii holnu…óo *ahadi …ďurndi hittude ndin.
E hoore …óun, hari …ďen yottinoo…ďe sadaka no woodunoo buy, ko fii hari mayde nden no ha…ói …ďe duumagol e golle ma…ď…ďe …óen.
Kono Iisaa ka…≤un, …ďay tawii himo wuuri haa poomaa, golle makko yottingol sadaka …óen lannataa.
Ko …óun wa…ói kadi, himo waawi dandude few …ďen won…ďe …ďadorde Alla sabu makko kanko Iisaa, …ďay himo wuuri haa poomaa fii fattanagol …ďe.
Ko wano on yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka tigi haanannoo en, hara ko *senii…óo, mo bonnaali, mo aldaa e junuubu, seedu…óo e junuubanke'en, e …ďur…óo kammuuli …óin …ďanteede,

mo hatonjinaa e ittugol sadakaaji wano yottinoo…ďe maw…ďe …ďen ittirta …≤ande woo sadakaaji fii junuubaaji ma…ď…ďe …óin, kam…ďe tigi taho, e …ói jamaa on …óin kadi. Iisaa wa…óii …óun nde wootere ko yoni fii saa'iiji …óin fow, e nder ko o itti hoore makko sadaka kon.
Sariya on ka…≤un, …ďe to…ó…óotoo …ďen fii wonugol yottinoo…ďe sadaka maw…ďe ko yim…ďe lo'u…ďe, kono daalol woondoore nden …ďawto Sariya on to…ó…óike ∆Āi…ó…óo on, on won…óo Timminaa…óo haa poomaa.
Awa e hino nafa to…ď…ďere nde won…óen yewtude fii mun nden: hi…óen mari wano oo *yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka ka Alla, joo…óii…óo ka sengo …≤aamo jullere laamu Alla Maw…óo on ka kammuuli.
Ko o golloowo ka nder nokkuure hormorde, …óun ko ka *rewirdu goongaaru, hara hinaa ndu yim…ďe …ďen darni, kono ko Joomiraa…óo on.
Kala yottinoowo maw…óo ko to…ó…óoraa ko fii wee…ďitangol Alla dokke e sadakaaji, bee yottinoowo men maw…óo on kadi he…ďa go…ó…óun ko o wee…ďita.
Si tawno himo ka hoore leydi, o wonataano yottinoowo sadaka, …ďay no woodi wee…ďitoo…ďe dokke, hara ko no yaadiri e Sariya on.

∆Āen no wa…óude dewal ngal tawata ko mbaadi e …óowdi goongaaji kammuyankeeji …óin, wano Muusaa …ďanginiranaa non fewndo ko o darnata rewirdu ndun, Alla daalani mo: ¬ęNdaaru, a wa…óiray fow noone no hollira…óaa non ka hoore fello.¬Ľ
Kono jooni, *Almasiihu on he…ďii golle …ďur…óe mawnude …óe …ďeya …óen, no o woniri non holnu…óo *ahadi …ďurndi mo∆ī∆īude ndin, sincaandi e fodaariiji …ďur…ói kel…óude …óin.
Si tawno ahadi araniri ndin wonno ndi felnaaki, hewtataano ka wonndi …óa…ď…ďee.
E hin-le ko e hoore feloore Alla daalani jamaa mun on: ¬ęKanko Joomiraa…óo on o daali: ‚ÄĻ∆Ěalaande no aroya nde mi ∆īettodoyta e yim…ďe *Isra'iila …ďen e yim…ďe *Yahuuda …ďen ahadi heyri.

Ndin ahadi wa'oytaa wa ndi mi ahodunoo e baabiraa…ďe ma…ď…ďe …ďen ndin, wa fewndo mi tambitornoo …ďe juu…óe an …óen fii yaltingol …ďe Misira, ko fii …ďe hunnaali ahadi an ndin.‚Äļ ¬ęJoomiraa…óo on daali: ‚ÄĻMin kadi jooni mi huccii …ďe.

E hino non ahadi ndi mi ahodoyta e yim…ďe Isra'iila …ďen …ďawto …óee …≤alaa…óe …óoo.‚Äļ ¬ęJoomiraa…óo on daali: ‚ÄĻMi wa…óoyay sariyaaji an …óin ka miijo ma…ď…ďe, mi winda …ói ka …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe, min mi wona Alla ma…ď…ďe, kam…ďe kadi …ďe wona jamaa an.
Hara …ďe hatonjinaa e jannindirgol maa fillitanagol wondi…ó…óo mun maa musi…ó…óo mun, wi'a: Bee andaa Joomiraa…óo on! Ko fii fow andoyay lan, gila e …ďur…óo fan…óude on haa e …ďur…óo mawnude on.
Ko fii mi yaafoyto ellaaji ma…ď…ďe …óin, mi hakkilanoytaa e junuubaaji ma…ď…ďe …óin.‚Äļ ¬Ľ
Ka o inni ndin ahadi heyri …óon, ko …óon o watti araniri ndin hinndi. E hin-le hinndi ndin nawyii, no e moggo mulugol.
Ahadi* araniri ndin kadi no marnoo aadaaji mun yaadu…ói e dewal, wondude e nokkuure mun hormorde ka aduna …óoo.
E hoore …óun, *rewirdu wa…óanooma. Nokkuure aranere nden e ndun rewirdu no wi'etenoo hormorde, ka jo…ó…óinirde pitilli nden wonnoo …óon, e taabal ngal e bireediije wee…ďitanaa…óe Joomiraa…óo on …óen.
E hoore …óun, …ďaawo *wirngallo …óimmo ngon, tawi no …óon nokkuure wi'etenoonde *hormorde mawnde nden.

Tawi hinde wondunoo e sunnirde urngallooji tafiraande kaŇčŇče, e *kankiranwal seeditoore hoobiraangal kaŇčŇče haa hunditi. Tawi no e nder maggal loonde kaŇčŇče wa…óornde ‚ÄĻ*manna‚Äļ, wondude e tuggordu *Haaruuna ndun, ndu tawata hari fiinii, e alluuje maande ahadi …óen.

Tawi no ka hoore kankiranwal nandollaaji *serubiina Mangural ngal, omborde maggal on, …óun ko ka junuubaaji …óin yaafetee …óon, no …óuwiraa gabitanji majji …óin. Kono hinaa fewndo …óoo haanu…óen wowlugol fensita fii kun kala e koy piihoy.
Nde tawnoo …óun fow ko non jo…ó…óiniranoo, *yottinoo…ďe sadaka ka Alla …ďen naatayno soono woo ka nokkuure aranere e nder rewirdu ndun, fii wa…óugol golle diina ma…ď…ďe kan.

Kono ka *nokkuure hormorde mawnde, ko yottinoowo maw…óo on tun naataynoo ton nde wootere e nder hitaande nden, e hoore addorgol ∆īii∆īan ko sakkoo fii hoore mun e fii ellaaji …ói jamaa on wa…óiri angal andude.
Ruuhu* Senii…óo on no holliri en telen …óoo wonde …óatal nokkuure hormorde mawnde nden udditaaki, fannamaa rewirdu aranuru ndun no lutti.
Hi…óen mari …óoo misal fe…≤…≤ingal goongaaji fewndii…ói hande …óin. ∆äun fow no …ďangini wonde dokke e sadakaaji, ko wee…ďitirantenoo nii Alla, waawataa la…ď…ďinde …ďernde on rewiroowo non.
Ko …óun…óoo woni yamirooje ne…ó…óanke tun yu…ď…ďondir…óe e …≤aameteeji e njaramji e noone salligiiji, yamiraa…óe haa …≤ande Alla hey…óintini piiji …óin fow.

Kono *Almasiihu on ardii wa yottinoowo maw…óo sadaka fii mo∆ī∆īereeji fewndii…ói …óin. O ta∆īiti rewirdu …ďurndu mawnude ndun e …ďurndu timmude ndun, ndu tawata hinaa darniraandu juu…óe yim…ďe, e maanaa ndun hinaa ndu oo aduna.
O naatii ka nokkuure hormorde mawnde nde wootere ko yoni haa poomaa, rewrude e ∆īii∆īan makko …óan tigi, hara hinaa rewrude e ∆īii∆īan ciikuliiji e …≤albi. Ko nii o ye…óiri en cottudi poomayankeeri.
Si tawii ∆īii∆īan ciikuliiji e ga'i na'i e ndoondi wiige, ko wiccitee junjee e hoore yim…ďe …ďe laa…ďaa, no la…ď…ďina …ďe ka …ďandu,

kono Almasiihu on ka…≤un ko hoore mun tigi ittani Alla sadaka e …ďaawo ella, e hoore ardoreede Ruuhu Poomayankeejo on, ko haa honto non ∆īii∆īan makko …óan la…ď…ďinta …ďer…óe men, itta en e kuu…óe nawray…óe en e mayde, fii no rewiren Alla Wuuru…óo on!

Ko …óun wa…ói si ko kanko woni holnu…óo ahadi heyri ndin, fii yo noddaa…ďe …ďen hendo ndondi poomayankeeri ndi Alla fodi …ďe ndin. Ko fii mayde makko nden wonii sadaka fii sottugol …ďe e …óin bonnereeji wa…óaa…ói ka fewndo ahadi hinndi.
Ko fii, ka wasiyannde nden woni …óon, haray no haani ka mayde wasiyii…óo on andee.
Wasiyannde nden non laatike woo …ďawto mayde nden, ko fii nde alaa nafa fewndo wasiyii…óo on wuuri.
Ko …óun wa…ói, ahadi araniri ndin tigi, ndi udditaaka e …ďaawo hibbugol ∆īii∆īan.

∆Āay Muusaa gaynii wee…ďitande jamaa on fow kala yamiroore, wano …óe woniri non ka Sariya, o ∆īetti ∆īii∆īan ga'i na'i e ciikuliiji e ndiyan e gaara bo…óe, o wicciri deftere nden e jamaa on baapal no wi'ee *hisoopu,
e hoore himo wi'a: ¬ę∆äun…óoo ko ∆īii∆īan ahadi ndi Alla yamiri fii mon ndin nii.¬Ľ
Ko wano non kadi, o wicciri rewirdu ndun e aalaaji gollirtee…ói fii diina …óin ∆īii∆īan.
E telen-ma Sariya on, fayda fow ko ∆īii∆īan la…ď…ďiniraa, ko fii yaafuyee alaa e …ďaawo hibbugol ∆īii∆īan.
∆äin aalaaji lontii…ói goongaaji kammuyankeeji, no haanunoo la…ď…ďinireede oo noone …óoo, kono no haaniri non ka haqiiqaaji kammuyankeeji …óin la…ď…ďiniree sadakaaji …ďur…ói mo∆ī∆īude.
Ko fii Almasiihu on naataali e nder nokkuure hormorde wa…óiraande juu…óe ne…ó…óanke, …≤embinaande goongaare nden, kono ko ka kammu tigi fii no o wee…ďitorana en jooni yeeso Alla.
O naatiraali fii ittugol hoore makko sadaka soono woo, wano yottinoo…ďe maw…ďe …ďen naatirta hitaande woo ka nokkuure hormorde mawnde wondude e ∆īii∆īan …óan tawata wonaa ∆īii∆īan makko.

Ko fii, si hinaano …óun, Almasiihu on tampayno soono woo gila ka fu…ó…óoode aduna on. Kono jooni, ka lannoode jamaanuuji, o fee…≤ii nde wootere ko yoni fii saa'iiji …óin fow fii bonnitugol junuubaaji e nder ko o itti hoore makko sadaka kon.
Nde tawnoo no maranaa yim…ďe …ďen maayugol nde wootere pet, …ďawto …óun …≤aawoore nden wa…óa,

ko wano non Almasiihu on ittiri hoore mun sadaka nde wootere pet fii ronditagol junuubaaji yim…ďe …óuu…óu…ďe. Awa, o artoyay kadi, hara hinaa fii ronditagol junuubaaji, kono ko fii dandugol …ďen habbornoo…ďe mo kisiyee.

E hoore …óun, wonaa Sariya on tigi woni haqiiqaaji aroyaynoo…ói …óin, kono ko mbaadi mun tun. O waawataa few laatinde …ďen …ďadoray…ďe non Alla timmu…ďe, rewrude e on sadaka gooto jokkondir…óo hitaande woo hitaande.
Si o waawayno, harayno nee…ďii ko …ďen wa…óaynoo…ďe …óin sadakaaji acci, harayno …ďe la…ď…ďinaama nde wootere ko yoni haa poomaa, harayno kadi …ďernde ma…ď…ďe felataa …ďe e telen-ma junuubu woo.
Kono, …óin sadakaaji andintinay en hitaande kala fii junuubaaji …óin.
Ko fii waawataa ka ∆īii∆īan ga'i na'i e ciikuliiji monta junuubaaji.
Ko …óun wa…ói, e nder naatugol e nder aduna on, *Almasiihu on no wi'i: ¬ęWonaa sadakaaji maa dokke faala…óaa, kono a wa…óanii lan …ďandu.
A weltoraali sadaka sunnetee…óo, maa ko sakkaa fii junuubu.
Awa mi wi'i: ‚ÄĻE hino lan, mi arii fii wa…óugol faale maa on, yaa an Alla, wano fii an windori non e nder ndee deftere taggiinde.‚Äļ ¬Ľ
Himo wi'i taho: ¬ęA yi…óaali e a weltoraali sadakaaji e dokke e sadakaaji sunnetee…ói e sadakaaji fii junuubaaji, wa…óiranoo…ói no yaadiri e Sariya on.¬Ľ
E hoore …óun o wi'i kadi: ¬ęE hino lan, mi arii fii wa…óugol faale maa on.¬Ľ O ittii aranun …óun fii sincugol …óimmun …óun.
Awa, ko sabu faale Alla on *la…ď…ďina…óen fii wonugol yim…ďe makko, rewrude e oo sadaka mo Iisaa Almasiihu on ittiri …ďandu mun ndun tigi nde wootere ko yoni haa poomaa.
Kala *yottinoowo sadaka ka Alla no ka gollata …óon …≤ande woo fii wa…óugol golle mun diina …óen, e ittugol sadakaaji gooti …≤ande woo, …ói tawata waawataa ittude junuubaaji few.
Almasiihu on non ka…≤un, o wa…óii sadaka gooto bajjo fii junuubaaji …óin, yonu…óo haa poomaa, awa kadi himo joo…óii ka sengo …≤aamo Alla,
himo sabbii …óon haa Alla wa…óa ay…ďe makko …ďen ka ley koy…óe makko.
Ko dokkal bajjal o timminiri haa poomaa wonaa…ďe *la…ď…ďineede fii wonugol yim…ďe Alla …ďen.
Ko …óun *Ruuhu Senii…óo on seeditanii en kadi. Ko fii himo wi'i taho:
¬ęJoomiraa…óo on daali: ‚ÄĻE hino *ahadi ndi mi ∆īettodoyta e ma…ď…ďe ndin: ∆Āawto …óee …≤alaa…óe …óoo, mi wa…óoyay sariyaaji an …óin ka …ďer…óe ma…ď…ďe, mi windoya …ói ka hakkille ma…ď…ďe.‚Äļ ¬Ľ
O …ďeyditi e …óun: ¬ęMi anditoytaa hande kadi fii junuubaaji ma…ď…ďe …óin e angal peewal ma…ď…ďe ngal.¬Ľ
Ko fii ka junuubaaji …óin yaafaa …óon, haray alaa ko sakkee fii junuubu.
Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ď…ďe an, …ďay hi…óen mari hoolaare fii naatugol ka *nokkuure hormorde mawnde sabu oo sadaka ∆īii∆īan Iisaa
…óan o udditirani en laawol kesol wurngol, rewrungol ka *wirngallo, ngon-le ko …ďandu makko ndun,
e …ďay kadi hi…óen mari yottinoowo maw…óo won…óo ka suudu Alla,
…ďadoren Alla …ďernde nun…óunde e gom…óinal heewungal pellital, e …ďernde la…ď…ďinaande kala miijooji bon…ói, e …ďandu lootiraandu ndiyan laa…ďu…óan.
Wonen catii…ďe tabiti e tama'u mo qirriti…óen on, ko fii Wa…óan…óo en …óin fodaariiji on ko Sella-findeejo.
Miijondiranen ko honno waaweten wakkilindirde ka giggol e ka kuu…óe mo∆ī∆īe.
Wota en terto mottondiral men ngal, wano wo…ď…ďe woowiri non. Kono wakkilindiren fodde hi…óen yi'ude …≤alaande nden no …ďadaade.
Ko fii si en duumike wa…óugol junuubu e nder tewaare …ďawto en hendaade gandal goonga on, haray sadaka alaa hande kadi fii junuubaaji,
kono ko habbannde …≤aawoore hul…ďiniinde e nguleendi yiite hebuliinge sunnugol murtu…ďe …ďen.
Si go…ó…óo bonniino Sariya Muusaa on, o wareteno, o yaafetaake, e hoore seeditoore …ói…óo maa tato.

E miijo mon onon, si go…ó…óo hayfinii *∆Āi…ó…óo Alla on, si o jogitorii ∆īii∆īan ahadi …óan wa …óan aldaa e fiira, …óan …óan o *la…ď…ďiniraa, e si o hoynii Ruuhu Allaahu on, on Jom Sulfu, e hara on miijaaki himo handi e lette …ďur…óe muusude kadi?
Ko fii hi…óen andi on Wi'u…óo: ¬ęKo min yottagol woodani, ko min yo…ďoyta¬Ľ, e hoore …óun: ¬ęJoomiraa…óo on …≤aaway jamaa mun on.¬Ľ
No hul…ďinii yanugol e juu…óe Alla Wuuru…óo on!
Anditee liddu …óun ka saa'iiji arani, …ďawto Alla ndayginande on, on Ňča…≤…≤ino satteende tii…óunde e nder tippiro muusungo.
Ko fii e saa'i goo on hoynano, cukka…óon e kene, e saa'i goo jonnindir…óon juu…óe e …ďen wa…óiranoo…ďe wano non.
E hoore …óun, yurma…óon sokaa…ďe …ďen, ja…ďu…óon kadi e nder weltaare yo on jatte keyeeji mon …óin, sabu andugol mon hi…óon mari keyee …ďur…óo mo∆ī∆īude, luttoowo.
Awa wota on accitu hoolaare mon addaynde mbarjaari mawndi nden.
Ko fii hi…óon haani Ňča…≤…≤aade, fii, nde timminoy…óon faale Alla on, yo on hendoyo ko o fodi on kon.
Ko fii e nder saa'ihun nii: ¬ęHaanu…óo arude on aray, nee…ďataa.
Feewu…óo an on non wuuriray gom…óinal. Kono si o yiltitike, wonkii an kin weltanoytaako mo.¬Ľ
Enen-le hinaa en yiltoroo…ďe …ďaawo fii hayrugol, kono ko en gom…óin…ďe fii dandegol.
E hin-le, gom…óinal ngal ko pellital fii piiji …ói tan∆īini…óen, e hoolaare fii piiji …ói en yi'aali taho.
Alla kulji maw…ďe …ďaawo …óoo …ďen sabu gom…óinal ma…ď…ďe ngal.
Ko gom…óinal ngal won…óen andirde aduna on ko daaluyee Alla on tagiraa. Ko …óun wa…ói ko yi'eten kon iwraa e ko yi'otoo.

Ko gom…óinal ngal Haabiila ye…óiri Alla sadaka …ďur…óo mo∆ī∆īude mo Qaayiina on. O kuljiraa feewu…óo sabu ngal gom…óinal. Alla tigi kulji …óen dokke makko. Fii kala kanko Haabiila o maayii, kono ngal gom…óinal no …ďanginde fii makko.

Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi Hanuuka ∆īentiniraa fii wota o andu mayde nden. En yi'ataa mo hande kadi sabu Allaahu on ∆īentinno mo. Ko fii, ado o ∆īentineede, hari o he…ďiino kuluujaa wonde himo weltini Alla.
Awa, e …ďaawo gom…óinal, gasataa ka ontigi weltina Alla, ko fii on …ďadotoo…óo mo no haani gom…óinde wonde kanko Alla himo woodaa, gom…óina kadi ko kanko woni yo…ďoowo …óa…ď…ďoo…ďe mo …ďen.

Ko gom…óinal ngal fahin Nuuhu mo∆ī∆īinirnoo laana fii dandugol …ďeynguure mun nden. Ko nii o teddiniri ko Alla *hiitaninoo mo fii ko aroyta yi'aaka taho kon. ∆Āay o warrii non kanko Nuuhu, tawi o hollii wonde yim…ďe aduna on ko felnii…ďe. Alla jogori Nuuhu feewu…óo sabu gom…óinal makko ngal.
Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi Ibraahiima …óoftori noddaandu ndu Alla noddi mo ndun fii yahugol e leydi ndi o ronoyta ndin. O yahi e hoore o andaa ka o woni yahude.
Ko gom…óinal o ho…óiri e ndin leydi fodaandi wa leydi jananiri, o ho…ói e nder cuu…ói bagi. Issaaqa* e Yaaquuba kadi ho…óiri non, …ďe ronidi e makko fodaari wootiri ndin.
Ko fii hari, kanko Ibraahiima himo habbii ho…óo ngo tawata didol cuu…ói mun no tii…ói, ngo tawata ko Alla e…ď…ďi, darni.
Ko sabu gom…óinal ngal kadi, fii kala Saarata ka…≤un ko mo jiidotaako, o he…ďiri feere jurriyagol e nder nayeewu makko, …ďay himo hoolii wonde Alla ko hunnoowo ko o fodi kon.
Ko …óun wa…ói si ne…ó…óo gooto, mo tawata mayde mun nden he…ďiino …óun, he…ďi jurriya …ďur…óo koode …óen ka kammu …óuu…óude e njaareendi ndin ka sera baharu, ko tawata en waawataa limude.
Ko e nder gom…óinal ngal …ďe fow …ďe maayi e …ďaawo hendagol piiji fodaa…ói …óin, kono …ďe haynino …ói ka wo…ó…ói, …ďe weltori, e nder qirritagol ko …ďe tuŇčarankee…ďe e janan…ďe ka leydi.
Yewtiray…ďe nii …ďen hollii no laa…ďiri wonde hi…ďe …óa…ď…ďande hoore ma…ď…ďe leydi heyri.
Si tawno non …ďe wul…óano ka …ďe iwi ton, …ďe he…ďayno feere no …ďe yiltora.
Kono ka haqiiqa hi…ďe himmannoo nokkuure …ďurnde mo∆ī∆īude, …óun ko ka kammu. Ko …óun wa…ói Alla hersiraa noddeede Alla ma…ď…ďe, ko fii o mo∆ī∆īinanii …ďe ho…óo.
Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi Ibraahiima wee…ďitiri Issaaqa fii layyagol fewndo ko Allaahu on ndarndii mo. Hari himo e fii sakkagol Issaaqa, …ďi…ó…óo makko bajjo on, kanko hendinoo…óo fodaariiji …óin,
…óun ko on mo Allaahu on daalannoo wonde: ¬ęKo e Issaaqa jurriya maa on nodditirtee.¬Ľ
Himo joginoo wonde Alla ko Waawu…óo hay immintingol may…óo e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen, ko …óun wa…ói si o hettitiri …ďi…ó…óo makko on wa immitii…óo e mayde.
Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi Issaaqa du'orani Yaaquuba e *Iisu fii ko aroyta kon.
Ko gom…óinal ngal fahin, fewndo Yaaquuba maayata, o du'orani mo kala e …ďi…ď…ďe Yuusufu …ďen, o ugginii e hoore tuggordu makko ndun, o sujjani Alla.
Ko gom…óinal ngal fahin, …ďay …ďadike ka Yuusufu maaya, o maandiniri fii eggudu *Banii-Isra'iila'en ndun *Misira, o wa…ói kadi yamirooje fii ∆īi'e makko …óen.
Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi, …ďay Muusaa jibinaama, maw…ďe makko …ďen suu…óiri mo lebbi tati, …ďay …ďe tawii boobo on no labaa fota, awa kadi …ďe hulaano yamiroore lan…óo on.
