Ko gom…óinal ngal o yaltiri Misira e …ďaawo …óen∆īagol tikkere lan…óo on, …ďay himo catornoo wa sutii…óo on mo yi'otaako.
Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi o wa…óiri *Juldeere Yawtaneede nden, e wujugol ∆īii∆īan fii wota muloowo dikkuruu…ďe on meemu ko dikkoranaa Isra'iilayankee…ďe …ďen kon.
Ko gom…óinal ngal fahin …ďe ta∆īitiri *Baharu Bo…óeejo on wa leydi yorndi, kono nde Misirayankoo…ďe …ďen e…ď…ďunoo wa…óirgol non, …ďe yoolino.
Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi tata on Yeerikoo yaniri, …ďay …ďe gaynii taaraade mo e nder bal…óe jee…ói…ói.
Ko gom…óinal ngal kadi wa…ói si *Raabi, oo debbo cagaajo, maydaano e heefer…ďe …ďen, sabu ko o wernirnoo tefoo…ďe …ďen kon …ďuttu.
Ko hon…óun mi wi'ata kadi? Saa'i on yonantaa lan si tawii mi wowlay mi fensita fii oo wi'etee…óo *Gadawna e *Baaraka e Samsuuna e Yiftaaha e Daawuuda e Samu'iila e annabaa…ďe …ďen.
Ko gom…óinal ngal …ďe fooliri laamateeriiji, …ďe tabintini peewal, …ďe he…ďi fodaariiji, …ďe ombi sekko ngayuuje.
∆Āe …óannini giiteeli bonnooji, …ďe da…ói mbelndi kaafa, …ďe heewi doole fii kala hi…ďe lo'unoo, …ďe hollitii ka nder hareeji, …ďe ra…óii koneeli janan…ďe …ďen.
Rew…ďe yi'i may…ďe mun no immitoo. Wo…ď…ďe goo kadi lettaa, …ďe salii sotteede fii no …ďe he…ďira ummutal …ďurngal mo∆ī∆īude.
Wo…ď…ďe …ďen he…ďi aybineede e focceede, e hoore jolkeede sokee.

Wo…ď…ďe …ďen wariraa kaa∆īe, wo…ď…ďe …ďen tampinaa ta∆īaa …ói…ói, maa wariraa kaafa. Wo…ď…ďe nawri ngurndan mun …óan yaarugol hen fow, hara no …ďornii guri baali maa be'i, …ďillor…ďe …ói fow, cukkee tampinee.
Hari aduna on handaa e …ďen, …ďe tawata wonundeeji mun ko ka wulaaji e ka pelle e ka pammeeje e ka gay…óe.
∆Āen kuljiranoo…ďe sabu gom…óinal mun ngal fow non, hendaaki ko …ďe fodanoo kon.
Ko fii Alla no e…ď…ďani en go…ó…óun ko …ďuri mo∆ī∆īude, fii wota …ďe laato timmu…ďe e …ďaawo men.
∆Āay wano ngal dental mawngal seedee…ďe no hundi en, bugito…óen kala dongal e junuubu ko falli en no wee…ďiri, dogiren wakkilaare dogudu ndu e…ď…ďana…óen ndun.

Punno…óen Iisaa, on won…óo da∆ī∆īere gom…óinal ngal, on timminoowo ngal. ∆Āay himo sutinoo weltaare maraniinde mo nden, o ja…ďuno *leggal altindiraangal ngal, o yawitii hersa, o joo…óii ka sengo …≤aamo jullere laamu Alla.
Miijitee fii on Ňča…≤…≤ii…óo ndee liddannde nde junuubanke'en liddii mo, fii wota ronkere he…ďu on haa …ďer…óe mon maaya.
E hin-le e nder gertagol mon junuubu ngol, on dartaaki haa ∆īii∆īan mon …óan hibbi.
Awa kadi on yejjitii kongol ngol Allaahu on wakkiliri on ngol wa …ďi…ď…ďe makko: ¬ę∆Āi…ó…óo an, wota a jogitor wurtannde Joomiraa…óo on no hayfiri, awa kadi wota …ďernde maa maayu nde o wurtu-maa.
Ko fii ko mo Joomiraa…óo on yi…ói, o wurtata, o yaggina kala mo o ja…ďi yo wonu …ďi…ó…óo makko.¬Ľ
Wakkilee tampereeji mon …óin, ko …óin woni on wurtude. Ko wa …ďi…ď…ďe Alla woni on jogitorde. Ko hombo woni …ďi…ó…óo mo ben mun wurtataa?
Kono si on woorike wurtannde nde fow he…ďata nden, haray ko on fattuu…ďe, hinaa on …ďi…ď…ďe.
∆Āay en he…ďii baabaa…ďe ka aduna …óoo wurtaynoo…ďe en, …ďe teddinno…óen, ko haa honto non haanu…óen yankinanaade Ben ruuhuuji men …óin fii no wuuriren!
Ko fii baabiraa…ďe men …ďen no wurtaynoo en e nder saa'ihun nii, …ďay …ďe tawno ko ko mo∆ī∆īi, kono Alla ko woni en wurtirde ko fii nafa men on tigi, fii no tawre…óen e laa…ďal makko ngal.
No fellitaa fewndo wurteede nandaa e huunde weltinnde, kono ko satteende. Kono …ďawto …óun, battane ngurndan feewu…óan won…óan e nder …ďuttu no maranii …ďen wurtaa…ďe.
Ko …óun wa…ói si mi wi'ay on, …ďantee juu…óe mon lo'u…óe …óen, sattinon koppi mon lo'u…ói …óin,
yo koy…óe mon …óen jokku laawi feewu…ói …óin, fii wota la∆īooje …óen worgito, kono …óe sella.
Etee no wondiron e fow e nder …ďuttu, wuuron e nder laa…ďal, ko fii …ďaawo maggal hay gooto yi'ataa Joomiraa…óo on.
Reenee fii wota hay gooto Ňčakkire mo∆ī∆īere Alla nden, wota …óa…óol haa…óungol woo kadi funtu, wona sabu jii…ďoldu haa raa…ďa buy e mon.
Reenee fii wota hay gooto e mon jeenu, maa wona keefeero wa *Iisu, on yeeyitunoo…óo afoyaagal mun ngal fii nafakka gooto.
Hi…óon andi, …ďawto …óun, wa fewndo ko o faalaa he…ďude du'aa ben makko on, o bugitano, ko fii o he…ďaano feere waylugol miijo ben makko ngon, fii kala hari himo …óa…ď…ďirde …óun gon…ói.
Ko fii onon, on …ďadaaki fello ngo waaweten meemude, e yiite hu…ď…ďunge e …óowdi duule e ni…ďe e nduluuru,
maa hito *liital, maa hawa ka *Isra'iilayankee…ďe …ďen nanunoo kan haa …ďe wi'i wota …ďe …ďeyditane hay kongol,
ko fii …ďe townataano sifa ndee yamiroore tii…óunde …óoo: ¬ęHay si mummunte meemiino ngon fello, warirteno kaa∆īe.¬Ľ
Hakkee ko …óun hul…ďininoo, Muusaa wi'i: ¬ęMi diwnii hakkee ko mi huli!¬Ľ
Kono onon, on …ďadike Fello *Siyuuna ngon e saare Alla Wuuru…óo on, …óun ko *Yerusalaam kammuyankeejo on, e guluuje malaa'ika mottondiri e nder weltaare.
On …ďadike dental dikkuruu…ďe Alla …ďen, …ďen …ďe tawata no windii ka kammuuli. On …ďadike Alla, on ∆Ěaawoowo yim…ďe …ďen fow, e ruuhuuji feewu…ďe timminaa…ďe …ďen.
On …ďadike Iisaa, on holnu…óo *ahadi heyri ndin, e ∆īii∆īan makko hibbaa…óan, …óan see…óitoore mun …ďuri mo∆ī∆īude …óan Haabiila …óan.

Awa reenee wota on salo he…óaade on Won…óo on yewtude. ∆Āen Isra'iilayankee…ďe, salinoo…ďe he…óaade on Wonnoo…óo …ďe yamirde ka hoore leydi, …ďe da…óaano lette …óen. E ko honno non woniranta en si en huccii on Won…óo en yewtude ka kammuuli dow?
On mo hito mun dimbi leydi ndin, wa…óii jooni ndii fodaari …óoo: ¬ęAwa mi dimbitoyay nde wootere kadi, hinaa non leydi ndin tun, kono hay kammu ngun.¬Ľ
Ngol daalol ¬ęnde wootere kadi¬Ľ no laa…ďi poy holli wonde kala ko tagaa dimboto, dilla, fii no goongaaji …ói gasataa dimbaade …óin luttira.
∆Āay laamu ngu hendoto…óen ngun hinaa dimbotoongu, weltano…óen Alla, kurkano…óen mo noone no welirta mo e nder teddungal e kulol.
Ko fii Alla men on ko yiite sunnoowe.
Yo giggol si…ó…óankaaku ngol duumo.
Wota on yejjitu wernugol. Ko fii e nder warrugol non wo…ď…ďe wernii malaa'ikaa…ďe, hara …ďe andaa.
Anditee fii kasoo…ďe …ďen, wa si tawii hi…óon sokidaa e ma…ď…ďe, e wonaa…ďe e tampineede …ďen, wa si tawii ko onon wonaa tampineede.
Yo mo kala teddin dewgal ngal, awa kadi yo ∆īettindir…ďe …ďen yonindiran, ko fii telen-ma …óon, Alla …≤aaway fijoo…ďe …ďen e jinoo…ďe …ďen.
Wota on ardinir ngurndan mon …óan giggol kaalisi, yondinoree ko jogi…óon kon fewndo …óoo. Ko fii Alla tigi no wi'i: ¬ęMi accitataa ma e mi tertotaako ma few.¬Ľ
Mo kala e men no waawi wi'ude e nder pellital: ¬ęKo Joomiraa…óo on woni faabo an ngon, mi hulataa. Ko hon…óun ne…ó…óo waawanimmi?¬Ľ
Anditee fii ardotoo…ďe on …ďen, …ďen fe…≤…≤inannoo…ďe on daaluyee Alla on, miijito…óon fii battane no …ďe wuuriri non, …≤embon gom…óinal ma…ď…ďe ngal.
Awa Iisaa Almasiihu on ko gooto, o waylotaako hanki e hande e haa poomaa.
Wota on ja…ďu kala noone janndeeji janani selna on. Ko fii no mo∆ī∆īi ka …ďernde nden tii…óiniree mo∆ī∆īere Alla nden, hara hinaa sariyaaji fii …≤aameteeji …ói nafaali huunde …ďen jokku…ďe …ói.
Ko fii hi…óen mari *layyorde nde tawata haananaa golloo…ďe ka *rewirdu adunayankeeru …≤aamugol ko sakkaa …óon kon.
Ko fii *yottinoo…ďe maw…ďe sadaka …ďen sakkorayno ∆īii∆īan ka nokkuure hormorde, kono tebbeeli …óin sunneteno ka …ďaawo ho…óo.
Ko …óun wa…ói si Iisaa kadi tampuno ka …ďaawo ho…óo fii *la…ď…ďinirgol jamaa on ∆īii∆īan makko …óan tigi.
Awa enen kadi, yalten ka …ďaawo ho…óo fii yahugol e makko, e hoore rondagol hersa ka o rondinoo kan.
Ko fii en maraa …óoo ho…óo tabitungo, kono hi…óen …óa…ď…ďude aroyayngo ngon.
E innde makko kanko Iisaa, duumo…óen e wa…óangol Alla sadaka mantoore, e maanaa sadaka yaltoowo e toni jantotoo…ói innde makko nden.
Awa wota on weddito e wa…óugol mo∆ī∆īere e wallindirgol, ko …óii woni sadakaaji …ói Alla ja…ďata weltora.

∆äoftee ardotoo…ďe on …ďen, yankinano…óon …ďe. Ko fii hi…ďe ayni fota wonkiiji mon …óin, wa hunitoytoo…ďe ka Alla. Awa etee …ďe wa…óa …óun e hoore weltaare, hara hinaa no mettirta …ďe. Si hinaa …óun, nafoytaa on.
Awa toranee men: me…óen felliti wonde me…óen mari …ďernde laa…ďunde e nder faalegol nawrude ngurndan amen …óan no feewiri e kala huunde.
Mi torike on fow tentinii toragol fii yo Allaahu on newnanan yiltitagol ka mon no yaawiri.
Yo Alla Jom ∆Āuttu on, on Artir…óo e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen Iisaa Joomi men, Ngaynaako Maw…óo baali …óin, rewrude e ∆īii∆īan *ahadi poomayankeeri ndin,
yo o wawnu on e kala ko mo∆ī∆īi fii wa…óugol faale makko on, o wa…óa e men ko welata mo, tippude e Iisaa Almasiihu on, on mo mangural wonani haa poomaa. Aamiina!
Mi torike on, yo musi…ď…ďe an, ja…ďugol ngol kongol wakkilinayngol, ko fii mi windanii on, mi ra…ď…ďin…óinii.
Awa andee wonde, Timotee, oo musi…ó…óo men, yaltinaama ka kaso. Si o hewtitii law, mi yaaday e makko, men yiida e mon.
Hiwranee lan ardotoo…ďe on …ďen fow e yim…ďe Alla …ďen fow. ∆Āee …ďe Italii salminii on.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere Joomiraa…óo on wonu e hoore mon on fow.
Salminaango an min Yaaquuba, oo jiyaa…óo Alla e Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi on, haa e …óii *bolondaaji sappoo e …ói…ói saakitii…ói e nder aduna on.
Ko onon yo musi…ď…ďe, si on rewrii e kala noone ndarndan…óe, haray jogitoree …óun weltaare fow,
ko fii hi…óon andi, ndarndagol gom…óinal mon ngal adday Ňča…≤…≤aare.
Kono bee Ňča…≤…≤aare nden wa…óa golle timmu…óe, fii no woniron mokobaa…ďe timmu…ďe, e hara on Ňčakkiraaka huunde.
Si go…ó…óo e mon Ňčakkira faamu, yo o toro …óun Alla, on okkay mo …óun. Ko fii kanko Alla ko Ye…óoowo fow no yaajiri e …ďaawo feloore.
Kono yo o toror mo gom…óinal ngal aldaa e sikkitaare. Ko fii on sikkitii…óo no wa'i wa morloo…óe ndiyan …óan ka baharu, …óe hendu ndun du…≤ata ∆īe∆īa.
Wota sifa on ne…ó…óo sikku hendoto go…ó…óun e juu…óe Joomiraa…óo on,
on ko ne…ó…óo sikkitii…óo, mo tabitaa e laawi mun …óin fow.
Yo musi…ó…óo miskiino on weltor ko Alla towni mo kon,
al…óu…óo on kadi weltora ko Alla tippini mo kon, …ďay fii makko on fe∆ī∆īiray wa piindi ngesa.
Si naange ngen fu…óii, nge toowidii e nguleendi magge muusundi ndin, hinge yornude ku…ói …óin, piindi majji on saama, Ňčari majji on bonta, ko non al…óu…ďe …ďen saamirta e nder golle ma…ď…ďe …óen.
Maloore wonanii on ne…ó…óo Ňča…≤…≤ii…óo ndarndan…óe …óen, ko fii si o dartike ndarndan…óe …óen, o hendoto *meetelol ngurndan, ngol Joomiraa…óo on fodi yi…óu…ďe mo …ďen.
Wota hay gooto wi'u e nder ko jarribetee kon: ¬ęKo Alla jarribii mi.¬Ľ Ko fii Alla jarribortaake ko boni, kanko kadi o jarribotaako hay gooto.
Nde jarriba…óen woo, ko himmeeji bon…ói …ói wondu…óen …óin woni en poo…óude murtina.
∆Āawto …óun, himme bon…óo on fu…óa haa rima junuubu, si junuubu on kadi heewii, o rima mayde.
Wota on …óaynito, yo musi…ď…ďe an yi…óaa…ďe,
kala dokkal mo∆ī∆īal e kala dokkal timmungal ko ka dow iwrani en, e immorde e Baabaajo ndayguuji …óin, on mo waylotaako, mo …óowdi mun dillataa,
on Woodintinir…óo en Daaluyee makko goongaajo on no o yi…óiri non, fii no laatoren dikkuruu…ďe e tagu makko ngun.
Andee …óun, yo musi…ď…ďe an yi…óaa…ďe, yo ne…ó…óo kala yaawu he…óaade, nenna si yewta, nenna si tikka.
Ko fii tikkannde ne…ó…óanke nden laatintaa peewal ngal Alla yi…ói ngal.
Awa sertee e kala ko tuuninta e kala bonki layuki, ja…ďiron newaare daaluyee aawaa…óo e mon on, …óun ko on waawu…óo dandude wonkiiji mon …óin.
Wonee huutoroo…ďe daaluyee on, hara hinaa on he…óotoo…ďe mo tun, si hinaa …óun, haray onon tigi on …óaynitoto woni.
Ko fii si go…ó…óo he…óike daaluyee on, o huutoraali mo, haray himo wa'i wa ne…ó…óo won…óo tintaade, yi'a yeeso mun ngon.
Si o gaynii ndaaritaade, o yahii, o yejjita kisan ko honno o wa'i.

Kono on wa…óu…óo gii…óe mun …óen ka nder sariya timmu…óo, …óun ko on sariya rin…óinoowo, o tabiti, hara hinaa fii he…óagol yejjita, kono hara ko huutorgol, on…óon wonay malaa…óo e nder kala ko o wa…óata.
On mo sikki ko dewo, e …ďaawo waawugol …óenngal mun ngal, haray on …óaynii hoore mun, ngal dewal ko meerewal.
Dewal laa…ďungal, ngal aldaa e koju ngal yeeso Alla Baabaajo on, ko dankagol aliyatiimaa…ďe …ďen e dankagol keynguu…ďe …ďen e nder satteendeeji ma…ď…ďe …óin, e rentagol e tuundiiji aduna …óin.
Musi…ď…ďe an, …ďay ko on gom…óin…ďe Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men mo darja wonani on, reenee e …ďurdindingol yim…ďe.
Si wattii…óo hurundaare kaŇčŇče, …ďornii conci dimi aru e naatude ka *moftal mon, baaso kadi …ďornii…óo conci yakkii…ói ara e naatude,
si on hittinii fii …ďornii…óo conci dimi on, on wi'ii mo: ¬ęOnon toolii mon ka nda…ó…óudi …óoo!¬Ľ, wi'on baaso on: ¬ęAn daro …óaa!¬Ľ, maa: ¬ęJoo…óo ka ley koy…óe an …óoo!¬Ľ,
e hara on wa…óaali sendondiral hakkunde mon onon tigi? E on …≤aawiraali miijooji bon…ói?

He…óitee, yo musi…ď…ďe an yi…óaa…ďe! E hara hinaa miskin…ďe …ďen ka aduna …óoo Alla su…ďii fii no …ďe wonira al…óu…ďe e nder gom…óinal ngal, e he…ďoo…ďe ge…ďal e laamu ngu o fodi yi…óu…ďe mo …ďen ngun?
Kono onon, on hersinii baaso on. E hara wonaa al…óu…ďe …ďen woni on tampinde, na…ďa on ka …≤aawir…ói?
E hinaa …ďen woni hoynoo…ďe innde teddunde nde innira…óon nden?
Kono si on …óoftike sariya maw…óo on, wano bindi …óin wi'iri non wonde: ¬ęYo a yi…óir …≤okondo maa on wano yi…óir…óaa hoore maa non¬Ľ, haray on wa…óii ko mo∆ī∆īi.
Kono si on …ďurdindinii yim…ďe …ďen, haray on wa…óii junuubu, Sariya on no jogori on wa bonnu…óo Sariya.
Ko …óun wa…ói, on mo yeddi yamiroore wootere e nder Sariya on, hay si o …óoftike …óeya heddii…óe fow, haray o wonii bonnu…óo Sariya on fow.
Ko fii on Wi'u…óo: ¬ęwota mo jeena¬Ľ, no wi'i kadi: ¬ęwota mo itta hoore.¬Ľ E hin-le si on wa…óaali jinaa, kono on ittii hoore, haray on wonii bonnu…óo Sariya on.
Awa yewtiree huuwiron wa yim…ďe …≤aawiroytee…ďe Sariya rin…óinoowo on.
Ko fii …≤aawoore nden aldanaa mo yurmetaake e yurmeende, kono yurmeende nden foolay …≤aawoore nden.
Musi…ď…ďe an, ko nafa hon…óun woodani ne…ó…óo wi'ugol himo mari gom…óinal, si o alaa …ďanginirde …óun kuu…óe? Taw si sifa ngal gom…óinal no waawi dandude mo?
Si musi…ó…óo men gorko maa bandiraawo men no holi, no Ňčakkiri …≤aametee kadi …≤ande woo,
go…ó…óo e mon ara e wi'ude …ďen: ¬ęYahee e jam, …ďorno…óon, …≤aamon haa haaron¬Ľ, e …ďaawo jonnugol …ďe ko …ďalli ma…ď…ďe …óin handi e mun kon, haray ko hon…óun …óun nafata?
Gom…óinal ngal kadi ko wano non: si ngal aldaa e kuu…óe, ko ngal mayngal kangal tigi.
Kono si go…ó…óo wi'ii: ¬ęAn hi…óa mari gom…óinal e min mi…óo mari kuu…óe¬Ľ, haray min mi wi'ay mo: ¬ęHollan gom…óinal maa ngal e …ďaawo kuu…óe, min non mi hollirte gom…óinal an ngal kuu…óe an …óen.¬Ľ
Hi…óa gom…óini ko Alla gooto woodi? No mo∆ī∆īi! Jinnaaji …óin kadi no gom…óiniri non, haa hi…ói diwna.
Ko an yo njofoojo! Hi…óa faalaa faamude wonde gom…óinal ngal aldaa e kuu…óe ko meerewal?
Enee, wonaa ko Ibraahiima, on maamiraawo men, wa…óunoo kon fewndo o wee…ďiti *Issaaqa …ďi…ó…óo makko on fii layyagol ka *layyorde kon wa…ói si o jogitoraa feewu…óo?
A yi'ii, gom…óinal ngal yaadii e kuu…óe makko …óen, awa kadi ko kuu…óe makko …óen timmini gom…óinal makko ngal.
Ko non ko bindi …óin wi'i kon laatori: ¬ęIbraahiima gom…óini Alla, ngal gom…óinal makko jogoranaa mo peewal¬Ľ, haa o noddaa gi…óo Alla.
On yi'ii, ko sabu kuu…óe …óen ne…ó…óo on jogoraa feewu…óo, hinaa sabu gom…óinal ngal tun.
Enee, oo cagaajo wi'etee…óo *Raabi, kanko kadi, taw si hinaa sabu kuu…óe …óen o jogoranoo feewu…óo fewndo ko o wernunoo nulanoo…ďe fii tefugol …ďen, o holli …ďe laawol goo ngol …ďe rewa?
Wano tawiri non …ďandu ndu aldaa e ruuhu ko mayndu, ko wano non kadi gom…óinal ngal aldaa e kuu…óe ko mayngal.
Musi…ď…ďe an, wota buy e mon himman jannugol, ko fii hi…óon andi enen jannoo…ďe …ďen en …≤aawete …≤aawoore …ďurnde sattude.
Ko fii en fow en wa…óay ellaaji …ói tawata ko nooneeji …óuu…óu…ói. On mo wa…óaali ella e nder kongu…ói, haray on ne…ó…óo ko timmu…óo, waawu…óo hu…ďindaade …ďandu mun ndun fow.
Si en wa…óii lagambe …óen ka kundule pucci …óin fii yo …ói …óofto en, haray en huutoray kadi …ďalli majji on fow.
Ndaaree kadi, …óee laa…óe e njan…óude mun, ko hendu dolnundu na…ďata …óe, hi…óe ardoree aalahun …ďurkun fan…óude ka na…ďoowo on faaliraa …óon.
Wano non, …óenngal kadi ko terun fan…óukun, kono hingal waawi mantorde piiji maw…ói. On yi'ii wano giitun tosokun waawi sunnirde buruure mawnde?
∆äenngal ngal kadi ko yiite, hingal heewi boneeji, hingal tawdaa e tere …ďandu men ndun, ngal tuuninay …ďandu ndun fow, ko ka yiite jahannama ngal hu…ď…ďinaa, ngal sunnay ngurndan men …óan fow.
Kala noone kulle, wano colli …óin e ko daasotoo kon e kulle …óen ka nder ndiyan, no hu…ďindoo, …óen-le ne…ó…óanke no hu…ďindii …óe.
Kono …óenngal, hay gooto waawataa ngal hu…ďindaade. Ko bone mo waawotaako hu…ďindaade, hingal heewi tooke warooje.
Ko kangal mantirten Ben men Joomiraa…óo on, ko kangal kadi hu…óirten yim…ďe tagaa…ďe e mbaadi Alla …ďen.
Ko e kon hunduko wooto du'aa e kuddi yaltata. Kono yo musi…ď…ďe, wota …óun wonir non.
Taw si ndiyan wel…óan e ndiyan haa…óu…óan no tubba e …ďundu wooturu, hara ko e ngayka woota?
Enee musi…ď…ďe an, hara ∆īibbehi no waawi rimude kaccu, maa piyahi rima ∆īibbe? Ko wano non kadi, …ďundu ndiyan lan…óan waawataa tubbinde ndiyan wel…óan.
Ko hombo e hakkunde mon mari faamu e hakkil? Yo o …ďanginir …óun jikku makko mo∆ī∆īo on wondude e kuu…óe newii…óe iwru…óe e faamu.
Kono si tawii hi…óon mari ka …ďer…óe mon nawliigu tii…óungu e haasidi, haray wota on mawnintino, e wota on yeddu goonga on.
Sifa ngun faamu hinaa ka kammu iwri few, ko ngu aduna e ngu ne…ó…óanke e ngu Ibuliisa.
Ko fii, kala ka nawliigu e haasidi woni, ko …óon kadi jii…ďoldu e kala noone kuu…óe bon…óe woni.

Kono faamu iwrungu ka Alla ngun, ko adii taho, ko ngu laa…ďungu, awa kadi ko ngu …ďuttu, ko ngu newiingu, ko ngu dee∆īinayngu, heewungu yurmeende e kuu…óe mo∆ī∆īe, ngu aldaa e …ďurnondiral e faasiqankaaku.
Ko tabintinoo…ďe …ďuttu …ďen aawata e nder …ďuttu kon, rimay peewal.
Ko honto …óee poodotire e …óee yeddondire hakkunde mon iwri? E hara hinaa faaleeji bon…ói woni wa…óude hare ka …ďer…óe mon?
Hi…óon himmani, kono on alaa he…ďude. Ko on waroo…ďe, ko on miilaa…ďe e …ďaawo waawugol he…ďude hay huunde. Hi…óon wondi e yeddondire e poo…óotiro. E hin-le on hendotaako, …ďay on alaa toraade,
maa hi…óon toraade, on alaa he…ďude, …ďay hi…óon tororde anniyee bon…óo fii no huutoriron …óun fii faaleeji mon.
Ko onon, yo jamaa jinoo…ďe! E on andaa yi…óugol aduna on ko a…≤ugol Alla? Awa si go…ó…óo no faalaa yi…óude aduna on, haray o wa…óitike ga…≤o Alla.
On sikku bindi …óin ko wi'i kon ko meere, wonde: ¬ęAlla no nawlani ruuhu mo o wa…ói e men on.¬Ľ?
Kono ko o …ďuri en ye…óude e ko mawni kon ko sulfu. Awa e hino ko bindi …óin wi'i kon: ¬ęAlla liddoto mawnintinii…ďe …ďen, o ye…óa jippin…ďe hoore mun …ďen sulfu.¬Ľ
Awa yankinanee Alla, darto…óon Ibuliisa, …óun o dogay, o wo…ó…óoo on.
∆Āadee Alla, …óun o …ďadoto on. La…ď…ďinee juu…óe mon …óen, yo onon junuubankee…ďe. La…ď…ďinon …ďer…óe mon …óen, yo onon sikkitii…ďe.
Woytee, yoomon, wullon. Yo jalee…óe mon …óen wontu yoomugol, weltaare mon nden wonta …ďi…óagol.
Jippinee hoore mon yeeso Joomiraa…óo on, …óun o …ďantoyay on.

Wota on …≤akkin …ďee …óoo maa …ďee …óaa, yo musi…ď…ďe an. Mo …≤akkinii musi…ó…óo mun, maa …≤aawii musi…ó…óo mun, haray ko Sariya on o …≤akkini, o …≤aawi. Si a …≤aawii-le Sariya on, haray hinaa a huutor…óo mo, kono ko a …≤aawoowo mo.
Ko fii ko Gooto pet woni Wa…óoowo Sariya …≤aawa, …óun ko on Waawu…óo dandude e mulude. An non, ko a hombo, si hi…óa …≤aawa …≤okondo maa?
Ko onon, yo wi'u…ďe jooni: ¬ęHande maa jango men yahay e ndee saare …óoo, men wona ton hitaande, men wa…óoya ton go…ó…óun, men he…ďa tono.¬Ľ
Onon on andaa toode no ngurndan mon …óan wonirta jango. Ko on norngal fee…≤ungal fii saa'ihun nii, …ďawto …óun muta.
Ko haanu…óon wi'ude: ¬ęMen wuuray, men wa…óa …óun…óoo maa …óun…óaa, si Joomiraa…óo on ja…ďii.¬Ľ
Kono jooni, hi…óon mawnintinaade e nder townitaare mon. Sifa nden mawnintinaare fow ko bonnde.
Si go…ó…óo no andi mo∆ī∆īere nde o haani wa…óude, o wa…óaali …óun, haray o wa…óii junuubu.
Jooni non, yo onon al…óu…ďe, wullee sowru tii…óundu, sabu tampereeji aroyay…ói e hoore mon …óin!
Ngalu mon ngun bonii, conci mon …óin moo∆īii,
kaŇčŇče mon …óen e kaalisi mon on kornii. Kori mun on immoyto seeditoo e hoore mon, …≤aamira …ďalli mon …óin wa yiite. On moo…ďii ngaluuji e nder …óee …≤alaa…óe sakkitore.
Njoddi ndi on yo…ďaali wa'u…ďe gese mon …óen ndin no woytaade e hoore mon. E woyaa…ói so…≤itu…ďe …ďen arii haa e noppi Joomiraa…óo Jom Baw…óe on.
On wuuririi ka aduna …óoo e nder mbelee…óe e ko foti. On fayinii hoore mon e ndee …≤alaande nde hirsete…óon e mun.
On …≤aawii, on warii feewu…ďe …ďe dartaaki on.
Awa mu…≤…≤ee, yo musi…ď…ďe an, haa nde Joomi on ari. Ndaaree no remoowo habbori co…≤al tii…óungal, ngal o habbori mu…≤al haa ndiyan setto e ndiyan dabbunde to…ď…ďa.
Onon kadi mu…≤…≤ee, tabintinon …ďer…óe mon …óen, ko fii ardu Joomi on ko …ďadii…óun.
Wota on Ňčermindir, yo musi…ď…ďe an, fii wota on …≤aawe, …ďay ∆Ěaawoowo on no darii ka yeeso dambugal.
Musi…ď…ďe an, ∆īettee misal tampere e mu…≤al …ďen annabaa…ďe yewtu…ďe e innde Joomiraa…óo on.

Ndaaree, hi…óen wi'a maloore wonanii …ďen Ňča…≤…≤ii…ďe. On nanii fii Ňča…≤…≤aare Ayyuuba nden no wowlee, awa kadi on yi'ii ko Joomiraa…óo on wa…óani mo kon ka sakkitorun. Ko fii Joomiraa…óo on ko heewu…óo giggol e yurmeende.

Ko adii kon taho, yo musi…ď…ďe an, wota on woondir kammu ngun maa leydi ndin, maa kala ko woni e woondoore. Ko yo ¬ęhiiyii¬Ľ mon on wonu ¬ęhiiyii¬Ľ, ¬ęoo'o¬Ľ mon on wona ¬ęoo'o¬Ľ, fii wota on wonu e nder …≤aawoore nden.
E hara go…ó…óo e mon no e nder tampere? Yo ontigi toro Alla. Kaa hara go…ó…óo e mon no e nder weltaare? Yo ootigi beytu.
E hara kadi go…ó…óo e mon no nawni? Yo ontigi noddu ardotoo…ďe *moftal ngal, …ďentigi toranoo mo e hoore juurugol nebban e hoore makko e innde Joomiraa…óo on.
Toraare wa…óiraande gom…óinal no sellina nawnu…óo. E hoore …óun, Joomiraa…óo on imminay mo. Si tawii ontigi no wa…ói junuubi, …ói yaafante mo.
Awa, qirritee junuubaaji mon …óin hakkunde mon, torondiranon kadi, fii no sellinire…óon. Torndeeji …ói aaden feewu…óo torii …óin ko dolnu…ói duncay…ói.
Ko fii Iiliiya kadi hari ko ne…ó…óo wa'unoo…óo wa men nii, nde o duuminoo e toraare fii wota ndiyan aru, …óan ronki arude ka hoore leydi e nder duu…ďi tati e lebbi jeegoo.
∆Āawto …óun kadi o torii, kammu ngun sammini ndiyan, onsay leydi ndin funtini ko rimata …ďi…ď…ďe.
Ko onon yo musi…ď…ďe an, si go…ó…óo e hakkunde mon selii goonga on, go…ó…óo artirii mo,
haray andee, on ittu…óo on junuubankeejo ka o selunoo ton, artiri mo ka laawol, haray o montii junuubaaji …óuu…óu…ói, o dandii wonkii mayde.
Immorde e an min Petruusu, *sahaabaajo Iisaa Almasiihu on, haa e …ďee su…ďaa…ďe Alla, tuŇčarankee…ďe e oo aduna, e nder …óee ley…óe Pontii e Galaasi e Kapadoosi e *Aazii e Bitinii.
Ko onon yo su…ďiranoo…ďe e…ď…ďoore Alla, on Ben men, e dow *la…ď…ďinireede Ruuhu makko on, fii …óoftagol Iisaa Almasiihu on, wiccee ∆īii∆īan makko …óan: yo mo∆ī∆īere e …ďuttu sowindirane on.

Mantoore wonanii Alla, Ben Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on. Ko yurmeende makko mawnde nden o ye…óiri en jibintineede sabu immintineede Iisaa Almasiihu on e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen fii no he…ďiren tama'u sellu…óo,
e fii no he…ďiren ndondi ndi bontataa, ndi tuunataa, ndi mbaadi mun waylotaako, maraniindi on ka kammu,
…óun ko onon …ďee …ďe Alla hiwiri bawgal mun sabu gom…óinal ngal fii kisiyee hebulii…óo fe…≤…≤ineede on ka saa'iiji sakkitori.
Ko …óun wonani on ndee weltaare tii…óunde, hay si tawii fewndo …óoo maa satteendeeji see…óa wona ko aanini on,

fii no gom…óinal mon ngal ndarndoree. Gom…óinal mon ngal-le no …ďuri kaŇčŇče hittude, …ďay kaŇčŇče ko ko mulata, …óen-le ko yiite ndarndoraa. Ko nii gom…óinal mon ngal wonirta maniniingal, darjingal, e teddungal …≤ande Iisaa Almasiihu on fee…≤itoyi.
On yi…óii mo kanko Iisaa e hoore on yi'aali mo, on hoolike mo kadi e …ďaawo yi'ugol mo. E hoore …óun, hi…óon hebbinori weltaare tii…óunde, nde wonkii woo waawataa sifaade fii mun,
…ďay hi…óon hendaade faandaare gom…óinal mon ngal, …óun ko kisiyee wonkiiji mon …óin.
Oo kisiyee ko huunde nde annabaa…ďe …ďen …óa…ď…ďitunoo tefi fii mun, …óun ko …ďee *hiitinoo…ďe fii oo sulfu sutii…óo on.

Hi…ďe …óa…ď…ďaynoo andugol ko e saa'i hombo maa ko honno ko Ruuhu *Almasiihu on andini …ďe kon wa…óiroyta, fewndo on Ruuhu won…óo e ma…ď…ďe hiitantonoo …ďe fii tampereeji he…ďoyaynoo…ói Almasiihu on …óin e darjaaji hikkotoo…ói e mun …óin.

∆Āe …ďanginanaa kadi wonde, wonaa fii ma…ď…ďe kam…ďe tigi …ďe wonnoo kurkanaade, kono ko fii mon, fewndo …ďe wowli fii …óii piiji …ói …ďee waajii…ďe on fii Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on yottiniri e mon fewndo …óoo *Ruuhu Senii…óo iwru…óo ka kammu on, …óin piiji …ói tawata hay malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen tigi no faalaa andude fii mun.
Ko …óun si mi wi'ay on, hebulinee hakkillaaji mon …óin, waawon hoore mon, wa…óon tama'u mon on fow e oo sulfu mo ye…óoyte…óon …≤ande Iisaa Almasiihu on fee…≤itoyi.
Wa'ee wa paykoy …óoftiikoy, hara on accaali hande kadi …óiya himmeeji ardoo on, …óun ko …óin …ói wonduno…óon e nder angal andugol mon.
Kono …ďay Noddu…óo on on ko Laa…ďu…óo, onon kadi wonee laa…ďu…ďe e nder jikku mon on,
ko fii e hino ko Allaahu on daali kon ka deftere: ¬ęWonee laa…ďu…ďe, ko fii ko mi Laa…ďu…óo.¬Ľ
∆Āay on noddirii oo Fonnu…óo fow ¬ęBaaba¬Ľ, …óun ko on ∆Ěaawiroowo mo bee embere kuu…óe mun …óen, haray yo on hulu mo fannin hi…óon ko…óii aduna on.
Hi…óon andi wonaa huunde bonaynde wano kaalisi maa kaŇčŇče sottira…óon e nder …óan ngurndan meerejan …óan ronuno…óon baabiraa…ďe mon …ďen,
kono ko ∆īii∆īan Almasiihu hittu…óan …óan, on wa'itay…óo wa baalun kun alaa ella, alaa waadere,
on adaa…óo to…ó…óeede ado fu…ó…óoode aduna on, kono o fe…≤…≤inaa ka saa'iiji sakkitori fii mon.
Ko sabu on gom…óinir…óon Alla, on Immintin…óo mo e hakkunde may…ďe …ďen, ye…ói mo kadi mangural, fii no gom…óinal mon ngal e tama'u mon on fawora e Alla.
∆Āay on la…ď…ďinirii hoore mon …óoftagol goonga on, haa on he…ďii giggol si…ó…óankaaku sellungol, jooni yi…óindiree giggol tii…óungol ka …ďer…óe mon,
…óun ko onon …ďee jibinaa…ďe kesun, …ďe tawata hinaa awdi muloori kono ko luttoori, immorde e daaluyee Alla wuuru…óo tabiti on.
E hin-le: ¬ęKala ne…ó…óo no wa'i wa hu…óo, darja makko on fow kadi no wa'i wa piindi kon hu…óo. Hu…óo kon no yooriri, piindi ndin no saamude,
kono daaluyee Joomiraa…óo on ko luttay…óo haa poomaa.¬Ľ On daaluyee ko Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo mo fe…≤…≤inana…óon on.
Awa tertee kala bonki e kala kippugu e faasiqiyaagal e nawliigu e kala …≤oore,
yi…óiron daaluyee on wano boobo kecco yi…óiri …ďiraa…óan kencan laa…ďu…óan, fii no mawniron e nder kisiyee on sabu makko,
…ďay on mettike, on andii Joomi on no mo∆ī∆īi.
∆Āadee mo kanko ndee hayre wuurunde, nde yim…ďe …ďen bugitinoo, …óun ko on mo Alla su…ďii, hittu…óo yeeso makko.

∆Āay onon kadi hi…óon wa'i wa kaa∆īe wuuru…óe mahindiraa…óe, woni suudu ndu Ruuhu Alla on ho…ói e mun, fii wonugol *yottinoo…ďe sadaka laa…ďu…ďe fii no wa…óiranon Alla sadakaaji ruuhuyankeeji, hara ko no hawrirani mo, rewrude e Iisaa Almasiihu on.
E hin-le no windii wondema: ¬ęMi…óo tippinde ka hoore Fello *Siyuuna hayre wonaynde ka so…ď…ďundu, …óun-le ko nden su…ďaande hittunde. Kala gom…óin…óo e makko hersinoytaake.¬Ľ
Nden hayre no hittani on, onon …ďee gom…óin…ďe. Kono fii …ďe gom…óinaa …ďen: ¬ęHayre nde mahoo…ďe …ďen hawkunoo nden wontii hittunde ka so…ď…ďundu,
hayre fegginaynde, e fetere li…ďaynde.¬Ľ ∆Āe feggike e mayre sabu yeddugol ma…ď…ďe daaluyee on, tawde ko …óun …ďe muuyananoo.

Kono onon, ko on le…≤ol su…ďaangol, yottinoo…ďe sadaka fii *laamu Alla ngun, awa kadi ko on jamaa laa…ďu…óo, yim…ďe jeyaa…ďe ka Alla fii ko fe…≤…≤ina kuu…óe mo∆ī∆īe maw…óe on Noddu…óo on fii yo on yaltu ka niwre, aron ka ndaygu makko hawniingu.
∆äun ko onon …ďee …ďe tawata hari hinaa jamaa Alla, kono jooni ko on jamaa makko, …óun ko onon …ďee …ďe he…ďaano yurmeende makko nden, kono jooni on he…ďii yurmeende makko nden.
Ko onon, yo yi…ď…ďe, ho…ď…ďe janan…ďe, mi wakkilinii on e reenagol …óii himmeeji ne…ó…óanke, …ói tawata ko ha…ďooji wonkii.
Wuuriree no mo∆ī∆īiri e hakkunde …ďe gom…óinaa …ďen fii nde hi…ďe too…≤ira on wa wa…óoo…ďe ko boni, yo …ďe yi'u kuu…óe mon mo∆ī∆īe …óen, …óun …ďe mawninoyay Alla nde o aroyi.
Sabu Joomiraa…óo on, yankinanee kala laamu ne…ó…óanke, woni lan…óo maw…óo, mar…óo mbawdi,
woni …ďen …ďe o lammini fii donkingol …ďen wa…óoo…ďe ko boni, manta …ďen wa…óoo…ďe ko mo∆ī∆īi.
Awa, ko Alla faalaa e nder ko wa…óoton ko mo∆ī∆īi kon, ko yo …óun …óahu fankina majju…ďe …ďe alaa hakkil …ďen.
Wuuriree wa rindinaa…ďe, e …ďaawo wa…óugol ngun ndimu wirngallo buumayngo bonki, kono wa kurkantoo…ďe Alla.
Teddinee fow, yi…óon musi…ď…ďe gom…óin…ďe …ďen, hulon Alla, teddinon lan…óo on.
Jiyaa…ďe, yankinanee jey…ďe on …ďen e nder teddungal timmungal, hara hinaa non mo∆ī∆īu…ďe …ďen tun e newii…ďe …ďen, kono e mettu…ďe fii …ďen kadi,
ko fii, si e nder miijitagol fii Alla, ontigi Ňča…≤…≤ike tampere nde ontigi foddaa, …óun ko huunde mo∆ī∆īere.
Ko hongal e teddungal mar…óon, si on mu…≤…≤ike tampere sabu wa…óugol junuubu? Kono si on mu…≤…≤ike tampere sabu wa…óugol ko mo∆ī∆īi, …óun ko huunde mo∆ī∆īere yeeso Alla.
Awa, ko fii …óun noddira…óon, ko fii *Almasiihu on kadi tampii fii mon, o accanii on misal, fii no jokkiron batteeji makko …óin,
…óun ko on ¬ęmo wa…óaali junuubu, mo toni mun jantaaki fenaande¬Ľ,
…óun ko on hoynaa…óo mo yottaaki, tampinaa…óo mo kambaali, kono watti fow e juu…óe on ∆Ěaawoowo no feewiri non.

O ronditanike en junuubaaji men …óin ka …ďandu makko, …óun ko ka *leggal altindiraangal, fii no maayiren e telen-ma junuubaaji …óin, wuuren ngurndan feewu…óan, ko fii, ko sabu barmeeji makko …óin sellinira…óon.
∆Āay hari hi…óon wa'i wa baali saakitaa…ói, kono jooni on artiraama ka Ngaynaako, Hiwoowo wonkiiji mon …óin.
Onon kadi yo rew…ďe wano non, mo kala e mon yo yankinano moodi mun. ∆äun si wo…ď…ďe e ma…ď…ďe …óoftaaki daaluyee on, …ďe gom…óiniray sabu kuu…óe rew…ďe ma…ď…ďe …ďen e …ďaawo kongol,
e nder yi'ugol ma…ď…ďe jikku mon laa…ďu…óo wondu…óo e teddungal on.
Wota on fotin ko woni e kene kon, wano mooragol e cu…óorgol kaŇčŇče e conci dimi.
Kono yo Ňčari mon kin wonu ko marii ka …ďernde, hara ko Ňčari halal ki bonataa, ki jikku newii…óo dee∆īu…óo. Ko …óun …ďuri hittude yeeso Alla.
Ko nii rew…ďe …ďaawo …óoo laa…ďu…ďe, tan∆īinornoo…ďe Alla …ďen, parornoo, …ďe yankinanii moodi…ď…ďe ma…ď…ďe …ďen,
wano Saarata non, on …óoftinoo…óo Ibraahiima, wi'aynoo…óo mo koohoojo makko. Onon kadi on laatoto jiw…ďe Saarata si on wa…óii ko mo∆ī∆īi, e …ďaawo on ja…ďude jii…ďireede kulol woo.

Onon moodi…ď…ďe …ďen kadi wano non, mo kala e mon yo wondir e sonnaajo mun on e hoore andugol wonde rew…ďe …ďen ko …ďe ne…ó…óanke …ďur…ďe lo'ude. Teddiniron …ďe wa ronidoo…ďe e mon ngurndan …óan Alla ye…ói on …óan, fii wota hay huunde ha…óu torndeeji mon …óin.
Ka rawnoode, on fow he…ďee miijo wooto e giggol gootol, heewon giggol si…ó…óankaaku e yurmeende e angal mawnintinaare.
Wota bone woo yottore bone, maa yennee yottoo, kono ka liddu …óun, onon ko yo on du'ano, ko fii ko …óun noddira…óon fii no roniron barki kin.
Ko fii: ¬ęSi tawii go…ó…óo no faalaa wuurude ngurndan wel…óan, e yi'ugol …≤alaa…óe hettaare, haray yo ontigi reenu …óenngal mun ngal e wowlugol ko boni, o reena toni makko …óin e janfagol.
Yo ontigi wo…ó…óito ko boni, o wa…óa ko mo∆ī∆īi, o …óa…ď…ďita …ďuttu on, o jokka …óun,
ko fii gii…óe Joomiraa…óo on no e hoore feewu…ďe …ďen, awa kadi noppi makko …óin no udditanii toraaje ma…ď…ďe …óen, kono yeeso Joomiraa…óo on no huccana …ďen wa…óoo…ďe bone.¬Ľ
Ko hombo tampinta on, si on himmanii wa…óugol ko mo∆ī∆īi?
∆äun-le wuren hay si on tampii fii peewal ngal, on maloyte. Awa wota on hulu yim…ďe …ďen, wota on laato maapii…ďe.
Hormoree *Almasiihu on ka …ďer…óe mon wa Joomi on. Wonee …≤ande woo hebulii…ďe fii jaabagol landotoo…ďe on dalil tama'u mon on …ďen.

Wa…óiron …óun newaare e teddungal e nder …ďernde mon laa…ďunde nden, fii yo won…ďe on wowlude ko boni e hoore jikku mon mo∆ī∆īo on e telen-ma Almasiihu on, he…ďoy ko hersinta …ďe e fee kongu…ói ma…ď…ďe …óin.
Awa kadi, ko …ďuri ko tampugol sabu wa…óugol ko mo∆ī∆īi, si tawii …óun ko faale Alla, edii tampugol sabu wa…óugol ko boni.
E hin-le Almasiihu on kadi maayii fii junuubaaji …óin nde wootere ko yoni haa poomaa, on Feewu…óo fii …ďe feewaa …ďen, fii addugol on e Alla. O waraama ka …ďandu, o wurnitiraama Ruuhu Allaahu on.
Ko on Ruuhu o yaari, o waajoyii ruuhuuji won…ďe ka kaso …ďen,

…óun ko …ďee murtunoo…ďe wa fewndo tawata mu…≤al Alla ngal no …ďeydii ka …≤alaa…óe …óe Nuuhu mo∆ī∆īinaynoo laana kan e mun. Ko yim…ďe see…óaa…ďe nii, e maanaa …ďe njeetato, …ďe dandiraa rewugol ka ndiyan.

∆äun ko misal *lootagol maande kisiyee wona…óon dandireede fewndo …óoo. ∆äun wonaa lootugol tuundi …ďandu ndun, kono ko aadanorgol Alla …ďernde laa…ďunde. ∆äun hisiniri on immintineede Iisaa Almasiihu on,
on ∆≥entu…óo ka kammu, wonir…óo ka sengo …≤aamo Alla, on mo malaa'ikaa…ďe …ďen e baw…óe …óen e doole …óen yankinanaa.
∆Āay *Almasiihu on tampii ka …ďandu mun, onon kadi dolnoree e ngon miijo wooto, (ko fii on tampu…óo e …ďandu seedii e faale wa…óugol junuubu),
fii no wuuriron wano Alla faaliraa non, hara hinaa e himmeeji ne…ó…óanke, yeru saa'i heddanii…óo on wuuridugol e …ďandu on.

Awa e saa'i fe∆ī∆īunoo…óo on, on …ďooyii wa…óude ko …ďe gom…óinaa …ďen yi…ói wa…óude kon, fewndo jokkondir…óon e ma…ď…ďe e nder jii…ďaare e himmeeji bon…ói e mandilugol e *fasaadu e mottondirgol ka mandiletee e dewal sanamuuji harmungal.
Kono jooni …ďe tawi no Ňčal…óini …ďe ko on alaa jokkondirde e ma…ď…ďe hande kadi e telen-ma nden …ďoylaare tii…óunde kon. Ko …óun wa…ói si hi…ďe hoynude on.
Awa …ďe hunitoyto yeeso on Hebulanii…óo …≤aawugol wur…ďe e may…ďe.
Ko …óun wa…ói si hay may…ďe …ďen fe…≤…≤inanaa Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo on, fii nde …ďe …≤aawiroyaa wa ne…ó…óanke ka …ďandu, yo …ďe wuuroy ka ruuhu wano Alla wuuriri non.
Lannoode piiji …óin fow hewtii. Awa wonee hakkilan…ďe waawon hoore mon fii no waawiron tororde.
Ko adii kon, yi…óindiree giggol tabitungol, ko fii giggol ngol no monta adadu junuubaaji ujune ujune.
Tolnindiree e …ďaawo dukindirgol.
Awa yo mo kala e mon kurkoran heddii…ďe …ďen dokkal ngal o he…ďi ngal, …óun on wonay halfinaa…ďe mo∆ī∆īere Alla yaajunde nden.

Yo taw non, mo yewtay e hakkunde mon, ko daaluyeeji Alla …óin o woni yewtirde. Mo kurkoto kadi e hakkunde mon yo taw ko mbawdi ndi Allaahu on okki mo ndin woni ko o kurkori. ∆äun fow ko fii yo mantoore wonan Alla, e innde Iisaa Almasiihu on, on mo mangural e bawgal wonani haa pooma. Aamiina!
Ko onon, yo yi…ď…ďe, wota on Ňčal…óir nguli he…ďuki on kin fii ndarndegol, wa si tawii ko huunde heyre he…ďi on.
Kono weltoree tawdeede e tampereeji Almasiihu on …óin, fii no he…ďiroyon kadi weltaare …≤ande fee…≤ugol mangu makko ngun.
Si on hoynaama fii innde Almasiihu on, haray ko on malaa…ďe, ko fii Ruuhu darjin…óo on, …óun ko on Ruuhu Alla, no e hoore mon.
Si go…ó…óo e mon tampinaama, wonaa yo taw ko fii himo itti hoore, maa himo wujji, maa himo wa…ói ko boni, maa himo ukkii e ko wonaa haaju makko.
Kono si tawii o tampinaama sabu ko mo Almasiihu on, haray wota ontigi hersir …óun, kono yo o mawnin Alla sabu nden innde.
Jooni non, saa'i fu…ó…óoode …≤aawoore nden hewtii, nde fu…ó…óora yim…ďe Alla …ďen. Si tawii ko enen nde fu…ó…óori, haray ko honno sakkitoode …ďen …ďe …óoftanooki Kibaaru Mo∆ī∆īo Alla on wa'oyta?
Si tawii non feewu…óo on dandiraama karahan, haray ko honno woniranta mo rewataa Alla on e junuubankeejo on?
∆äun haray, yo won…ďe tampude no yaadiri e kodduruyee Alla on duumo e wa…óugol ko mo∆ī∆īi, …ďe watta wonkiiji ma…ď…ďe …óin e juu…óe Tagu…óo on, …óun ko on Sella-Findeejo.
Awa jooni mi…óo yewtude ardotoo…ďe *moftal won…ďe hakkunde mon …ďen. Min kadi ko mi ardotoo…óo, e seedeejo tampereeji *Almasiihu on, e he…ďoowo ge…ďal e darja fe…≤…≤inoytee…óo on. Mi wakkilinii on
aynugol wuro ngo Alla halfini on ngon, hara hinaa e hoore karheede, kono hara ko no Alla yi…óiri non e hoore …ďernde laa…ďunde, hara on wa…óiraali …óun miile, kono hara ko e anniyee mo∆ī∆īo.
Wota on hollu mbawdi e hoore …ďe halfina…óon …ďen, kono wonanon wuro ngon misal.
∆äun, nde Hooreejo Ngaynaakoo…ďe …ďen fee…≤oyi, on hendoyto *meetelol darja, ngol Ňčari mun bontataa haa poomaa.
Onon kadi sukaa…ďe wano non, yankinanee ardotoo…ďe moftal ngal, mo kala e mon jippina hoore mun yeeso oya, ko fii: ¬ęAlla liddoto mawnintinii…ďe …ďen, kono o ye…óa jippin…ďe hoore mun …ďen sulfu.¬Ľ
Awa, jippinee hoore mon e ley jungo Alla dolnungo ngon fii yo o …ďantoy on e saa'i mo o to…ó…óii on.
Fawee anndeeji mon …óin fow e hoore makko, ko fii o kippay fii mon.
Wonon hakkilan…ďe e reenii…ďe, ko fii liddotoo…óo on on, …óun ko Ibuliisa, no wa…óude yaha ara, riggora wa ngayuuri, hara no …óa…ď…ďa ko seekita.
Dartoree mo kanko Ibuliisa no tii…óiri e nder gom…óinal ngal, e hoore yo on andu ko tampereeji gooti fawa…óon onon e musi…ď…ďe mon won…ďe e nder aduna on fow.

Kono si on tampii e nder saa'ihun nii, Alla Jom sulfu on, on Noddu…óo on ka darja makko poomayankeejo on e nder humondiral e Iisaa Almasiihu on, o heydintinoyay on kanko tigi, o tabintina on, o tii…óinoya on, o wa…óa on …ďe dillintaako.
Ko kanko bawgal wonani haa poomaa. Aamiina!

Ko e dow ballal Silaasi, oo musi…ó…óo sella-findeejo, mi windirani on nduu …ďatakuru ra…ď…ďi…óundu, fii wakkilingol on e fii seedintingol wonde ko …óun…óoo woni mo∆ī∆īere Alla haqiiqaare nden, awa humee e mayre.
Su…ďaa…ďe won…ďe *Baabiila …ďen e Markuusa …ďi…ó…óo an on salminii on.
Awa hiwrondiree lunnondiral giggol si…ó…óankaaku. Yo …ďuttu wonan on, onon humondir…ďe e Almasiihu on …ďen fow.

Immorde e an min Sim'uunu Petruusu, *sahaabaajo e kurkaadu Iisaa Almasiihu on, haa e …ďee hendii…ďe gom…óinal fotayngal hittude e ngal amen ngal, immorde e peewal Alla men e Dandoowo on, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on.
Yo mo∆ī∆īere e …ďuttu sowindirane on e hoore andugol Alla e Iisaa Joomi men on.
Ko bawgal makko ngal, Alla ye…óiri en kala ko handu…óen fii ngurndan e wuurirgol wano o faaliraa non, e nder andingol en on Noddir…óo en mangural mun ngal e mo∆ī∆īuki mun kin.

Ko nii o ye…óiri en fodaariiji …ďur…ói hittude e …ďur…ói mawnude …óin, fii, tippude e …óin fodaariiji, no tawdire…óon e jikku makko on, kanko Alla, …óun ko onon fuutinoo…ďe …ďoylaare aduna iwrunde e himmeeji bon…ói.
Ko sabu …óun wa…ói, geree …ďeyditon e gom…óinal mon ngal jikku mo∆ī∆īo, e hoore jikku mo∆ī∆īo on kadi …ďeyditon …óon gandal,
e hoore gandal ngal kadi …ďeyditon waawugol hoore mun, e hoore waawugol hoore mun ngol kadi …ďeyditon Ňča…≤…≤agol, e hoore Ňča…≤…≤agol ngol kadi …ďeyditon wuurirgol wano Alla faaliraa non,
e hoore wuurirgol wano Alla faaliraa non …ďeyditon giggol si…ó…óankaaku, e hoore giggol si…ó…óankaaku ngol …ďeyditon giggol.
Si …óii jikkuuji …óoo sowondirii e mon, …ói ha…óay on wonude meerentee…ďe …ďe alaa battane mo∆ī∆īe fii andugol Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on.
Kono mo aldaa e …óin, haray ko bun…óo, mo felsataa, yejjitu…óo ko junuubaaji mun …óin la…ď…ďinanoo kon.
Ko …óun wa…ói, yo musi…ď…ďe, …ďurtee wakkilaade fii haqinqingol noddaandu ndu nodda…óon ndun e ko su…ďa…óon kon. Si on warrii non, on yanataa e nder bone few.
Ko nii newnirante…óon no yaajiri naatugol ka laamateeri poomayankeeri Joomi men on, on Dandoowo, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on.
Ko …óun wa…ói si soono woo mi andintinay on fii …óii piiji, hay si tawii hi…óon andi …ói e hi…óon tabiti e goonga mo hendi…óon on.
Mi…óo sikki no haananimmi ka mi jokka andintingol on, fannin mi…óo e nduu togooru, …óun ko …ďandu an ndun,
ko fii mi…óo andi mi sertay jooni e nduu …ďandu maayooru, wano Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on, …ďanginiranimmi non.
Ko …óun wa…ói si mi etoto fota, fii hay si mi iwoyii, no anditiroyon …óii piiji.
Awa, hinaa men …ďaaror…ďe taariikaaji sinciraa…ói ∆īoyre, fewndo ko men …ďanginani on ardu Iisaa Almasiihu Joomi men on e bawgal makko ngal. Kono men yi'irii gite amen …óen tigi mangu makko ngun.

Ko fii o hendike e juu…óe Alla Baabaajo on teddungal e darja fewndo ko o nanunoo hawa iwrude ka darja heewu…óo …ďural on, ko Allaahu on daalani mo: ¬ęOo …óoo ko ∆Āi…ó…óo an yi…óaa…óo, mo mi weltori on.¬Ľ
Menen kadi, men nanii ngol kongol iwrungol ka kammu, fewndo men wondi e makko ka hoore fello hormorteengo.

Awa me…óen …ďuri fellitude fii kongu…ói …ói annabaa…ďe …ďen longinaa …óin, …óin …ói tawata si on wattanii yiila, haray on wa…óii ko mo∆ī∆īi, …ďay …óin kongu…ói no wa'i wa lampu hu…ď…ďu…óo e nokkuure ni…ď…ďitunde, haa nde fajiri on feeri, jaawiire nden toowi ndaygini …ďer…óe mon …óen.
Ko adii kon, andee wonde firo kongu…ói …ói annabaa…ďe …ďen windi …óin, …óun ko daaluyeeji …ói …ďe longinaa …óin, hinaa e ne…ó…óanke iwri.
Ko fii kala kongol longinaangol hinaa e miijo ne…ó…óanke iwi, kono ko *Ruuhu Senii…óo on yim…ďe …ďen haaliri ko Alla longini …ďe kon.

Woodiino e hakkunde jamaa on wa…óitii…ďe annabaa…ďe. Jannoo…ďe fenaande woniroyay non e hakkunde mon onon kadi, hara hi…ďe …ďisa janndeeji fenaandeeji e nder ko …ďe jannata kon, nawray…ói e halkaare. ∆Āe yedda on Sooditu…óo …ďe, …óun ko Joomi on. Ko nii …ďe poo…óirta e ma…ď…ďe halakuyee yaawu…óo.
Buy jokkoyay jii…ďaare ma…ď…ďe nden, laawol goonga on hoynoyee sabu ma…ď…ďe.
Immorde e miile ma…ď…ďe …óen, …ďe hiiliroya on kongu…ói sincaa…ói. Kono gila nee…ďii ko …ďe happanaa kon no …ďadaade tun, awa hayrannde ma…ď…ďe nden ŇčoŇčaa.
Ko fii Alla dandaali malaa'ikaa…ďe wa…óunoo…ďe junuubu …ďen, kono o nangi …ďe, o bugii ka yiite jahannama ka …ďe jolkaa …óon e nder niwre, …ďe jogoraa …óon fii …≤aaweede.

O dandaali kadi …ďeya yim…ďe aran…ďe, kono ko njeetato o acci e ma…ď…ďe, go…ó…óo on ko Nuuhu, on waajotonoo…óo fii peewal ngal, fewndo ko Allaahu on acciti waamere nden e hoore jamaa …ďe rewataa mo …ďen.
O happani kadi …óee ca'e Saduuma e *Amuura mulugol …óe, watta …óe ndoondi, fii wa…óangol …ďe rewataa mo …ďen kanko Alla misal.
Kono o dandi Luutu feewu…óo on, on mo …ďernde mun wondunoo e sokola tii…óu…óo sabu jikku jii…ďii…óo …ďee bon…ďe,
ko fii on ko feewu…óo ho…óunoo…óo hakkunde ma…ď…ďe, mo wonkii mun tampintenoo …≤ande woo …≤ande sabu angal peewal ngal o yi'aynoo ngal e ngal o nanaynoo ngal.
Awa …óun…óoo fow no holli ko Joomiraa…óo on andi ko honno o dandirta yim…ďe gom…óin…ďe …ďen ndarndeede, o donkina …ďe feewaa …ďen haa …≤ande …≤aawoore nden,
tentinii …ďen jokku…ďe himmeeji tuunu…ói …ďalli mun, hoyna laamu Joomiraa…óo on, …óun ko …ďee suusu…ďe reedu, mawnintinii…ďe, …ďe hulataa aybinde ruuhuuji …óin ka kammu.
E hin-le malaa'ikaa…ďe, …ďur…ďe …ďe doole e mbawdi …ďen, …≤aawiraali …ďen yim…ďe hoyre yeeso Joomiraa…óo on.
Kono …ďen jannoo…ďe fenaandee…ďe ko wa'u…ďe wa kulle buruure …óe alaa miijoo-miccoo, tagiraa…óe fii nangeede mulee, ko fii hi…ďe hoynude ko …ďe andaa. ∆Āe muliray wa kulle buruure nii,

ko bone wonata njoddi boneeji ma…ď…ďe …óin. ∆Āe tawi faale ma…ď…ďe on ko ji…≤angol mbelee…óe aduna tumbere …≤alorma. Ko …ďe wa'u…ďe wa ella e waadere, …ďay hi…ďe weltora …óaynugol on, hay nde hi…ďe …≤aamida e mon.

Gite ma…ď…ďe …óen no heewi jinaa, awa kadi …ďe haa…ďataa wa…óugol junuubu. Hi…ďe poo…óa wonkiiji …ói tabitaa …óin, nawra …ói e ko boni. ∆Āer…óe …ďen jannoo…ďe fenaandee…ďe no eltiraa miile, …ďen ko …ďe fay…ďe hu…óaa…ďe,
…ďay …ďe accitii laawol feewungol ngol, …ďe majjirii sabu jokkugol laawol Bal'ama ngol, on …ďi…ó…óo Be'uura, yi…óunoo…óo njoddi he…ďorndi bonki.
Kono o feliraa sabu geddi makko …óin tigi, …óin geddi woni sabu haa mbabun kun, …óun ko mummuntehun kun, wowliri wa ne…ó…óo, …óun ha…ói on annabaajo wa…óugol kuugal feetere.
∆Āen ko …ďe …ďulli …ói alaa ndiyan, ko …ďe duule …óe hendu ra…óotoo, …ďen no maranaa niwre …ďurnde tekkude nden.
Immorde e yewtereeji ma…ď…ďe manti e mehi, hi…ďe huutora himmeeji jii…ďaare …ďandu fii poo…óugol …ďen fuutor…ďe karahan e juu…óe wuuru…ďe e majjere …ďen.
Hi…ďe foda …ďe ndimu, e hin-le kam…ďe tigi ko …ďe maccu…ďe ko nawrata e halkaare, ko fii mo kala ko maccu…óo ko fooli …óun kon.

Ko fii si tawii, …ďawto fuutagol tuundiiji oo aduna sabu andugol ma…ď…ďe Joomi on e on Dandoowo, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on, si …ďe nangike kadi e pircol …óin tuundiiji haa …ói foolii …ďe, haray sakkitorde ma…ď…ďe nden …ďuray aranere nden bonude.
No …ďurani …ďe ka tawata …ďe andaano laawol peewal ngol, edii, andugol ngol, sela yamiroore hormorteende nde …ďe andinaa nden.

∆äun haray …ďe tentinii ko ngol tindol goongawol wi'i kon wonde: ¬ęSaa'i kala bareeru ndun yiltitanto ko ndu tuutunoo kon¬Ľ, awa kadi: ¬ęSaa'i kala kosewii arngii e looteede ngin ruttitoto e rukagol ka loope.¬Ľ
Awa e hino …ďatakuru …óimmuru ndu mi windani on ndun, yo yi…ď…ďe. E nder majji …ói …ói…óii non, mi windiranii on …ói fii andintingol on, walla on he…ďon miijooji laa…ďu…ói,
fii no anditiron kongu…ói …ói annabaa…ďe laa…ďu…ďe …ďen *hiitinoo …óin, e yamiroore Joomi on e Dandoowo en on, nden nde sahaabaa…ďe …ďen hewtini on.
Ko adii kon, andee wonde ka …≤alaa…óe sakkitore, yawitii…ďe aroyay heewu…ďe jalnori, wuuriroyay…ďe himmeeji ma…ď…ďe …óin,
hara hi…ďe wi'oya: ¬ęKo honto ardu makko fodanoondu ndun woni? Ko fii gila baabiraa…ďe …ďen maayi, fow no wa'i wano wa'unoo non gila aduna on fu…ó…óii.¬Ľ
Kono …ďe tewi …ďe yejjiti wonde, ko daaluyee Alla on wa…ói si kammuuli …óin e leydi ndin woodiranoo, leydi ndin suutaa e ndiyan, ndi mo∆ī∆īiniraa ndiyan.
Ko ndiyan kadi aduna fe∆ī∆īunoo…óo on muliraa ndiyan waamere.
Kono ko on daaluyee Alla kadi wa…ói si kammuuli fewndii…ói …óin e aduna fewndii…óo on maranaa yiite ngen …≤ande …ďe rewataa Alla …ďen …≤aawetee halkee.
Kono no woodi to…ď…ďere nde on haanaa yejjitude, yo yi…ď…ďe: …≤allal gootal ka Joomiraa…óo on ko wa duu…ďi wuluure, awa kadi duu…ďi wuluure ko wa …≤allal gootal.

Awa Joomiraa…óo on alaa nennude hunnugol fodaari makko ndin, wano wo…ď…ďe miijori non. Kono ka liddu …óun, o mu…≤…≤ani on tun, ko fii o yi…óaa hay gooto hayra. Kono ko o yi…ói, ko yo fow aru e tuubuubuyee.
Awa, …≤alaande Joomi on arday wa ngujjo. Nden …≤ande non kammuuli …óin muliray hito uuyungo, piiji oo aduna sunnee mula, leydi ndin kadi e kuu…óe ko ndi wondi kon fe…≤…≤inee.
∆Āay …óun fow non no e laawol mulirgol nii, haray pellet hi…óon haani wuurirde laa…ďal e no Alla faaliraa non.
Awa e nder ko habbi…óon ardu …≤alaande Alla nden kon, etee fii no …óun yaawira, …óun ko ka kammuuli …óin mulirta yiite …óon, e ka piiji oo aduna taayirta nguleendi yiite …óon.
Kono enen hi…óen habbii fodaari Alla ndin, …óun ko kammu hesu e leydi heyri ka peewal ngal ho…óoyta …óon.
Ko …óun wa…ói, yo yi…ď…ďe, e nder nden habbannde, etee fii, nde o aroyi, no o tawira on e nder …ďuttu, hara on aldaa e waadere, on aldaa e ella.
Jogoree mu…≤al Joomiraa…óo men on wa kisiyee, wano Puulusa, oo musi…ó…óo men yi…óaa…óo, windirani on non ka…≤un kadi, tippude e faamu ngu o ye…óaa ngun.

Ko …óun o woni wa…óude e …ďataake …óen fow, ka o wowli fii …óin piiji …óon, e ka windan…óe mettu…óe faamude …óen woni …óon, …óe tawata yim…ďe …ďe faamaa …ďen e …ďe tabitaa …ďen …ďoylii noone on, wano …ďe wa…óiri non e ko heddii e bindi …óin kon, fii hayrannde ma…ď…ďe kam…ďe tigi.
Onon non, yo yi…ď…ďe, …ďay on hajaama, reenee fii wota on selu jokkon …óayni …ďe …óoftaaki yamirooje Alla …óen, haa ka yoolon tabital mon ngal.
Awa …ďeydee yaarude yeeso e nder mo∆ī∆īere nden e andugol Joomi men on, on Dandoowo, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on, on mo mangural wonani jooni e haa poomaa. Aamiina!
Ko wonnoo kon gila ka fu…ó…óoode, ko …óun men nani, men yi'iri gite amen …óen, men punnii, men meemiri juu…óe amen …óen, …óun ko daaluyee ngurndan …óan.
Awa, ngurndan …óan fee…≤ii, men yi'ii …óan, me…óen seeditanaade …óan. Me…óen fe…≤…≤inande on *ngurndan poomayankejan …óan, …óan wondunoo…óan e Baabaajo on, …óan fe…≤…≤inanaama men.
Me…óen hollitude on onon kadi ko men yi'i kon e ko men nani kon fii no laatoron humondir…ďe e amen e nder humondiral men e Baabaajo on e ∆Āi…ó…óo makko on, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on.
Me…óen windude …óun…óoo fii no weltaare men nden timmira.
E hino kibaaru mo men naniri mo on, me…óen …ďanginande on mo: Alla ko ndaygu, niwre woo alaa e makko.
Si en innii hi…óen humondiri e makko, kono hi…óen yahude e nder niwre nden, haray en fenii, en wuuriraali goonga on.
Kono si tawii hi…óen yahude e nder ndaygu ngun, wano o woniri non kanko tigi ka nder ndaygu, haray hi…óen humondiri, …óun haray ∆īii∆īan Iisaa ∆Āi…ó…óo makko on no *la…ď…ďinde en e kala junuubu.
Si en innii en aldaa e junuubu, haray en …óaynitike enen tigi, …óun haray goonga on alaa e men.
Si en qirritike non junuubaaji men …óin, Alla ko Sella-Findeejo, Feewu…óo, o yaafanto en junuubaaji men …óin, o la…ď…ďina en e kala bonnere.
Si en innii en wa…óaali junuubu, haray en wa…óii mo fenoowo, …óun haray daaluyee makko on alaa e men.
Fay…ďe an, mi…óo windande on …óun…óoo fii wota on wa…óu junuubu. Kono si go…ó…óo aru e wa…óude junuubu, haray hi…óen mari Fattantoo…óo en moggo Baabaajo on, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu, Feewu…óo on.
Ko fii kanko tigi ko o sadaka fii no he…ďiren yaafuyee junuubaaji men …óin, hinaa non fii …ói men …óin tun, kono ko fii …ói …ďe aduna on fow.
Si en …óoftike yamirooje makko …óen, haray hi…óen felliti wonde hi…óen andi mo.
Kala on wi'u…óo no andi mo, hara o …óoftaaki yamirooje makko …óen, haray ko o fenoowo, goonga on alaa e makko.
Kono kala …óoftii…óo daaluyee makko on, haray giggol Alla ngol no timmi e makko, ko non andirten hi…óen humondiri e makko.
Kala on wi'u…óo no humondiri e makko, haray no haani wuurirde wano *Almasiihu on wuurirnoo non.
Yi…ď…ďe, hinaa yamiroore heyre mi woni windande on, ko yamiroore hinnde, nde he…ďuno…óon gila ka fu…ó…óoode. Ndee yamiroore hinnde, ko ngol kongol ngol nanu…óon.
Kono fow e mun, ko yamiroore heyre mi woni windande on. Haqiiqa mayre on no …ďangi e makko, no …ďangi e mon, ko fii niwre nden no fe∆ī∆īude, awa kadi ndaygu haqiiqawu ngun ndaygii toode.
On wi'u…óo no ka ndaygu e hoore a…≤ugol musi…ó…óo mun, haray haa jooni himo ka niwre.
On mo yi…ói musi…ó…óo mun, haray himo ka ndaygu, peggal woo alanaa mo.
Kono on a…≤u…óo musi…ó…óo mun ko ka niwre woni, ko e nder niwre o woni yahude, o andaa ka o woni yaarude, ko fii niwre nden wuminii gite makko …óen.
Mi…óo windande on, yo fay…ďe, …ďay junuubaaji mon …óin yaaforaama sabu innde makko nden.
Mi…óo windande on, yo baabiraa…ďe, …ďay on andii on Woodanoo…óo gila ka fu…ó…óoode. Mi…óo windande on, yo sukaa…ďe, …ďay on foolii bon…óo on.

Mi windanii on kadi, yo fay…ďe, …ďay on andii Baabaajo on. Mi windanii on kadi, yo baabiraa…ďe, …ďay on andii Woodanoo…óo on gila ka fu…ó…óoode. Mi windanii on kadi, yo sukaa…ďe, …ďay hi…óon tii…ói, daaluyee Alla on no e mon, awa kadi on foolii bon…óo on.
Wota on yi…óu aduna on e ko woni e aduna on kon. On mo yi…ói aduna on, haray giggol Baabaajo on alaa e makko.
Ko fii kala ko woni e oo aduna, …óun ko mbelee…óe …ďandu e himmangol ko yi'i e mantorgol keyeeji aduna, hinaa e Baabaajo on iwri, kono ko e oo aduna.
Awa oo aduna e himmeeji mun ko ko woni fe∆ī∆īude, kono on wa…óoowo faale Alla on luttay haa poomaa.

Awa, yo fay…ďe, ko saa'i sakkitoro on nii. Wano nanir…óon non, liddotoo…óo Almasiihu on aray, e hay fewndo …óoo toode liddotoo…ďe Almasiihu on …óuu…óu…ďe arii. Ko nii andirten wonde ko saa'i sakkitoro on nii.
∆Āen non ko e men iwi, kono hinaa …ďe men, ko fii si …ďe wonno …ďe men, …ďe luttidayno e men. Kono …óun …ďanginii wonde …ďe fow wonaa …ďe men.
Onon kan, *Senii…óo on ye…óii on Ruuhu mun on, ko …óun wa…ói si on fow hi…óon mari andal.
Mi windiranaali on wa si tawii on andaa goonga on, kono ko …ďay hi…óon andi, e hi…óon andi kadi wonde fenaande woo iwataa e goonga.
Ko hombo non woni on fenoowo, si hinaa on yeddu…óo wonde Iisaa ko Almasiihu? On ko liddotoo…óo Almasiihu on, yeddu…óo Baabaajo on e ∆Āi…ó…óo on.
Awa kala yeddu…óo ∆Āi…ó…óo on he…ďaali Baabaajo on, kala qirritii…óo ∆Āi…ó…óo on, haray he…ďii Baabaajo on.

Onon non, ko nanu…óon kon gila ka fu…ó…óoode no haani wonude ka …ďer…óe mon. Si tawii ko nanu…óon kon gila ka fu…ó…óoode wonii ka …ďer…óe mon, haray onon kadi on humondirii e ∆Āi…ó…óo on e Baabaajo on.
Awa e hino fodaari ndi o wa…óani en ndin: ko *ngurndan poomayankejan …óan.
Mi windiranii on …óun e telen-ma won…ďe …óaynude on …ďen.

Ko fii onon, Ruuhu mo he…ďir…óon Almasiihu on no e mon, ko …óun wa…ói on hatonjinaa e janneede, kono, wano Ruuhu makko on woni jannirde on piiji …óin fow non, (ko mo goonga, mo aldaa e fenaande), humondiree e Almasiihu on wano Ruuhu makko on janniri on non.
Jooni non, yo fay…ďe, humondiree e makko, fii, nde o fee…≤oyi, yo en he…ďu hoolaare, e nde o ari, wota en hersu yeeso makko.
Si tawii hi…óon andi ko o Feewu…óo, haray andee kala wa…óu…óo ko feewi ko jibinannde makko.
Ndaaree noone giggol ngol Baabaajo on ye…ói en ngol, haa nodda…óen fay…ďe Alla. Awa kadi ko en …óun. E hino ko wa…ói kon si aduna on andaa en, ko fii o andaali mo.
Yi…ď…ďe, jooni non ko en fay…ďe Alla. Ko wonoyten kon fe…≤…≤inaaka taho. Kono hi…óen andi, nde o fee…≤oyi, en nandoyay e makko, ko fii en yi'oyay mo wano o woniri non.
Kala jogii…óo on tama'u e makko, haray no la…ď…ďintinii wano kanko *Almasiihu on o laa…ďiri non.
Kala non on wa…óu…óo junuubu, haray ontigi bonnii Sariya on, ko fii junuubu ko bonnugol Sariya.
Kono hi…óon andi, kanko Almasiihu on ko o fee…≤iri ko fii ittugol junuubaaji, e hin-le junuubu alaa e makko.
Kala on humondir…óo e makko duumotaako e wa…óugol junuubu. Kala non wa…óoowo junuubu, haray yi'aali mo, andaali mo.
Ko onon, yo fay…ďe, wota hay gooto …óaynu on, ko fii kala on wa…óu…óo ko feewi, haray ko feewu…óo, wano kanko Almasiihu on o woniri feewu…óo non.
Kala non on wa…óoowo junuubu, haray ko mo Ibuliisa, ko fii gila ka fu…ó…óoode Ibuliisa no wa…óude junuubu. *∆Āi…ó…óo Alla on-le ko fee…≤iri ko fii mulugol kuu…óe Ibuliisa …óen.
Kala on jibinaa…óo immorde e Alla duumotaako e wa…óugol junuubu, ko fii haray awdi Alla ndin no e makko, haray o waawataa wa…óude junuubu, …ďay ko e immorde e Alla woni ko o jibinaa.
Awa e hino ko …ďangini hakkunde fay…ďe Alla …ďen e fay…ďe Ibuliisa …ďen: kala on mo wa…óataa ko feewi, haray hinaa mo Alla, ko wano non kadi on mo yi…óaa musi…ó…óo mun.
E hino kibaaru mo nanu…óon on gila ka fu…ó…óoode: yi…óindiren.

Wota en wa'u wa Qaayiina, on mo Ibuliisa, warunoo…óo mi…≤…≤iraawo mun on. E ko fii hon…óun o warannoo mo? Ko tawde kuu…óe makko …óen kanko Qaayiina ko bon…óe, …óe mi…≤…≤iraawo makko on …óen kan ko feewu…óe.
Musi…ď…ďe an, si tawii aduna on no a…≤i on, haray wota on Ňčal…óu.
Ko fii hi…óen andi ko e mayde iwu…óen, aru…óen e ngurndan, …ďay hi…óen yi…ói musi…ď…ďe men …ďen. On mo alaa giggol, haray ko ka mayde woni.
Kala on a…≤u…óo musi…ó…óo mun, haray ko waroowo. Hi…óon andi-le kala waroowo, haray *ngurndan poomayankejan alaa e makko.
E hino no andirten ko woni giggol: Almasiihu on okkitirii ngurndan mun …óan fii men, haray enen kadi hi…óen haani okkitirde ngurndan men …óan fii musi…ď…ďe men …ďen.
Si tawii go…ó…óo no mari ngaluuji aduna, o yi'ii musi…ó…óo makko sokol…óo, o ombanii mo gite, haray ko honno giggol Alla ngol wonirta e makko?
Ko onon, yo fay…ďe, wota en yi…óir kongol maa …óenngal tun, kono yi…óiren kuugal e goonga.
Ko nii andirten ko en …ďe goonga, …ďer…óe men …óen he…ďirta kadi hoolaare yeeso makko.
Hay si …ďer…óe men …óen no felude en, Alla no …ďuri …ďer…óe men …óen mawnude, e himo andi fow.
Awa, yo yi…ď…ďe, si tawii …ďer…óe men …óen felaali en, haray hi…óen mari hoolaare yeeso Alla.
Kala ko tori…óen mo, en he…ďiray mo, …ďay hi…óen …óoftii yamirooje makko …óen, hi…óen wa…óude ko welata mo.
Awa e hino yamiroore makko nden: ko yo en gom…óin innde ∆Āi…ó…óo makko on, …óun ko Iisaa Almasiihu on, yi…óindiren kadi wano o yamiri en non.

Kala on …óoftii…óo yamirooje makko …óen, haray no humondiri e Alla, Alla kadi no humondiri e makko. Awa kadi e hino no andirten wonde himo humondiri e men: ko *Ruuhu Senii…óo mo o ye…ói en on andir…óen …óun.

Ko onon, yo yi…ď…ďe, wota on hoolo kala ne…ó…óo wi'u…óo Ruuhu Alla on no e makko, kono taskee …ďe fii andugol si ruuhu won…óo e ma…ď…ďe on ko e Alla iwri, ko fii wa…óitii…ďe annaba …óuu…óu…ďe arii e oo aduna.

E hino no giggol Alla ngol fee…≤iri e men: Allaahu on addii ∆Āi…ó…óo makko bajjo on e nder oo aduna fii no wuuriren immorde e makko.
E hino ko woni ngol giggol kon: hinaa ko yi…óu…óen Alla kon, kono ko ko o yi…ói en kon, o addiri ∆Āi…ó…óo makko on sadaka fii no he…ďiren yaafuyee junuubaaji men …óin.
∆Āay Alla yi…óirii en nii, yo yi…ď…ďe, haray enen kadi hi…óen haani yi…óindirde.

Enen non hi…óen yi…ói, …ďay ko kanko adii en yi…óude.
On mo wi'i no yi…ói Alla, e hoore himo a…≤i musi…ó…óo makko, haray ko fenoowo. Ko fii on mo yi…óaali musi…ó…óo mun mo o renti on, haray o waawataa yi…óude Alla mo o rentaa on.
Awa, ko ndee yamiroore …óoo he…ďir…óen mo: mo no yi…ói Alla, yo yi…óu kadi musi…ó…óo mun on.
Kala on gom…óin…óo wonde ko Iisaa woni *Almasiihu on, haray ko jibinaa…óo immorde e Alla, e kala yi…óu…óo Baabaajo on yi…óay ∆Āi…ó…óo on kadi.
E hino no andirten hi…óen yi…ói fay…ďe Alla …ďen: ko si en yi…óii Alla, en …óoftike yamirooje makko …óen.
Ko woni yi…óugol Alla: ko …óoftagol yamirooje makko …óen. Yamirooje makko …óen-le hinaa sattu…óe,

ko Ruuhu Allaahu on e ndiyan …óan e ∆īii∆īan …óan, …óin non tati hi…ói fotti.

Kala fe∆ī∆īitu…óo jannde *Almasiihu on, ronki humaade e mayre, haray on wonaa humondir…óo e Alla. Kala non tabitu…óo e nden jannde, haray no humondiri e Baaba on e ∆Āi…ó…óo on.

∆Āen ko yim…ďe Ňčormotoo…ďe, woytotoo…ďe, jokku…ďe himmeeji mun, …ďe tawata kundule mun no wowla haalaaji manti, mantoo…ďe yim…ďe fii nafa mun.
